detail.summary_short: Microsoft Agent 365's May 1 registry sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Gemini Enterprise is the first cross-cloud agent-identity primitive in production. By Q3 2026 a standards body publishes a draft RFC formalizing the protocol before vendor-specific schemas lock in.

summary_short_locales.en: Microsoft Agent 365's May 1 registry sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Gemini Enterprise is the first cross-cloud agent-identity primitive in production. By Q3 2026 a standards body publishes a draft RFC formalizing the protocol before vendor-specific schemas lock in.
summary_short_locales.ja: Microsoft Agent 365 が5月1日に AWS Bedrock + Google Gemini Enterprise と多クラウド・レジストリ同期を出荷、初の本番クロスクラウド・エージェント識別基本機能となる。Q3 2026までにベンダー固有スキーマがロックインする前に標準化機関が RFC 草案を公開。
summary_short_locales.es: La sincronización multicloud del registro Microsoft Agent 365 del 1 de mayo con AWS Bedrock + Google Gemini Enterprise es el primer primitivo cross-cloud de identidad de agente en producción. Para Q3 2026 un cuerpo de estándares publica un borrador RFC formalizando el protocolo antes de que se fijen esquemas vendor-specific.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 multicloud registry sync sa AWS Bedrock + Google Gemini Enterprise ay ang unang cross-cloud agent-identity primitive sa production. By Q3 2026, isang standards body ay magpa-publish ng draft RFC na nag-formalize ng protocol bago mag-lock-in ang vendor-specific schemas.

bridges.text: Today's Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync carry + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source + Cisco Zero Trust Access for agents + AI Defense: Explorer Edition + CSA Zero Trust first-pillar + Federal News Network agent-machine-speed framing supports `because` (cross-cloud agent-identity primitive standardization). Reason: the Microsoft + Cisco convergence on the same agent-identity-control-plane primitive within a single RSAC week is the cleanest structural-precedent yet for an SDO-side RFC because the protocol-interop substrate is now in production. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: no SDO RFC working group draft has been published yet; the convergence is on schedule but the formal RFC is the next deliverable.

text_locales.en: Today's Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync carry + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source + Cisco Zero Trust Access for agents + AI Defense: Explorer Edition + CSA Zero Trust first-pillar + Federal News Network agent-machine-speed framing supports `because` (cross-cloud agent-identity primitive standardization). Reason: the Microsoft + Cisco convergence on the same agent-identity-control-plane primitive within a single RSAC week is the cleanest structural-precedent yet for an SDO-side RFC because the protocol-interop substrate is now in production. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: no SDO RFC working group draft has been published yet; the convergence is on schedule but the formal RFC is the next deliverable.
text_locales.ja: 本日の Microsoft Agent 365 5月1日 GA Registry Sync 繰り越し + Cisco DefenseClaw オープンソース + Cisco Zero Trust Access for agents + AI Defense: Explorer Edition + CSA Zero Trust ファーストピラー + Federal News Network エージェント・マシンスピード・フレーミングは `because`（クロスクラウド・エージェント・アイデンティティ・プリミティブ標準化）を支持する。理由: Microsoft + Cisco が同じエージェント・アイデンティティ・コントロールプレーン・プリミティブに単一 RSAC 週内で収束しており、SDO 側 RFC への最も澄んだ構造的前例であり、プロトコル interop 基板が今や本番にあるため。Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: SDO RFC ワーキンググループ・ドラフトはまだ公開されていない；収束は予定通りだが正式 RFC が次のデリバラブル。
text_locales.es: Carry Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync de hoy + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source + Cisco Zero Trust Access for agents + AI Defense: Explorer Edition + first-pillar CSA Zero Trust + framing agent-machine-speed Federal News Network apoya `because` (estandarización primitivo cross-cloud agent-identity). Razón: la convergencia Microsoft + Cisco en el mismo primitivo agent-identity-control-plane dentro de una sola semana RSAC es el structural-precedent más limpio hasta ahora para un RFC SDO-side porque el sustrato protocol-interop está ahora en producción. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: ningún draft de SDO RFC working group ha sido publicado aún; la convergencia está en cronograma pero el RFC formal es el siguiente deliverable.
text_locales.fil: Today's Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync carry + Cisco DefenseClaw open-source + Cisco Zero Trust Access para sa agents + AI Defense: Explorer Edition + CSA Zero Trust first-pillar + Federal News Network agent-machine-speed framing ay nag-su-suporta sa `because` (cross-cloud agent-identity primitive standardization). Reason: ang Microsoft + Cisco convergence sa parehong agent-identity-control-plane primitive sa loob ng iisang RSAC week ay ang pinaka-malinis na structural-precedent pa para sa SDO-side RFC because ang protocol-interop substrate ay ngayon nasa production. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: walang SDO RFC working group draft pa na na-publish; ang convergence ay nasa schedule pero ang formal RFC ay ang next deliverable.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By Q3 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + the parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack converges into a published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) that formalizes the cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema as a standard interop layer.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: once Microsoft ships the registry-sync primitive at $15/user/mo with M365 admin-surface integration, AWS + Google must either expose parallel surfaces or be absorbed into the Microsoft schema; CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) provide the threat-side standardization pressure; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA already standardize the build/runtime layer so the missing piece is the interop-protocol layer the registry-sync proves works; expect Microsoft + AWS + Google to triangulate on a public draft RFC because vendor-specific schemas would lose the M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage.
detail.prediction_summary: **By Q3 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + the parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack converges into a published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) that formalizes the cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema as a standard interop layer.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: once Microsoft ships the registry-sync primitive at $15/user/mo with M365 admin-surface integration, AWS + Google must either expose parallel surfaces or be absorbed into the Microsoft schema; CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) provide the threat-side standardization pressure; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA already standardize the build/runtime layer so the missing piece is the interop-protocol layer the registry-sync proves works; expect Microsoft + AWS + Google to triangulate on a public draft RFC because vendor-specific schemas would lose the M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage.

prediction_summary_locales.en: **By Q3 2026 the Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync with AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + the parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack converges into a published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) that formalizes the cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema as a standard interop layer.** Forcing function is enterprise procurement: once Microsoft ships the registry-sync primitive at $15/user/mo with M365 admin-surface integration, AWS + Google must either expose parallel surfaces or be absorbed into the Microsoft schema; CSAI's Apr 29 MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) provide the threat-side standardization pressure; the Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA already standardize the build/runtime layer so the missing piece is the interop-protocol layer the registry-sync proves works; expect Microsoft + AWS + Google to triangulate on a public draft RFC because vendor-specific schemas would lose the M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年第3四半期までに、5月1日 Microsoft Agent 365 GA Registry Sync(AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform)+ Anthropic MCP SDK 月間ダウンロード ~9,700万 + 並行する4月30日 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore スタックが、クロスクラウド・エージェント識別 + MCP サーバー在庫 + ツール呼び出しログ・スキーマを標準的相互運用層として形式化する RFC 草案(IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation ワーキンググループ)へと収斂する。** 強制要因はエンタープライズ調達。Microsoft が $15/user/月で M365 管理面統合のレジストリ同期基本機能を出荷した瞬間、AWS + Google は並行サーフェスを公開するか Microsoft スキーマに吸収されるかを迫られる。CSAI の4月29日 MITRE-CNA 権限 + ATT&CK v19 名前付き手法(MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment)が脅威側の標準化圧力を提供。4月30日 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA が既にビルド・ランタイム層を標準化しており、欠けているのは相互運用プロトコル層 — レジストリ同期がそれが機能することを証明している。Microsoft + AWS + Google はベンダー固有スキーマでは M365 + Bedrock + Vertex 設置基盤というアンカー優位を失うため、公開 RFC 草案で三角化する見込み。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el Q3 2026 el Microsoft Agent 365 GA del 1 de mayo Registry Sync con AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + descargas mensuales Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M + el stack paralelo OpenAI Agents SDK del 30 abril / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore convergerá en un borrador RFC publicado (grupo de trabajo IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation) que formaliza el esquema cross-cloud de identidad de agente + inventario de servidores MCP + log de invocación de herramientas como una capa estándar de interoperabilidad.** La función forzante es la adquisición empresarial: una vez que Microsoft entrega el primitivo registry-sync a $15/user/mes con integración admin-surface M365, AWS + Google deben exponer superficies paralelas o ser absorbidos en el esquema Microsoft; la autoridad MITRE-CNA del 29 abril CSAI + las técnicas nombradas ATT&CK v19 (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) proveen presión de estandarización del lado de amenazas; el 30 abril OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA ya estandarizan la capa build/runtime así que la pieza faltante es la capa de protocolo de interop que el registry-sync prueba que funciona; se espera que Microsoft + AWS + Google triangulen sobre un borrador RFC público porque esquemas vendor-specific perderían la ventaja de anclaje de base instalada M365 + Bedrock + Vertex.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **By Q3 2026 ang Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA Registry Sync sa AWS Bedrock + Google Cloud Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform + Anthropic MCP SDK ~97M monthly downloads + ang parallel Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK / Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework 1.0 GA / AWS Bedrock AgentCore stack ay magko-converge sa published draft RFC (IETF / OpenID Foundation / CSAI Foundation working group) na nag-formalize ng cross-cloud agent-identity + MCP-server inventory + tool-invocation log schema bilang standard interop layer.** Ang forcing function ay enterprise procurement: kapag nag-ship na ang Microsoft ng registry-sync primitive sa $15/user/mo na may M365 admin-surface integration, ang AWS + Google ay kailangang mag-expose ng parallel surfaces o ma-absorb sa Microsoft schema; ang Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment) ay nagbibigay ng threat-side standardization pressure; ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK + Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 GA ay na-standardize na ang build/runtime layer kaya ang nawawalang piraso ay ang interop-protocol layer na pina-prove ng registry-sync na gumagana; expect na ang Microsoft + AWS + Google ay magta-triangulate sa public draft RFC dahil ang vendor-specific schemas ay mawawalan ng M365 + Bedrock + Vertex installed-base anchor advantage.

nodes.label: AI agent security standards extend to the "third-party-vendor boundary" and "URL-naming entropy.
nodes.short_label: AI agent security standards extend to the "third-party-vendor boundary" and "URL-naming entropy.
nodes.description: **AI agent security standards extend to the "third-party-vendor boundary" and "URL-naming entropy."** The Mythos unauthorized-access incident (contractor + naming-convention guess + third-party leaked data) replays the Vercel-Context.ai supply-chain pattern, this time at a frontier-model access-control layer. By Q3 2026, "frontier model preview / early access third-party vendor environments" will be required to clear a common security baseline of SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum, and endpoint URLs / subdomains will move to randomized, hard-to-guess naming.

description.en: **AI agent security standards extend to the "third-party-vendor boundary" and "URL-naming entropy."** The Mythos unauthorized-access incident (contractor + naming-convention guess + third-party leaked data) replays the Vercel-Context.ai supply-chain pattern, this time at a frontier-model access-control layer. By Q3 2026, "frontier model preview / early access third-party vendor environments" will be required to clear a common security baseline of SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum, and endpoint URLs / subdomains will move to randomized, hard-to-guess naming.
description.ja: **AI エージェント・セキュリティ標準が「第三者ベンダ境界」と「URL 命名ハンデン」まで広がる** — Anthropic Mythos の未認可アクセス（外注＋命名規則推測＋サードパーティ流出データの組み合わせ）は、Vercel–Context.ai サプライチェーン侵害と同じ構造を frontier モデルアクセス制御で再演した。2026 Q3 には「フロンティアモデルプレビュー／早期アクセスの第三者ベンダ環境」は SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum の共通セキュリティベースラインを満たすことが事実上必須化し、エンドポイント URL / サブドメインは推測困難なランダム文字列ベースの命名に強制移行する。
description.es: **AI agent security standards extend to the "third-party-vendor boundary" and "URL-naming entropy."** The Mythos unauthorized-access incident (contractor + naming-convention guess + third-party leaked data) replays the Vercel-Context.ai supply-chain pattern, this time at a frontier-model access-control layer. prediction_summary_locales.es: **AI agent security standards extend to the "third-party-vendor boundary" and "URL-naming entropy."** The Mythos unauthorized-access incident (contractor + naming-convention guess + third-party leaked data) replays the Vercel-Context.ai supply-chain pattern, this time at a frontier-model access-control layer. By Q3 2026, "frontier model preview / early access third-party vendor environments" will be required to clear a common security baseline of SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum, and endpoint URLs / subdomains will move to randomized, hard-to-guess naming.

By Q3 2026, "frontier model preview / early access third-party vendor environments" will be required to clear a common security baseline of SOC 2 Type II + FedRAMP Moderate + Frontier Model Forum, and endpoint URLs / subdomains will move to randomized, hard-to-guess naming.

nodes.label: Attack surface against the MCP protocol itself" becomes the biggest enterprise AI adoption bottleneck by Q3 2026.
nodes.short_label: Attack surface against the MCP protocol itself" becomes the biggest enterprise AI adoption bottleneck by Q3 2026.
nodes.description: **"Attack surface against the MCP protocol itself" becomes the biggest enterprise AI adoption bottleneck by Q3 2026.** Nginx UI's **CVE-2026-33032 (MCPwn, CVSS 9.8)** — a structural defect where the `/mcp_message` endpoint, with its empty default IP allowlist, exposes 12 unauthenticated tool calls — was added to VulnCheck KEV after a 2-request real-world takeover in production. That tells us the MCP protocol itself needs to be redesigned as a web standard if it's going to scale. By Q3 2026, OWASP MCP Top 10 will be officially published, **MCP-over-mTLS / standardized OAuth scope specs by Anthropic / Microsoft / Google / Cisco / Cloudflare** will become industry standard, and Keycard / Okta for AI Agents / Wiz / Levo.ai / Pillar Security will roll out "MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall" products through Q4. Enterprise compliance audits will start tracking "number of MCP-connected tools / endpoints / authorization policies" as a new audit category.

description.en: **"Attack surface against the MCP protocol itself" becomes the biggest enterprise AI adoption bottleneck by Q3 2026.** Nginx UI's **CVE-2026-33032 (MCPwn, CVSS 9.8)** — a structural defect where the `/mcp_message` endpoint, with its empty default IP allowlist, exposes 12 unauthenticated tool calls — was added to VulnCheck KEV after a 2-request real-world takeover in production. That tells us the MCP protocol itself needs to be redesigned as a web standard if it's going to scale. By Q3 2026, OWASP MCP Top 10 will be officially published, **MCP-over-mTLS / standardized OAuth scope specs by Anthropic / Microsoft / Google / Cisco / Cloudflare** will become industry standard, and Keycard / Okta for AI Agents / Wiz / Levo.ai / Pillar Security will roll out "MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall" products through Q4. Enterprise compliance audits will start tracking "number of MCP-connected tools / endpoints / authorization policies" as a new audit category.
description.ja: **「MCP プロトコル自体への攻撃面」が 2026 Q3 までにエンタープライズ AI 採用の最大ボトルネックに** — Nginx UI **CVE-2026-33032 (MCPwn, CVSS 9.8)** の「`/mcp_message` エンドポイントが空デフォルト IP 許可リストで未認証 12 ツール呼び出し可能」という構造的欠陥が VulnCheck KEV 追加 + 実環境で 2 リクエストで完全乗っ取り達成という事実は、MCP プロトコルそのものを「ウェブ標準として再設計」しなければスケールしないシグナル。2026 Q3 までに OWASP MCP Top 10 が正式公開され、**Anthropic / Microsoft / Google / Cisco / Cloudflare による MCP-over-mTLS / 標準 OAuth scope 仕様** が業界標準化、Keycard / Okta for AI Agents / Wiz / Levo.ai / Pillar Security 等が「MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall」プロダクトを Q4 までに次々投入、エンタープライズの「MCP 接続ツール数 / 接続先 / 認可ポリシー」が新たなコンプライアンス監査項目として定着する。

bridges.text: Today's Microsoft Agent 365 GA at $15/user with tenant-level MCP-server allow/block + CSAI MITRE-CNA + ATT&CK v19 named techniques + CSA Identity blog supports the prediction's `so_that` component (the predicted MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall enterprise primitive ships). Reason: Agent 365 is the literal control-plane the prediction names, four months ahead of Q3. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: cross-vendor parity (AWS / GCP equivalent) and OWASP MCP Top 10 publication.

text_locales.en: Today's Microsoft Agent 365 GA at $15/user with tenant-level MCP-server allow/block + CSAI MITRE-CNA + ATT&CK v19 named techniques + CSA Identity blog supports the prediction's `so_that` component (the predicted MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall enterprise primitive ships). Reason: Agent 365 is the literal control-plane the prediction names, four months ahead of Q3. Coherence 5/5. text_locales.ja: 本日のMicrosoft Agent 365 GA $15/userでテナントレベルMCPサーバ allow/block + CSAI MITRE-CNA + ATT&CK v19 named techniques + CSA Identityブログが予測の `so_that` コンポーネント(予測されたMCP Gateway / MCP Firewall企業プリミティブ出荷)を支持。Reason: Agent 365は予測が名付けたコントロールプレーン本体を、Q3より4ヶ月早く出荷。Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: クロスベンダー同等(AWS / GCP相当)とOWASP MCP Top 10公表。
text_locales.es: El GA de Microsoft Agent 365 a $15/usuario con permitir/bloquear de servidores MCP a nivel de tenant + CSAI MITRE-CNA + técnicas nombradas ATT&CK v19 + blog CSA Identity de hoy apoyan el componente `so_that` de la predicción (la primitiva empresarial MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall predicha es enviada). Reason: Agent 365 es el plano de control literal que la predicción nombra, cuatro meses adelantado al Q3. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: paridad cross-vendor (equivalente AWS / GCP) y publicación OWASP MCP Top 10.
text_locales.fil: Ang Microsoft Agent 365 GA sa $15/user na may tenant-level MCP-server allow/block + CSAI MITRE-CNA + ATT&CK v19 named techniques + CSA Identity blog ngayon ay sumusuporta sa `so_that` component ng prediction (na-ship ang predicted MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall enterprise primitive). Reason: ang Agent 365 ay literal na control-plane na pinangalanan ng prediction, apat na buwan na maaga sa Q3. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: cross-vendor parity (AWS / GCP equivalent) at OWASP MCP Top 10 publication.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **"Attack surface against the MCP protocol itself" becomes the biggest enterprise AI adoption bottleneck by Q3 2026.** Nginx UI's **CVE-2026-33032 (MCPwn, CVSS 9.8)** — a structural defect where the `/mcp_message` endpoint, with its empty default IP allowlist, exposes 12 unauthenticated tool calls — was added to VulnCheck KEV after a 2-request real-world takeover in production. That tells us the MCP protocol itself needs to be redesigned as a web standard if it's going to scale. By Q3 2026, OWASP MCP Top 10 will be officially published, **MCP-over-mTLS / standardized OAuth scope specs by Anthropic / Microsoft / Google / Cisco / Cloudflare** will become industry standard, and Keycard / Okta for AI Agents / Wiz / Levo.ai / Pillar Security will roll out "MCP Gateway / MCP Firewall" products through Q4. Enterprise compliance audits will start tracking "number of MCP-connected tools / endpoints / authorization policies" as a new audit category.

nodes.label: Inference servers become the new "primitive supply chain"
nodes.short_label: Inference servers become the new "primitive supply chain"
nodes.description: **Inference servers become the new "primitive supply chain" — Q3 2026 sees the first AI Infra-specific CVE class (LLM-INFRA-CWE) with mandatory NVD tagging.** The Apr 19-26 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m exploited)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + the Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — composes a clear "inference-runtime + agentic-CI" attack-surface category. By Q3 2026, NIST/NVD adds a dedicated **"AI-Infra"** tag to its CVE schema, OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** to a top-3 entry, and supply-chain SBOM tooling (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) ships **per-engine signature feeds for vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** as standard SKUs.

description.en: **Inference servers become the new "primitive supply chain" — Q3 2026 sees the first AI Infra-specific CVE class (LLM-INFRA-CWE) with mandatory NVD tagging.** The Apr 19-26 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m exploited)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + the Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — composes a clear "inference-runtime + agentic-CI" attack-surface category. By Q3 2026, NIST/NVD adds a dedicated **"AI-Infra"** tag to its CVE schema, OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** to a top-3 entry, and supply-chain SBOM tooling (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) ships **per-engine signature feeds for vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** as standard SKUs.
description.ja: **推論サーバが新たな「プリミティブのサプライチェーン」になる — Q3 2026 に AI インフラ専用 CVE クラス (LLM-INFRA-CWE) が NVD タグ付け必須化される最初のケースが登場。** 4/19-26 のシーケンス — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 時間 31 分で攻撃成立)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar による Antigravity の `find_by_name -X` サンドボックス エスケープ** + 4/21 の Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot をまたいだ Comment-and-Control プロンプト インジェクション — が「推論ランタイム + エージェンティック CI」攻撃面のカテゴリーを形成。Q3 2026 までに NIST/NVD が CVE スキーマに **「AI-Infra」専用タグ**を追加、OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 が **「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」** をトップ 3 に格上げ、Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera が **vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama 各エンジン用の署名フィード**を標準 SKU として提供開始。
description.es: **Los servidores de inferencia se convierten en la nueva "cadena de suministro de primitivos" — el T3 2026 verá la primera clase de CVE específica de infraestructura AI (LLM-INFRA-CWE) con etiquetado obligatorio en NVD.** La secuencia 19/4-26/4 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 h 31 min explotado)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) RCE Jinja2 SSTI** + **escape de sandbox de Antigravity vía `find_by_name -X` (Pillar)** + la cadena Comment-and-Control del 21/4 sobre Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — compone una categoría clara de superficie de ataque "runtime de inferencia + CI agéntico". Para el T3 2026, NIST/NVD añade una etiqueta dedicada **"AI-Infra"** a su esquema CVE, OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 promueve **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** al top 3 y el tooling SBOM (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) entrega **feeds de firmas por motor para vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** como SKUs estándar.
description.fil: **Magiging bagong "primitive supply chain" ang inference servers — sa Q3 2026 lalabas ang unang AI Infra-specific CVE class (LLM-INFRA-CWE) na may mandatory NVD tagging.** Ang sequence ng Apr 19-26 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m exploited)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) Jinja2 SSTI RCE** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape sa pamamagitan ng `find_by_name -X`** + ang Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain sa Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot — ay bumubuo ng malinaw na "inference-runtime + agentic-CI" attack-surface category. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, magdadagdag ang NIST/NVD ng dedicated **"AI-Infra"** tag sa CVE schema nito, ipo-promote ng OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 ang **"Inference Server Template / Loader RCE"** sa top-3 entry, at maglalabas ang supply-chain SBOM tooling (Snyk / Wiz / Pillar / Lasso / Lakera) ng **per-engine signature feeds para sa vLLM / SGLang / LMDeploy / Triton / Ollama** bilang standard SKUs.

bridges.text: Today's SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (still unpatched ~14 days) + LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 + Spring AI + UTT/IBM Langflow May 1 wave + Linux Copy Fail KEV supports `because` (the inference-server CVE class is forming on schedule). Reason: cross-server cluster (vLLM + LMDeploy + Spring AI + LiteLLM + SGLang) + KEV-mandated remediation is the AI-Infra-CVE-class precondition. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: NVD does not yet tag with an inference-server-specific CWE / category.

text_locales.en: Today's SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (still unpatched ~14 days) + LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 + Spring AI + UTT/IBM Langflow May 1 wave + Linux Copy Fail KEV supports `because` (the inference-server CVE class is forming on schedule). Remaining gap: NVD はまだ推論サーバー固有の CWE / カテゴリでタグ付けしていない。
text_locales.es: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 de hoy (aún sin parche ~14 días) + LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 + Spring AI + ola UTT/IBM Langflow May 1 + Linux Copy Fail KEV apoya `because` (clase CVE inference-server formándose en cronograma). Razón: cluster cross-server (vLLM + LMDeploy + Spring AI + LiteLLM + SGLang) + remediación KEV-mandatoria es la precondición clase-AI-Infra-CVE. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: NVD aún no etiqueta con CWE / categoría inference-server-específica.

Reason: cross-server cluster (vLLM + LMDeploy + Spring AI + LiteLLM + SGLang) + KEV-mandated remediation ang AI-Infra-CVE-class precondition. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: ang NVD ay hindi pa nag-ta-tag ng inference-server-specific CWE / category.

nodes.label: The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive
nodes.short_label: The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive
nodes.description: **The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive — Q4 2026 sees CISA / NIST publish a sub-catalog for inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, separate from KEV.** The Apr 19-27 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (still unpatched)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in foundational CI/CD dep** + **Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — is no longer a "category emerging." NIST's Apr ops update (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus Google's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise in the wild** force CISA/NVD to ship a **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging by Q4 2026. OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" to top-3.

short_label.fil: Mag-graduate ang "AI-Infra CVE class" papuntang regulatory primitive

description.en: **The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive — Q4 2026 sees CISA / NIST publish a sub-catalog for inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, separate from KEV.** The Apr 19-27 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (still unpatched)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in foundational CI/CD dep** + **Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — is no longer a "category emerging." NIST's Apr ops update (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus Google's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise in the wild** force CISA/NVD to ship a **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging by Q4 2026. OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" to top-3.
description.ja: **「AI インフラ CVE クラス」が規制プリミティブへ昇格 — Q4 2026 に CISA / NIST が KEV から独立した「推論サーバ + エージェンティック CI ランタイム」サブカタログを公開。** 4/19-27 のシーケンス — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 時間 31 分)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (依然未パッチ)** + **Pillar の Antigravity サンドボックス エスケープ (`find_by_name -X` 経由)** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE (CI/CD 基盤依存)** + **4/21 Comment-and-Control プロンプト インジェクション チェーン (Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot)** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 サンドボックス バイパス** — はもはや「カテゴリ形成中」ではない。NIST の 4 月オペレーション更新 (CVE 公開数の記録的増加、AI 駆動評価サポート) と Google の **野生 IPI コンテンツ前年比 32% 増** を受けて、CISA/NVD が Q4 2026 までに **専用の「推論サーバ + エージェンティック ツール」CVE サブカタログ** を SBOM タグ付け必須でリリース。OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 は「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」をトップ 3 に格上げ。
description.es: **La "clase CVE de infraestructura de IA" se gradúa como primitiva regulatoria — el Q4 2026 verá a CISA / NIST publicar un subcatálogo para runtimes de servidores de inferencia + CI agente, separado del KEV.** La secuencia 19-27/04 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (sigue sin parche)** + **escape de sandbox en Antigravity vía `find_by_name -X` (Pillar)** + **CVE-2026-6951 RCE en simple-git, dependencia fundacional de CI/CD** + **cadena de inyección Comment-and-Control del 21/04 en Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **bypass de sandbox en OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329** — ya no es una "categoría emergente". La actualización de operaciones de NIST de abril (crecimiento récord de publicación de CVE, soporte de evaluación basado en IA) más el **aumento del 32% interanual de inyecciones indirectas en la wild de Google** obligan a CISA/NVD a entregar un **subcatálogo CVE dedicado a servidores de inferencia + herramientas agente** con etiquetado SBOM obligatorio para el Q4 2026. El OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 promueve "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" al top 3.
description.fil: **Mag-graduate ang "AI-Infra CVE class" papuntang regulatory primitive — sa Q4 2026, mag-publish ang CISA / NIST ng sub-catalog para sa inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, hiwalay sa KEV.** Ang sequence ng 4/19-27 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (hindi pa rin na-patch)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE sa foundational CI/CD dep** + **4/21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain sa Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — hindi na "category emerging." Ang April ops update ng NIST (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus ang **32% YoY na pagtaas ng indirect-prompt-injection sa wild ng Google** ang magpipilit sa CISA/NVD na mag-ship ng **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** na may mandatory SBOM tagging pagdating ng Q4 2026. I-promote ng OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 ang "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" papuntang top-3.

detail.title: The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive

bridges.text: Today's SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ~15-day unpatched run + Microsoft CVE-2026-26144 Excel XSS chain with Copilot Agent (silent data exfil with no user interaction) + Stellar Cyber agentic-AI threat survey supports `because` (the regulatory primitive is forming around a real cross-vendor cluster). Reason: the LLM-tooling-injection class now extends to host-app primitives via a shipping Microsoft chain, given that named-technique scaffolding plus issuer authority is in place across MITRE ATT&CK v19 + CSAI MITRE-CNA carry. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: CISA / NIST has not yet published an inference-server / agentic-CI sub-catalog separate from KEV.

text_locales.en: Today's SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ~15-day unpatched run + Microsoft CVE-2026-26144 Excel XSS chain with Copilot Agent (silent data exfil with no user interaction) + Stellar Cyber agentic-AI threat survey supports `because` (the regulatory primitive is forming around a real cross-vendor cluster). Reason: the LLM-tooling-injection class now extends to host-app primitives via a shipping Microsoft chain, given that named-technique scaffolding plus issuer authority is in place across MITRE ATT&CK v19 + CSAI MITRE-CNA carry. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: CISA / NIST has not yet published an inference-server / agentic-CI sub-catalog separate from KEV.
text_locales.ja: 本日の SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ~15日未パッチ稼働 + Microsoft CVE-2026-26144 Excel XSS チェーンと Copilot Agent（ユーザー操作なしのサイレント・データ流出）+ Stellar Cyber エージェンティック AI 脅威調査は `because`（規制プリミティブが実際のクロスベンダー・クラスター中心に形成中）を支持する。理由: LLM ツーリング・インジェクション・クラスが出荷中の Microsoft チェーン経由でホストアプリのプリミティブまで拡張され、名前付き手法基盤と発行体権限が MITRE ATT&CK v19 + CSAI MITRE-CNA 横断で揃っているため。Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: CISA / NIST はまだ KEV と分離した推論サーバー / agentic-CI サブカタログを公開していない。
text_locales.es: El run de SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ~15 días sin parche de hoy + cadena Microsoft CVE-2026-26144 Excel XSS con Copilot Agent (data exfil silencioso sin interacción de usuario) + encuesta amenazas agentic-AI Stellar Cyber apoya `because` (el primitivo regulatorio se está formando alrededor de un cluster cross-vendor real). Razón: la clase LLM-tooling-injection ahora se extiende a primitivos host-app vía una cadena Microsoft en producción, given que el andamio named-technique más issuer authority está en lugar a través de MITRE ATT&CK v19 + carry CSAI MITRE-CNA. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: CISA / NIST aún no ha publicado sub-catálogo inference-server / agentic-CI separado de KEV.
text_locales.fil: Today's SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ~15-day unpatched run + Microsoft CVE-2026-26144 Excel XSS chain na may Copilot Agent (silent data exfil na walang user interaction) + Stellar Cyber agentic-AI threat survey ay nag-su-suporta sa `because` (ang regulatory primitive ay nabubuo sa paligid ng real cross-vendor cluster). Reason: ang LLM-tooling-injection class ngayon ay nag-e-extend patungong host-app primitives via shipping Microsoft chain, given that named-technique scaffolding plus issuer authority ay nasa lugar sa MITRE ATT&CK v19 + CSAI MITRE-CNA carry. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: ang CISA / NIST ay hindi pa nag-publish ng inference-server / agentic-CI sub-catalog separate from KEV.

bridges.text: Today's CSAI MITRE-CNA + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques + Linux Copy Fail KEV + cPanel & WHM KEV + NIST CAISI RFI supports `because` (regulatory primitive forming). Reason: issuer-authority + named-technique scaffolding is in place across MITRE + CSA + NIST + CISA, and today's prediction #2 (frontier cyber-AI export-control category) is the operative escalation. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: CISA / NIST has not yet published an inference-server / agentic-CI sub-catalog separate from KEV.

Remaining gap: CISA / NIST はまだ KEV と分離した推論サーバー / agentic-CI サブカタログを公開していない。

Razón: andamio issuer-authority + named-technique está en lugar a través MITRE + CSA + NIST + CISA, y predicción hoy #2 (frontier cyber-AI export-control category) es la escalada operativa. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: CISA / NIST aún no ha publicado sub-catálogo inference-server / agentic-CI separado de KEV.

Reason: issuer-authority + named-technique scaffolding ay nasa lugar sa MITRE + CSA + NIST + CISA, at today's prediction #2 (frontier cyber-AI export-control category) ay ang operative escalation. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: ang CISA / NIST ay hindi pa nag-publish ng inference-server / agentic-CI sub-catalog separate from KEV.

Reason: el andamiaje de autoridad emisora + named-technique está en su lugar a través de MITRE + CSA + NIST. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: CISA / NIST aún no ha publicado un sub-catálogo de servidor de inferencia / agentic-CI separado de KEV.
text_locales.fil: Ang CSAI MITRE-CNA + ATT&CK v19 + NIST CAISI RFI + CISA KEV May 1 (Linux Copy Fail) ngayon ay sumusuporta sa `because` (regulatory primitive na nabubuo). Reason: ang issuer-authority + named-technique scaffolding ay nasa lugar na sa MITRE + CSA + NIST. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: hindi pa nag-publish ang CISA / NIST ng inference-server / agentic-CI sub-catalog na hiwalay sa KEV.

detail.prediction_summary: **The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive — Q4 2026 sees CISA / NIST publish a sub-catalog for inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, separate from KEV.** The Apr 19-27 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (still unpatched)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in foundational CI/CD dep** + **Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — is no longer a "category emerging." NIST's Apr ops update (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus Google's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise in the wild** force CISA/NVD to ship a **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging by Q4 2026. OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" to top-3.

prediction_summary_locales.en: **The "AI-Infra CVE class" graduates into a regulatory primitive — Q4 2026 sees CISA / NIST publish a sub-catalog for inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, separate from KEV.** The Apr 19-27 sequence — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (still unpatched)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in foundational CI/CD dep** + **Apr 21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain across Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — is no longer a "category emerging." NIST's Apr ops update (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus Google's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise in the wild** force CISA/NVD to ship a **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging by Q4 2026. OWASP's LLM Top 10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" to top-3.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「AI インフラ CVE クラス」が規制プリミティブへ昇格 — Q4 2026 に CISA / NIST が KEV から独立した「推論サーバ + エージェンティック CI ランタイム」サブカタログを公開。** 4/19-27 のシーケンス — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12 時間 31 分)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (依然未パッチ)** + **Pillar の Antigravity サンドボックス エスケープ (`find_by_name -X` 経由)** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE (CI/CD 基盤依存)** + **4/21 Comment-and-Control プロンプト インジェクション チェーン (Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot)** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 サンドボックス バイパス** — はもはや「カテゴリ形成中」ではない。NIST の 4 月オペレーション更新 (CVE 公開数の記録的増加、AI 駆動評価サポート) と Google の **野生 IPI コンテンツ前年比 32% 増** を受けて、CISA/NVD が Q4 2026 までに **専用の「推論サーバ + エージェンティック ツール」CVE サブカタログ** を SBOM タグ付け必須でリリース。OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 は「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」をトップ 3 に格上げ。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **La "clase CVE de infraestructura de IA" se gradúa como primitiva regulatoria — el Q4 2026 verá a CISA / NIST publicar un subcatálogo para runtimes de servidores de inferencia + CI agente, separado del KEV.** La secuencia 19-27/04 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (sigue sin parche)** + **escape de sandbox en Antigravity vía `find_by_name -X` (Pillar)** + **CVE-2026-6951 RCE en simple-git, dependencia fundacional de CI/CD** + **cadena de inyección Comment-and-Control del 21/04 en Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **bypass de sandbox en OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329** — ya no es una "categoría emergente". La actualización de operaciones de NIST de abril (crecimiento récord de publicación de CVE, soporte de evaluación basado en IA) más el **aumento del 32% interanual de inyecciones indirectas en la wild de Google** obligan a CISA/NVD a entregar un **subcatálogo CVE dedicado a servidores de inferencia + herramientas agente** con etiquetado SBOM obligatorio para el Q4 2026. El OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 promueve "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" al top 3.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Mag-graduate ang "AI-Infra CVE class" papuntang regulatory primitive — sa Q4 2026, mag-publish ang CISA / NIST ng sub-catalog para sa inference-server + agentic-CI runtimes, hiwalay sa KEV.** Ang sequence ng 4/19-27 — **LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 SSRF (12h31m)** + **SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (hindi pa rin na-patch)** + **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`** + **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE sa foundational CI/CD dep** + **4/21 Comment-and-Control prompt-injection chain sa Claude Code / Gemini CLI / Copilot** + **OpenClaw CVE-2026-41329 sandbox bypass** — hindi na "category emerging." Ang April ops update ng NIST (record CVE-publication growth, AI-driven evaluation support) plus ang **32% YoY na pagtaas ng indirect-prompt-injection sa wild ng Google** ang magpipilit sa CISA/NVD na mag-ship ng **dedicated inference-server + agentic-tool CVE sub-catalog** na may mandatory SBOM tagging pagdating ng Q4 2026. I-promote ng OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 ang "Inference Server Template / Loader RCE" papuntang top-3.

nodes.label: Inference-server SSTI graduates from one-off CVE to OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; CISA ships an "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog by Q3 2026.
nodes.short_label: Inference-server SSTI graduates from one-off CVE to OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; CISA ships an "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog by Q3 2026.
nodes.description: **Inference-server SSTI graduates from one-off CVE to OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; CISA ships an "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog by Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) **remains unpatched into Apr 28** (10+ days post-disclosure), with a public PoC and the same Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape now flagged as a copy-paste class spanning vLLM, LMDeploy, and adjacent inference servers. Combined with the **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, all 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, and Google/Forcepoint's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** with 10 in-the-wild payloads — pressure on NIST/CISA crystallizes. **By Q3 2026 CISA ships a dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging on inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) and agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" to top-3.

description.en: **Inference-server SSTI graduates from one-off CVE to OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; CISA ships an "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog by Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) **remains unpatched into Apr 28** (10+ days post-disclosure), with a public PoC and the same Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape now flagged as a copy-paste class spanning vLLM, LMDeploy, and adjacent inference servers. Combined with the **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, all 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, and Google/Forcepoint's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** with 10 in-the-wild payloads — pressure on NIST/CISA crystallizes. **By Q3 2026 CISA ships a dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging on inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) and agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" to top-3.
description.ja: **推論サーバSSTIが単発CVEからOWASP LLM Top-10 v2026項目へ昇格 — CISAは2026年Q3までに「AI-Infra KEV」サブカタログを公開する。** SGLang CVE-2026-5760(CVSS 9.8)は4/28時点でも**未パッチ**(開示後10日以上)、公開PoCがあり、`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` 不使用のJinja2の同型がvLLM / LMDeploy / 周辺推論サーバを横断するコピペクラスとして指摘されている。**4/27-28のTotolink CVE 4連発(7153/7154/7156/7202、すべて9.8)**、**Cisco ISE 認証不要RCE**、**simple-git CVE-2026-6951 のCI/CD向けRCE**、**PillarのAntigravity サンドボックスエスケープ(`find_by_name -X`経由)**、Google / Forcepoint の**間接プロンプトインジェクション 32% YoY 増加** + 10件の野生ペイロードを合わせると、NIST / CISAへの圧力が結晶化する。**2026年Q3までにCISAは専用「AI-Infra」KEVサブカタログ**を公開し、推論サーバ(vLLM / SGLang / Ollama / llama.cpp / LMDeploy)とエージェント型CIランタイム(Claude Code / Codex / Antigravity / OpenClaw)に対するSBOMタグ付けを義務化する。OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026は「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」をTop-3に格上げする。
description.es: **El SSTI en servidores de inferencia se gradúa de CVE puntual a entrada en OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026; CISA publicará un sub-catálogo "AI-Infra KEV" para Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9,8) **sigue sin parche al 28 abr** (10+ días post-divulgación), con PoC público y la misma forma de Jinja2-sin-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` ahora marcada como una clase de copia-pega que abarca vLLM, LMDeploy y servidores de inferencia adyacentes. Combinado con el **cuádruple CVE Totolink del 27-28 abr (7153/7154/7156/7202, todos 9,8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE en CI/CD**, **escape de sandbox Antigravity de Pillar vía `find_by_name -X`**, y el **aumento del 32% YoY en inyección indirecta de prompt** de Google/Forcepoint con 10 payloads en estado salvaje — la presión sobre NIST/CISA cristaliza. **Para Q3 2026 CISA publicará un sub-catálogo dedicado "AI-Infra" KEV** con etiquetado SBOM obligatorio sobre servidores de inferencia (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) y runtimes agénticos de CI (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promueve "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" al top-3.
description.fil: **Ang Inference-server SSTI ay magta-graduate mula one-off CVE patungong OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; magpa-publish ang CISA ng "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) ay **hindi pa rin patched hanggang Apr 28** (10+ araw post-disclosure), na may public PoC at parehong Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape na ngayon flagged bilang copy-paste class na sumasaklaw sa vLLM, LMDeploy, at adjacent inference servers. Pagsamahin sa **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, lahat 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE sa CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, at sa **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** ng Google/Forcepoint na may 10 in-the-wild payloads — nagcrystallize ang pressure sa NIST/CISA. **Pagdating ng Q3 2026 magpapadala ang CISA ng dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** na may mandatory SBOM tagging sa inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) at agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). I-promote ng OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 ang "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" sa top-3.

OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" to top-3.

detail.title: Inference-server SSTI graduates from one-off CVE to OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; CISA ships an "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog by Q3 2026.

bridges.text: Today's SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ~15d unpatched into May 4 + CERT/CC ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment workaround + Microsoft CVE-2026-26144 Excel/Copilot chain + Stellar Cyber agentic-AI threat survey supports `because` (the OWASP class is forming + CISA AI-Infra KEV pressure builds). Reason: the SGLang Jinja2/SSTI primitive is now compounded by a host-app + agent chain in production, given that named-technique scaffolding is locked across MITRE + CSAI + CSA. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 not yet published; CISA AI-Infra KEV sub-catalog not yet shipped.

text_locales.en: Today's SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ~15d unpatched into May 4 + CERT/CC ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment workaround + Microsoft CVE-2026-26144 Excel/Copilot chain + Stellar Cyber agentic-AI threat survey supports `because` (the OWASP class is forming + CISA AI-Infra KEV pressure builds). Reason: the SGLang Jinja2/SSTI primitive is now compounded by a host-app + agent chain in production, given that named-technique scaffolding is locked across MITRE + CSAI + CSA. Coherence 4/5. text_locales.ja: 本日の SGLang CVE-2026-5760 が5月4日まで ~15日未パッチ + CERT/CC ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment 回避策 + Microsoft CVE-2026-26144 Excel/Copilot チェーン + Stellar Cyber エージェンティック AI 脅威調査は `because`（OWASP クラス形成中 + CISA AI-Infra KEV 圧力構築）を支持する。理由: SGLang Jinja2/SSTI プリミティブが本番のホストアプリ + エージェント・チェーンによって今や複合化され、名前付き手法基盤が MITRE + CSAI + CSA 横断で固定されているため。Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: OWASP LLM Top 10 v2026 はまだ未公開；CISA AI-Infra KEV サブカタログはまだ未出荷。

Razón: el primitivo SGLang Jinja2/SSTI ahora está compounded por una cadena host-app + agent en producción, given que el andamio named-technique está locked a través de MITRE + CSAI + CSA. Reason: ang SGLang Jinja2/SSTI primitive ay ngayon na-co-compound ng host-app + agent chain sa production, given that named-technique scaffolding ay locked across MITRE + CSAI + CSA. Coherence 4/5. detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **Inference-server SSTI graduates from one-off CVE to OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; CISA ships an "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog by Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) **remains unpatched into Apr 28** (10+ days post-disclosure), with a public PoC and the same Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape now flagged as a copy-paste class spanning vLLM, LMDeploy, and adjacent inference servers. Combined with the **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, all 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, and Google/Forcepoint's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** with 10 in-the-wild payloads — pressure on NIST/CISA crystallizes. **By Q3 2026 CISA ships a dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging on inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) and agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" to top-3.
detail.prediction_summary: **Inference-server SSTI graduates from one-off CVE to OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; CISA ships an "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog by Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) **remains unpatched into Apr 28** (10+ days post-disclosure), with a public PoC and the same Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape now flagged as a copy-paste class spanning vLLM, LMDeploy, and adjacent inference servers. Combined with the **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, all 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, and Google/Forcepoint's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** with 10 in-the-wild payloads — pressure on NIST/CISA crystallizes. **By Q3 2026 CISA ships a dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging on inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) and agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" to top-3.

prediction_summary_locales.en: **Inference-server SSTI graduates from one-off CVE to OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; CISA ships an "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog by Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) **remains unpatched into Apr 28** (10+ days post-disclosure), with a public PoC and the same Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape now flagged as a copy-paste class spanning vLLM, LMDeploy, and adjacent inference servers. Combined with the **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, all 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE in CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, and Google/Forcepoint's **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** with 10 in-the-wild payloads — pressure on NIST/CISA crystallizes. **By Q3 2026 CISA ships a dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** with mandatory SBOM tagging on inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) and agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promotes "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" to top-3.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **推論サーバSSTIが単発CVEからOWASP LLM Top-10 v2026項目へ昇格 — CISAは2026年Q3までに「AI-Infra KEV」サブカタログを公開する。** SGLang CVE-2026-5760(CVSS 9.8)は4/28時点でも**未パッチ**(開示後10日以上)、公開PoCがあり、`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` 不使用のJinja2の同型がvLLM / LMDeploy / 周辺推論サーバを横断するコピペクラスとして指摘されている。**4/27-28のTotolink CVE 4連発(7153/7154/7156/7202、すべて9.8)**、**Cisco ISE 認証不要RCE**、**simple-git CVE-2026-6951 のCI/CD向けRCE**、**PillarのAntigravity サンドボックスエスケープ(`find_by_name -X`経由)**、Google / Forcepoint の**間接プロンプトインジェクション 32% YoY 増加** + 10件の野生ペイロードを合わせると、NIST / CISAへの圧力が結晶化する。**2026年Q3までにCISAは専用「AI-Infra」KEVサブカタログ**を公開し、推論サーバ(vLLM / SGLang / Ollama / llama.cpp / LMDeploy)とエージェント型CIランタイム(Claude Code / Codex / Antigravity / OpenClaw)に対するSBOMタグ付けを義務化する。OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026は「Inference Server Template / Loader RCE」をTop-3に格上げする。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **El SSTI en servidores de inferencia se gradúa de CVE puntual a entrada en OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026; CISA publicará un sub-catálogo "AI-Infra KEV" para Q3 2026.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9,8) **sigue sin parche al 28 abr** (10+ días post-divulgación), con PoC público y la misma forma de Jinja2-sin-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` ahora marcada como una clase de copia-pega que abarca vLLM, LMDeploy y servidores de inferencia adyacentes. Combinado con el **cuádruple CVE Totolink del 27-28 abr (7153/7154/7156/7202, todos 9,8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE en CI/CD**, **escape de sandbox Antigravity de Pillar vía `find_by_name -X`**, y el **aumento del 32% YoY en inyección indirecta de prompt** de Google/Forcepoint con 10 payloads en estado salvaje — la presión sobre NIST/CISA cristaliza. **Para Q3 2026 CISA publicará un sub-catálogo dedicado "AI-Infra" KEV** con etiquetado SBOM obligatorio sobre servidores de inferencia (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) y runtimes agénticos de CI (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 promueve "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" al top-3.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Ang Inference-server SSTI ay magta-graduate mula one-off CVE patungong OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 entry; magpa-publish ang CISA ng "AI-Infra KEV" sub-catalog pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) ay **hindi pa rin patched hanggang Apr 28** (10+ araw post-disclosure), na may public PoC at parehong Jinja2-without-`ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` shape na ngayon flagged bilang copy-paste class na sumasaklaw sa vLLM, LMDeploy, at adjacent inference servers. Pagsamahin sa **Apr 27-28 Totolink CVE quad (7153/7154/7156/7202, lahat 9.8)**, **Cisco ISE unauth-RCE**, **simple-git CVE-2026-6951 RCE sa CI/CD**, **Pillar's Antigravity sandbox-escape via `find_by_name -X`**, at sa **32% YoY indirect-prompt-injection rise** ng Google/Forcepoint na may 10 in-the-wild payloads — nagcrystallize ang pressure sa NIST/CISA. **Pagdating ng Q3 2026 magpapadala ang CISA ng dedicated "AI-Infra" KEV sub-catalog** na may mandatory SBOM tagging sa inference servers (vLLM/SGLang/Ollama/llama.cpp/LMDeploy) at agentic-CI runtimes (Claude Code/Codex/Antigravity/OpenClaw). I-promote ng OWASP LLM Top-10 v2026 ang "Inference Server Template/Loader RCE" sa top-3.

nodes.label: By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate.
nodes.short_label: By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate.
nodes.description: **By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate.** ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious ClawHub skills + Cisco's **36% prompt-injection rate across the OpenClaw skill marketplace** is no longer a one-off — Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. With Corpus2Skill making **"skills as a navigable artifact"** mainstream and the Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) calling skills/harness/protocol the dominant 2026 design layer, the attack surface is now **first-class infrastructure**, not a side-channel. By H2 2026 we see (a) a published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style or NIST-led) covering skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, and (b) at least one major marketplace mandating signed-and-provenance-attested skills before publish — with Anthropic's 17-skill repo, ClawHub, Multica's marketplace, and Hugging Face's agent-trace surface as the first candidates.

label.en: By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate.

description.en: **By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate.** ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious ClawHub skills + Cisco's **36% prompt-injection rate across the OpenClaw skill marketplace** is no longer a one-off — Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. With Corpus2Skill making **"skills as a navigable artifact"** mainstream and the Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) calling skills/harness/protocol the dominant 2026 design layer, the attack surface is now **first-class infrastructure**, not a side-channel. By H2 2026 we see (a) a published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style or NIST-led) covering skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, and (b) at least one major marketplace mandating signed-and-provenance-attested skills before publish — with Anthropic's 17-skill repo, ClawHub, Multica's marketplace, and Hugging Face's agent-trace surface as the first candidates.
description.ja: **H2 2026までにエージェント・スキルの攻撃面が独自のMITRE ATT&CKスタイルのサブマトリクスを取得し、少なくとも1つの主要スキル・マーケットプレイス(Anthropic公式skills、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Face skills/agent traces)が署名 + プロビナンス必須ゲートを出荷する。** ClawHavocのClawHub内1,184個の悪性スキル + OpenClawマーケットプレイス全体での**Cisco 36%プロンプトインジェクション率**は、もはや一過性ではない — 4/28のNovita SandboxはOpenClaw + Hermes + 自律エージェント・ランタイム専用に作られた最初の商用緩和プロダクト。Corpus2Skillが「ナビゲート可能なアーティファクトとしてのスキル」を主流化し、Externalization-in-LLM-Agentsサーベイ(arxiv 2604.08224)がskills/harness/protocolを2026支配的設計層と位置付けたことで、攻撃面は**サイドチャネルではなくファーストクラス・インフラ**になった。H2 2026までに(a)スキル汚染 + スキル経由の間接プロンプトインジェクション + クロススキル特権チェーンを網羅した公開エージェント・スキル脅威マトリクス(MITREスタイルまたはNIST主導)、および(b)公開前に署名 + プロビナンス証明済みスキルを義務化する主要マーケットプレイス、をAnthropicの17スキルレポ、ClawHub、Multicaマーケットプレイス、Hugging Faceエージェント・トレース面の中から最初の候補が出す。
description.es: **Para H2 2026 la superficie de ataque skills-de-agente aterriza su propia sub-matriz estilo MITRE ATT&CK y al menos un marketplace mayor de skills (skills oficiales de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills/agent traces de Hugging Face) lanza un gate obligatorio de firma + provenance.** Los 1.184 skills maliciosos de ClawHavoc en ClawHub + el **36% de prompt-injection rate de Cisco en el marketplace OpenClaw** ya no es un evento aislado — el Sandbox de Novita del 28-abr es el primer producto comercial de mitigación construido de propósito para runtimes OpenClaw + Hermes + agentes autónomos. Con Corpus2Skill volviendo mainstream "skills como artefacto navegable" y la encuesta Externalization-in-LLM-Agents (arxiv 2604.08224) llamando skills/harness/protocol la capa de diseño dominante de 2026, la superficie de ataque ahora es **infraestructura de primera clase**, no un side-channel. Para H2 2026 vemos (a) una matriz de amenazas agent-skills publicada (estilo MITRE o liderada por NIST) cubriendo poisoning de skills + indirect-prompt-injection vía skill + cadenas de privilegios cross-skill, y (b) al menos un marketplace mayor obligando skills firmadas y atestadas con provenance antes de publicar — con el repo 17-skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, el marketplace de Multica y la superficie agent-trace de Hugging Face como primeros candidatos.
description.fil: **Pagsapit ng H2 2026, magkakaroon ng sariling MITRE ATT&CK-style sub-matrix ang attack surface ng agent skills, at magla-launch ang di bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (official skills ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ng enforced signing + provenance gate.** Hindi na one-off ang 1,184 malicious skills ng ClawHavoc sa ClawHub + ang **36% prompt-injection rate ng Cisco sa OpenClaw skill marketplace** — ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ang unang commercial mitigation product na purposely-built para sa OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. Sa pagiging mainstream ng "skills bilang navigable artifact" ng Corpus2Skill at sa pagturing ng Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) sa skills/harness/protocol bilang dominant 2026 design layer, **first-class infrastructure** na ang attack surface, hindi na side-channel. Pagsapit ng H2 2026, makikita natin (a) isang published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style o NIST-led) na sumasakop ng skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, at (b) di bababa sa isang major marketplace na nag-mandate ng signed-and-provenance-attested skills bago publish — kasama ang 17-skill repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, marketplace ng Multica, at agent-trace surface ng Hugging Face bilang unang kandidato.

summary.en: **By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate.** ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious ClawHub skills + Cisco's **36% prompt-injection rate across the OpenClaw skill marketplace** is no longer a one-off — Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. With Corpus2Skill making **"skills as a navigable artifact"** mainstream and the Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) calling skills/harness/protocol the dominant 2026 design layer, the attack surface is now **first-class infrastructure**, not a side-channel. By H2 2026 we see (a) a published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style or NIST-led) covering skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, and (b) at least one major marketplace mandating signed-and-provenance-attested skills before publish — with Anthropic's 17-skill repo, ClawHub, Multica's marketplace, and Hugging Face's agent-trace surface as the first candidates.
summary.ja: **H2 2026までにエージェント・スキルの攻撃面が独自のMITRE ATT&CKスタイルのサブマトリクスを取得し、少なくとも1つの主要スキル・マーケットプレイス(Anthropic公式skills、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Face skills/agent traces)が署名 + プロビナンス必須ゲートを出荷する。** ClawHavocのClawHub内1,184個の悪性スキル + OpenClawマーケットプレイス全体での**Cisco 36%プロンプトインジェクション率**は、もはや一過性ではない — 4/28のNovita SandboxはOpenClaw + Hermes + 自律エージェント・ランタイム専用に作られた最初の商用緩和プロダクト。Corpus2Skillが「ナビゲート可能なアーティファクトとしてのスキル」を主流化し、Externalization-in-LLM-Agentsサーベイ(arxiv 2604.08224)がskills/harness/protocolを2026支配的設計層と位置付けたことで、攻撃面は**サイドチャネルではなくファーストクラス・インフラ**になった。H2 2026までに(a)スキル汚染 + スキル経由の間接プロンプトインジェクション + クロススキル特権チェーンを網羅した公開エージェント・スキル脅威マトリクス(MITREスタイルまたはNIST主導)、および(b)公開前に署名 + プロビナンス証明済みスキルを義務化する主要マーケットプレイス、をAnthropicの17スキルレポ、ClawHub、Multicaマーケットプレイス、Hugging Faceエージェント・トレース面の中から最初の候補が出す。
summary.es: **Para H2 2026 la superficie de ataque skills-de-agente aterriza su propia sub-matriz estilo MITRE ATT&CK y al menos un marketplace mayor de skills (skills oficiales de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, skills/agent traces de Hugging Face) lanza un gate obligatorio de firma + provenance.** Los 1.184 skills maliciosos de ClawHavoc en ClawHub + el **36% de prompt-injection rate de Cisco en el marketplace OpenClaw** ya no es un evento aislado — el Sandbox de Novita del 28-abr es el primer producto comercial de mitigación construido de propósito para runtimes OpenClaw + Hermes + agentes autónomos. Con Corpus2Skill volviendo mainstream "skills como artefacto navegable" y la encuesta Externalization-in-LLM-Agents (arxiv 2604.08224) llamando skills/harness/protocol la capa de diseño dominante de 2026, la superficie de ataque ahora es **infraestructura de primera clase**, no un side-channel. Para H2 2026 vemos (a) una matriz de amenazas agent-skills publicada (estilo MITRE o liderada por NIST) cubriendo poisoning de skills + indirect-prompt-injection vía skill + cadenas de privilegios cross-skill, y (b) al menos un marketplace mayor obligando skills firmadas y atestadas con provenance antes de publicar — con el repo 17-skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, el marketplace de Multica y la superficie agent-trace de Hugging Face como primeros candidatos.
summary.fil: **Pagsapit ng H2 2026, magkakaroon ng sariling MITRE ATT&CK-style sub-matrix ang attack surface ng agent skills, at magla-launch ang di bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (official skills ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ng enforced signing + provenance gate.** Hindi na one-off ang 1,184 malicious skills ng ClawHavoc sa ClawHub + ang **36% prompt-injection rate ng Cisco sa OpenClaw skill marketplace** — ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ang unang commercial mitigation product na purposely-built para sa OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes. Sa pagiging mainstream ng "skills bilang navigable artifact" ng Corpus2Skill at sa pagturing ng Externalization-in-LLM-Agents survey (arxiv 2604.08224) sa skills/harness/protocol bilang dominant 2026 design layer, **first-class infrastructure** na ang attack surface, hindi na side-channel. Pagsapit ng H2 2026, makikita natin (a) isang published agent-skills threat-matrix (MITRE-style o NIST-led) na sumasakop ng skill poisoning + indirect-prompt-injection-via-skill + cross-skill privilege chains, at (b) di bababa sa isang major marketplace na nag-mandate ng signed-and-provenance-attested skills bago publish — kasama ang 17-skill repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, marketplace ng Multica, at agent-trace surface ng Hugging Face bilang unang kandidato.

detail.title: By H2 2026 the agent-skills attack surface lands its own MITRE-ATT&CK-style sub-matrix and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills/agent traces) ships an enforced signing + provenance gate.

bridges.text: Today's Cisco DefenseClaw open-source + AI Defense: Explorer Edition + Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA + CSA "Identity in the Age of AI" + Stellar Cyber agentic-AI threat survey supports `so_that` (sub-matrix lands + signed gate path forms). Reason: the matrix layer is shipped via DefenseClaw's open-source Skills Scanner + MCP Scanner + a2a-scanner, given that AI BoM generator is the closest open-source primitive to a marketplace-side signed-and-provenance gate. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: no major skill marketplace has yet shipped enforced signing + provenance gate.

text_locales.en: Today's Cisco DefenseClaw open-source + AI Defense: Explorer Edition + Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA + CSA "Identity in the Age of AI" + Stellar Cyber agentic-AI threat survey supports `so_that` (sub-matrix lands + signed gate path forms). Reason: the matrix layer is shipped via DefenseClaw's open-source Skills Scanner + MCP Scanner + a2a-scanner, given that AI BoM generator is the closest open-source primitive to a marketplace-side signed-and-provenance gate. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: no major skill marketplace has yet shipped enforced signing + provenance gate.
text_locales.ja: 本日の Cisco DefenseClaw オープンソース + AI Defense: Explorer Edition + Microsoft Agent 365 5月1日 GA + CSA「Identity in the Age of AI」+ Stellar Cyber エージェンティック AI 脅威調査は `so_that`（サブマトリックス・ランディング + 署名ゲート経路形成）を支持する。理由: マトリックス層が DefenseClaw のオープンソース Skills Scanner + MCP Scanner + a2a-scanner 経由で出荷されており、AI BoM ジェネレーターがマーケットプレイス側の署名と出所ゲートに最も近いオープンソース・プリミティブであるため。Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: 強制署名 + 出所ゲートを出荷した主要スキル・マーケットプレイスはまだなし。
text_locales.es: Cisco DefenseClaw open-source + AI Defense: Explorer Edition + Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA + CSA "Identity in the Age of AI" + encuesta amenazas agentic-AI Stellar Cyber de hoy apoya `so_that` (sub-matriz aterriza + path signed gate forma). Razón: la capa matriz se entrega vía el Skills Scanner + MCP Scanner + a2a-scanner open-source de DefenseClaw, given que AI BoM generator es el primitivo open-source más cercano a un gate marketplace-side signed-and-provenance. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: ningún marketplace de skills mayor ha entregado gate enforced signing + provenance.
text_locales.fil: Today's Cisco DefenseClaw open-source + AI Defense: Explorer Edition + Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA + CSA "Identity in the Age of AI" + Stellar Cyber agentic-AI threat survey ay nag-su-suporta sa `so_that` (ang sub-matrix ay nag-la-land + signed gate path ay nabubuo). Reason: ang matrix layer ay na-ship via DefenseClaw's open-source Skills Scanner + MCP Scanner + a2a-scanner, given that AI BoM generator ay ang pinakamalapit na open-source primitive sa marketplace-side signed-and-provenance gate. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: walang major skill marketplace pa na nag-shi-ship ng enforced signing + provenance gate.

nodes.short_label: By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish.
nodes.description: **By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework already names AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, and malicious agent deployment as techniques; Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) is the first major non-foundation-lab vendor shipping skills-as-a-product with signed-distribution as the security frame; Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint provide the academic scaffolding. The forcing function is the Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious skills + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; combined this is the same governance-gap arc that produced MITRE ATT&CK Mobile in 2017 and MITRE ATLAS in 2021. The first of these mandates likely originates from CISA / NIST or directly from the marketplace operators under enterprise-customer pressure rather than from a foundation lab.

label.en: By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish.
label.ja: 2026年 Q3 までに、エージェントスキル脅威サブマトリックスが MITRE ATT&CK 拡張または NIST AI-RMF 付録として最初の正式公開を迎え、少なくとも 1つの主要スキルマーケットプレイス (Anthropic 公式スキルリポジトリ、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Face スキル) が公開前に署名 + プロベナンス検証ゲートを強制する
label.es: Tecnológica) Para Q3 2026 aterriza una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de habilidades de agente como extensión MITRE ATT&CK de primera clase o anexo NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de habilidades (repositorio oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) habilita una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar.
label.fil: Bago matapos ang Q3 2026, lalabas ang published agent-skills threat sub-matrix bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ay mag-iimplement ng enforced signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.
