short_label.fil: Bago matapos ang Q3 2026, lalabas ang published agent-skills threat sub-matrix bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ay mag-iimplement ng enforced signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.

description.en: **By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework already names AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, and malicious agent deployment as techniques; Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) is the first major non-foundation-lab vendor shipping skills-as-a-product with signed-distribution as the security frame; Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint provide the academic scaffolding. The forcing function is the Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious skills + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; combined this is the same governance-gap arc that produced MITRE ATT&CK Mobile in 2017 and MITRE ATLAS in 2021. The first of these mandates likely originates from CISA / NIST or directly from the marketplace operators under enterprise-customer pressure rather than from a foundation lab.
description.ja: **2026年 Q3 までに、エージェントスキル脅威サブマトリックスが MITRE ATT&CK 拡張または NIST AI-RMF 付録として最初の正式公開を迎え、少なくとも 1つの主要スキルマーケットプレイス (Anthropic 公式スキルリポジトリ、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Face スキル) が公開前に署名 + プロベナンス検証ゲートを強制する。** 4/28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 フレームワークは AI エージェントコンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出し悪用、MCP サーバー侵害、悪意あるエージェントデプロイを既にテクニックとして命名済み; 4/28 Novita Sandbox は OpenClaw + Hermes ランタイム専用に構築された初の商用緩和製品; 4/28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite、SuiteConnect SF) は署名配布をセキュリティフレームとしてスキルを製品化した初の主要非ファウンデーションラボベンダー; 4/28 arxiv 2604.24026 (スキルの SSL 表現) + 4/24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint が学術的足場を提供。強制関数は Cisco RSAC 2026 36% プロンプトインジェクション率の発見 + ClawHavoc 1,184件の悪意あるスキル + 4/23-29 Google +32% IPI 増加; 合わせると、これは 2017年の MITRE ATT&CK Mobile と 2021年の MITRE ATLAS を生み出したのと同じガバナンスギャップの軌跡。これらの最初の義務化はファウンデーションラボからではなく、CISA / NIST から、あるいはエンタープライズ顧客圧力下のマーケットプレイス事業者から直接出る可能性が高い。
description.es: **(Tecnológica) Para Q3 2026 aterriza una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de habilidades de agente como extensión MITRE ATT&CK de primera clase o anexo NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de habilidades (repositorio oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) habilita una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar.** ATT&CK v19 del 28-abr + el marco v5.4 ya nombran envenenamiento de contexto de agentes IA, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de servidor MCP y despliegue de agentes maliciosos como técnicas; Novita Sandbox del 28-abr es el primer producto comercial de mitigación construido a propósito para runtimes OpenClaw + Hermes; SuiteCloud Agent Skills del 28-abr (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) es el primer gran proveedor no-foundation-lab que distribuye habilidades como producto con distribución firmada como marco de seguridad; arxiv 2604.24026 (representación SSL para habilidades) del 28-abr + arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint del 24-abr aportan el andamiaje académico. La función forzada es el hallazgo de Cisco RSAC 2026 del 36% de inyección de prompts + las 1.184 habilidades maliciosas de ClawHavoc + el repunte +32% IPI de Google del 23-29 abr; combinado, es el mismo arco de brecha de gobernanza que produjo MITRE ATT&CK Mobile en 2017 y MITRE ATLAS en 2021. La primera de estas obligaciones probablemente venga de CISA / NIST o directamente de los operadores del marketplace bajo presión de clientes empresariales, no de un foundation lab.
description.fil: **Bago matapos ang Q3 2026, lalabas ang published agent-skills threat sub-matrix bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ay mag-iimplement ng enforced signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Pinangalanan na ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework ang AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, at malicious agent deployment bilang techniques; ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ang unang commercial mitigation product na ginawa para sa OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; ang Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) ang unang major non-foundation-lab vendor na nag-ship ng skills-as-a-product na may signed-distribution bilang security frame; ang Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint ang nagbibigay ng academic scaffolding. Ang forcing function ay ang Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + 1,184 malicious skills ng ClawHavoc + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; pinagsama-sama, ito ang parehong governance-gap arc na nagbunga ng MITRE ATT&CK Mobile noong 2017 at MITRE ATLAS noong 2021. Ang una sa mga mandates na ito ay malamang manggagaling sa CISA / NIST o direkta mula sa marketplace operators sa ilalim ng enterprise-customer pressure, hindi mula sa foundation lab.

detail.title: By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish.

bridges.text: Today's Cisco DefenseClaw open-source release + Cisco Zero Trust Access for agents through Duo IAM + AI Defense: Explorer Edition self-service red-teaming + Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA control-plane + CSA Zero Trust first-pillar framing supports `landing` (matrix part shipped + enforcement substrate broadens). Reason: DefenseClaw is the open-source counterpart of the agent-skills threat sub-matrix because the AI BoM + Skills Scanner + MCP Scanner cover the same enforcement surface ATT&CK v19 named-techniques target. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: NIST AI-RMF appendix not yet published; signing + provenance gate not yet shipped at any major marketplace.

text_locales.en: Today's Cisco DefenseClaw open-source release + Cisco Zero Trust Access for agents through Duo IAM + AI Defense: Explorer Edition self-service red-teaming + Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA control-plane + CSA Zero Trust first-pillar framing supports `landing` (matrix part shipped + enforcement substrate broadens). Reason: DefenseClaw is the open-source counterpart of the agent-skills threat sub-matrix because the AI BoM + Skills Scanner + MCP Scanner cover the same enforcement surface ATT&CK v19 named-techniques target. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: NIST AI-RMF appendix not yet published; signing + provenance gate not yet shipped at any major marketplace.
text_locales.ja: 本日の Cisco DefenseClaw オープンソース・リリース + Cisco Zero Trust Access for agents（Duo IAM 経由）+ AI Defense: Explorer Edition セルフサービス・レッドチーミング + Microsoft Agent 365 5月1日 GA コントロールプレーン + CSA Zero Trust ファーストピラー・フレーミングは `landing`（マトリックス部分出荷 + 強制基板広域化）を支持する。理由: DefenseClaw がエージェント・スキル脅威サブマトリックスのオープンソース対応物であり、AI BoM + Skills Scanner + MCP Scanner が ATT&CK v19 名前付き手法ターゲットと同じ強制サーフェスをカバーするため。Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: NIST AI-RMF 付録はまだ未公開；署名 + 出所ゲートはまだどの主要マーケットプレイスでも未出荷。
text_locales.es: Cisco DefenseClaw open-source release de hoy + Cisco Zero Trust Access for agents through Duo IAM + AI Defense: Explorer Edition self-service red-teaming + Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA control-plane + framing first-pillar CSA Zero Trust apoya `landing` (parte matriz entregada + sustrato enforcement amplía). Razón: DefenseClaw es el counterpart open-source de la sub-matriz amenaza agent-skills porque AI BoM + Skills Scanner + MCP Scanner cubren la misma superficie enforcement target de los named-techniques de ATT&CK v19. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: apéndice NIST AI-RMF aún no publicado; gate signing + provenance aún no entregado en ningún marketplace mayor.
text_locales.fil: Today's Cisco DefenseClaw open-source release + Cisco Zero Trust Access para sa agents through Duo IAM + AI Defense: Explorer Edition self-service red-teaming + Microsoft Agent 365 May 1 GA control-plane + CSA Zero Trust first-pillar framing ay nag-su-suporta sa `landing` (matrix part na-ship + enforcement substrate ay lumalapad). Reason: ang DefenseClaw ay ang open-source counterpart ng agent-skills threat sub-matrix because ang AI BoM + Skills Scanner + MCP Scanner ay sumasaklaw sa parehong enforcement surface na tina-target ng ATT&CK v19 named-techniques. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: ang NIST AI-RMF appendix ay hindi pa na-publish; ang signing + provenance gate ay hindi pa nag-shi-ship sa anumang major marketplace.

bridges.text: Today's ATT&CK v19 named-techniques carry + CSAI MITRE-CNA carry + Microsoft Agent 365 + arxiv eval wave (SAGE, LiveClawBench, GAIA-v2-LILT) supports `landing` (matrix part shipped + eval substrate broadening). Reason: ATT&CK v19 is operationally the named-technique appendix + the eval-bench wave is the academic substrate the prediction names. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: NIST AI-RMF appendix not yet published; signing + provenance gate not yet shipped at any major marketplace.

text_locales.en: Today's ATT&CK v19 named-techniques carry + CSAI MITRE-CNA carry + Microsoft Agent 365 + arxiv eval wave (SAGE, LiveClawBench, GAIA-v2-LILT) supports `landing` (matrix part shipped + eval substrate broadening). Reason: ATT&CK v19 is operationally the named-technique appendix + the eval-bench wave is the academic substrate the prediction names. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: NIST AI-RMF appendix not yet published; signing + provenance gate not yet shipped at any major marketplace.
text_locales.ja: 本日の ATT&CK v19 名前付き手法 繰り越し + CSAI MITRE-CNA 繰り越し + Microsoft Agent 365 + arxiv 評価波(SAGE, LiveClawBench, GAIA-v2-LILT)は `landing`(マトリックス部分出荷 + 評価基板拡大)を支持する。理由: ATT&CK v19 が運用上は名前付き手法付録 + 評価ベンチ波が予測が名指す学術基板。Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: NIST AI-RMF 付録はまだ公開されていない; 主要マーケットプレイスは署名 + 出所ゲートを出荷していない。
text_locales.es: Carry técnicas nombradas ATT&CK v19 + carry CSAI MITRE-CNA + Microsoft Agent 365 + ola eval arxiv (SAGE, LiveClawBench, GAIA-v2-LILT) apoya `landing` (parte matriz entregada + sustrato eval ampliándose). Razón: ATT&CK v19 es operativamente el apéndice named-technique + la ola eval-bench es el sustrato académico que la predicción nombra. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: apéndice NIST AI-RMF aún no publicado; gate signing + provenance aún no entregado en ningún marketplace mayor.
text_locales.fil: Today's ATT&CK v19 named-techniques carry + CSAI MITRE-CNA carry + Microsoft Agent 365 + arxiv eval wave (SAGE, LiveClawBench, GAIA-v2-LILT) ay nag-su-suporta sa `landing` (matrix part shipped + eval substrate broadening). Reason: ATT&CK v19 ay operationally ang named-technique appendix + ang eval-bench wave ay ang academic substrate na pinangalan ng prediction. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: NIST AI-RMF appendix hindi pa published; signing + provenance gate hindi pa ship sa anumang major marketplace.

bridges.text: Today's ATT&CK v19 named-techniques + CSAI MITRE-CNA carry + Microsoft Agent 365 + Agent Harness Survey preprint supports `landing` (the matrix part shipped). Reason: ATT&CK v19 is operationally the named-technique appendix the prediction calls for. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: NIST AI-RMF appendix not yet published; signing + provenance gate not yet shipped at any major marketplace.

text_locales.en: Today's ATT&CK v19 named-techniques + CSAI MITRE-CNA carry + Microsoft Agent 365 + Agent Harness Survey preprint supports `landing` (the matrix part shipped). Reason: ATT&CK v19 is operationally the named-technique appendix the prediction calls for. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: NIST AI-RMF appendix not yet published; signing + provenance gate not yet shipped at any major marketplace.
text_locales.ja: 本日のATT&CK v19 named-techniques + CSAI MITRE-CNA継続 + Microsoft Agent 365 + Agent Harness Survey preprintが `landing`(マトリクス部分が出荷済み)を支持。Reason: ATT&CK v19が予測が要求するnamed-technique付録の操作的実体。Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: NIST AI-RMF付録未公表;主要マーケットプレイスから署名+来歴ゲートの出荷が未だ。
text_locales.es: Técnicas nombradas ATT&CK v19 + continuación CSAI MITRE-CNA + Microsoft Agent 365 + preprint Agent Harness Survey de hoy apoyan `landing` (la parte de la matriz envió). Reason: ATT&CK v19 es operativamente el apéndice named-technique que la predicción exige. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: apéndice NIST AI-RMF aún no publicado; puerta de firma + procedencia aún no enviada en ningún mercado mayor.
text_locales.fil: Ang ATT&CK v19 named-techniques + CSAI MITRE-CNA carry + Microsoft Agent 365 + Agent Harness Survey preprint ngayon ay sumusuporta sa `landing` (na-ship ang matrix part). Reason: ang ATT&CK v19 ay operationally ang named-technique appendix na hinihingi ng prediction. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: NIST AI-RMF appendix hindi pa publish; signing + provenance gate hindi pa na-ship sa anumang major marketplace.

readings.cluster_narrative: Broad support across 4 clusters. Largest is 'Agent Runtime Security' (11 of 34 items, accelerating). Multi-thread support is more robust than single-cluster concentration.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework already names AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, and malicious agent deployment as techniques; Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) is the first major non-foundation-lab vendor shipping skills-as-a-product with signed-distribution as the security frame; Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint provide the academic scaffolding. The forcing function is the Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious skills + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; combined this is the same governance-gap arc that produced MITRE ATT&CK Mobile in 2017 and MITRE ATLAS in 2021. The first of these mandates likely originates from CISA / NIST or directly from the marketplace operators under enterprise-customer pressure rather than from a foundation lab.
detail.prediction_summary: **By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework already names AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, and malicious agent deployment as techniques; Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) is the first major non-foundation-lab vendor shipping skills-as-a-product with signed-distribution as the security frame; Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint provide the academic scaffolding. The forcing function is the Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious skills + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; combined this is the same governance-gap arc that produced MITRE ATT&CK Mobile in 2017 and MITRE ATLAS in 2021. The first of these mandates likely originates from CISA / NIST or directly from the marketplace operators under enterprise-customer pressure rather than from a foundation lab.

prediction_summary_locales.en: **By Q3 2026 a published agent-skills threat sub-matrix lands as a first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension or NIST AI-RMF appendix, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic's official skills repo, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships an enforced signed + provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework already names AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, and malicious agent deployment as techniques; Apr 28 Novita Sandbox is the first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) is the first major non-foundation-lab vendor shipping skills-as-a-product with signed-distribution as the security frame; Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint provide the academic scaffolding. The forcing function is the Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + ClawHavoc's 1,184 malicious skills + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; combined this is the same governance-gap arc that produced MITRE ATT&CK Mobile in 2017 and MITRE ATLAS in 2021. The first of these mandates likely originates from CISA / NIST or directly from the marketplace operators under enterprise-customer pressure rather than from a foundation lab.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年 Q3 までに、エージェントスキル脅威サブマトリックスが MITRE ATT&CK 拡張または NIST AI-RMF 付録として最初の正式公開を迎え、少なくとも 1つの主要スキルマーケットプレイス (Anthropic 公式スキルリポジトリ、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Face スキル) が公開前に署名 + プロベナンス検証ゲートを強制する。** 4/28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 フレームワークは AI エージェントコンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出し悪用、MCP サーバー侵害、悪意あるエージェントデプロイを既にテクニックとして命名済み; 4/28 Novita Sandbox は OpenClaw + Hermes ランタイム専用に構築された初の商用緩和製品; 4/28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite、SuiteConnect SF) は署名配布をセキュリティフレームとしてスキルを製品化した初の主要非ファウンデーションラボベンダー; 4/28 arxiv 2604.24026 (スキルの SSL 表現) + 4/24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint が学術的足場を提供。強制関数は Cisco RSAC 2026 36% プロンプトインジェクション率の発見 + ClawHavoc 1,184件の悪意あるスキル + 4/23-29 Google +32% IPI 増加; 合わせると、これは 2017年の MITRE ATT&CK Mobile と 2021年の MITRE ATLAS を生み出したのと同じガバナンスギャップの軌跡。これらの最初の義務化はファウンデーションラボからではなく、CISA / NIST から、あるいはエンタープライズ顧客圧力下のマーケットプレイス事業者から直接出る可能性が高い。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **(Tecnológica) Para Q3 2026 aterriza una sub-matriz publicada de amenazas de habilidades de agente como extensión MITRE ATT&CK de primera clase o anexo NIST AI-RMF, y al menos un marketplace mayor de habilidades (repositorio oficial de skills de Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) habilita una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar.** ATT&CK v19 del 28-abr + el marco v5.4 ya nombran envenenamiento de contexto de agentes IA, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de servidor MCP y despliegue de agentes maliciosos como técnicas; Novita Sandbox del 28-abr es el primer producto comercial de mitigación construido a propósito para runtimes OpenClaw + Hermes; SuiteCloud Agent Skills del 28-abr (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) es el primer gran proveedor no-foundation-lab que distribuye habilidades como producto con distribución firmada como marco de seguridad; arxiv 2604.24026 (representación SSL para habilidades) del 28-abr + arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint del 24-abr aportan el andamiaje académico. La función forzada es el hallazgo de Cisco RSAC 2026 del 36% de inyección de prompts + las 1.184 habilidades maliciosas de ClawHavoc + el repunte +32% IPI de Google del 23-29 abr; combinado, es el mismo arco de brecha de gobernanza que produjo MITRE ATT&CK Mobile en 2017 y MITRE ATLAS en 2021. La primera de estas obligaciones probablemente venga de CISA / NIST o directamente de los operadores del marketplace bajo presión de clientes empresariales, no de un foundation lab.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Bago matapos ang Q3 2026, lalabas ang published agent-skills threat sub-matrix bilang first-class MITRE ATT&CK extension o NIST AI-RMF appendix, at hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (opisyal na skills repo ng Anthropic, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ay mag-iimplement ng enforced signed + provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Pinangalanan na ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 + v5.4 framework ang AI-agent context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, at malicious agent deployment bilang techniques; ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox ang unang commercial mitigation product na ginawa para sa OpenClaw + Hermes runtimes; ang Apr 28 SuiteCloud Agent Skills (Oracle NetSuite, SuiteConnect SF) ang unang major non-foundation-lab vendor na nag-ship ng skills-as-a-product na may signed-distribution bilang security frame; ang Apr 28 arxiv 2604.24026 (SSL representation for skills) + Apr 24 arxiv 2604.23374 NeuroTaint ang nagbibigay ng academic scaffolding. Ang forcing function ay ang Cisco RSAC 2026 36%-prompt-injection-rate finding + 1,184 malicious skills ng ClawHavoc + Apr 23-29 Google +32% IPI uptick; pinagsama-sama, ito ang parehong governance-gap arc na nagbunga ng MITRE ATT&CK Mobile noong 2017 at MITRE ATLAS noong 2021. Ang una sa mga mandates na ito ay malamang manggagaling sa CISA / NIST o direkta mula sa marketplace operators sa ilalim ng enterprise-customer pressure, hindi mula sa foundation lab.

nodes.label: By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish.
nodes.short_label: By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish.
nodes.description: **By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization is the institutional spark; Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 names the techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ships native sandbox execution as a default primitive across 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents form the vendor-side counterpart; Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (single SQLi row leaks OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward SGLang CVE-2026-5760 demonstrate the model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. The forcing function is enterprise risk transfer — once a CNA exists with the explicit AI-agent mandate, the disclosure cadence will compress from random-publisher to coordinated-issuer-driven, and skill marketplaces will not be able to remain unsigned-by-default without losing enterprise customers. CSAI's first-pull-quarter (Q3 2026) is the most-likely landing zone for the threshold to be crossed.

label.en: By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish.
label.ja: 2026 Q3 までに、エージェント型 AI の CVE クラスが CSAI 発行の MITRE 認可 CNA を通じて固有のサブコーパスとして確立し、エージェント / スキル / ハーネス / サンドボックス特有の CVE が 50 件以上発行される
label.es: Para el Q3 de 2026 la clase de CVE para IA agéntica se convierte en su propio sub-corpus emitido por una CNA, con ≥50 CVE específicos de agente / skill / harness / sandbox publicados bajo la CNA autorizada por MITRE de CSAI, y al menos un marketplace de skills relevante (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) impone una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar.
label.fil: Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.

short_label.en: By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish.

short_label.es: Para el Q3 de 2026 la clase de CVE para IA agéntica se convierte en su propio sub-corpus emitido por una CNA, con ≥50 CVE específicos de agente / skill / harness / sandbox publicados bajo la CNA autorizada por MITRE de CSAI, y al menos un marketplace de skills relevante (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) impone una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar.
short_label.fil: Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.

description.en: **By Q3 2026 the agentic-AI CVE class becomes its own first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, with ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs published under CSAI's MITRE-authorized CNA, and at least one major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ships a mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate before publish.** Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization is the institutional spark; Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 names the techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ships native sandbox execution as a default primitive across 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents form the vendor-side counterpart; Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (single SQLi row leaks OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward SGLang CVE-2026-5760 demonstrate the model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. The forcing function is enterprise risk transfer — once a CNA exists with the explicit AI-agent mandate, the disclosure cadence will compress from random-publisher to coordinated-issuer-driven, and skill marketplaces will not be able to remain unsigned-by-default without losing enterprise customers. CSAI's first-pull-quarter (Q3 2026) is the most-likely landing zone for the threshold to be crossed.
description.ja: **2026 Q3 までに、エージェント型 AI の CVE クラスが CSAI 発行の MITRE 認可 CNA を通じて固有のサブコーパスとして確立し、エージェント / スキル / ハーネス / サンドボックス特有の CVE が 50 件以上発行される。同時に主要スキルマーケットプレース(Anthropic skills、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Face skills)のうち少なくとも 1 社が「公開前の署名 + 出所証明ゲート」を必須化する。** 4/29 の CSAI MITRE CNA 認可が制度的火種、4/28 ATT&CK v19 が手法を命名(コンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出し悪用、MCP サーバ侵害、悪意あるエージェント配備)、4/30 OpenAI Agents SDK が 7 つのサンドボックスプロバイダ(Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel)上でネイティブ・サンドボックス実行をデフォルト化、4/28 Novita Sandbox + 4/28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + 4/30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents がベンダ側を補完、4/26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208(SQLi 1 行で OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock キーが漏洩)+ 4/28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + 持ち越しの SGLang CVE-2026-5760 がモデルツール層インジェクションの被害規模を実証している。駆動力はエンタープライズのリスク移転 — AI エージェント明示の CNA が存在する以上、開示サイクルは出版者依存から発行者主導に圧縮され、スキルマーケットプレースは無署名のままではエンタープライズ顧客を失う。CSAI の最初の活動四半期(2026 Q3)が閾値超えのもっとも自然な着地時期。
description.es: **Para el Q3 de 2026 la clase de CVE para IA agéntica se convierte en su propio sub-corpus emitido por una CNA, con ≥50 CVE específicos de agente / skill / harness / sandbox publicados bajo la CNA autorizada por MITRE de CSAI, y al menos un marketplace de skills relevante (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) impone una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar.** La autorización CNA de CSAI por MITRE el 29/abr es la chispa institucional; el 28/abr ATT&CK v19 nombra las técnicas (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de MCP, despliegue de agentes maliciosos); el 30/abr el Agents SDK de OpenAI hace de la ejecución en sandbox una primitiva por defecto sobre 7 proveedores (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Novita Sandbox del 28/abr + Bedrock Managed Agents del 28/abr + hosted agents de Microsoft Foundry del 30/abr forman la contraparte del lado proveedor; LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 del 26/abr (una sola fila SQLi filtra claves OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock) + Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 del 28/abr + SGLang CVE-2026-5760 en arrastre demuestran el radio de explosión de la inyección a nivel de tooling del modelo. La fuerza motriz es la transferencia de riesgo empresarial — una vez existe una CNA con mandato explícito de IA agéntica, el ritmo de divulgación se comprime de "publicador aleatorio" a "emisor coordinado" y los marketplaces de skills no podrán seguir sin firma por defecto sin perder clientes empresariales. El primer trimestre operativo de CSAI (Q3 2026) es la zona de aterrizaje más probable.
description.fil: **Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Ang Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization ang institutional spark; pinangalanan ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 ang techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); nagsa-ship ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ng native sandbox execution bilang default primitive sa 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents ang vendor-side counterpart; ipinapakita ng Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (isang SQLi row ay nagla-leak ng OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward na SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ang model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. Ang forcing function ay enterprise risk transfer — kapag may CNA na may explicit AI-agent mandate, ang disclosure cadence ay mauurong mula random-publisher patungo sa coordinated-issuer-driven, at hindi makakapagdesign ang skill marketplaces na mananatiling unsigned-by-default nang hindi nawawalan ng enterprise customers. Ang first operating quarter ng CSAI (Q3 2026) ang pinaka-malamang na landing zone para tumawid ang threshold.

The forcing function is enterprise risk transfer — once a CNA exists with the explicit AI-agent mandate, the disclosure cadence will compress from random-publisher to coordinated-issuer-driven, and skill marketplaces will not be able to remain unsigned-by-default without losing enterprise customers. CSAI's first-pull-quarter (Q3 2026) is the most-likely landing zone for the threshold to be crossed.
summary.ja: **2026 Q3 までに、エージェント型 AI の CVE クラスが CSAI 発行の MITRE 認可 CNA を通じて固有のサブコーパスとして確立し、エージェント / スキル / ハーネス / サンドボックス特有の CVE が 50 件以上発行される。同時に主要スキルマーケットプレース(Anthropic skills、ClawHub、Multica、Hermes、Hugging Face skills)のうち少なくとも 1 社が「公開前の署名 + 出所証明ゲート」を必須化する。** 4/29 の CSAI MITRE CNA 認可が制度的火種、4/28 ATT&CK v19 が手法を命名(コンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出し悪用、MCP サーバ侵害、悪意あるエージェント配備)、4/30 OpenAI Agents SDK が 7 つのサンドボックスプロバイダ(Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel)上でネイティブ・サンドボックス実行をデフォルト化、4/28 Novita Sandbox + 4/28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + 4/30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents がベンダ側を補完、4/26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208(SQLi 1 行で OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock キーが漏洩)+ 4/28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + 持ち越しの SGLang CVE-2026-5760 がモデルツール層インジェクションの被害規模を実証している。駆動力はエンタープライズのリスク移転 — AI エージェント明示の CNA が存在する以上、開示サイクルは出版者依存から発行者主導に圧縮され、スキルマーケットプレースは無署名のままではエンタープライズ顧客を失う。CSAI の最初の活動四半期(2026 Q3)が閾値超えのもっとも自然な着地時期。
summary.es: **Para el Q3 de 2026 la clase de CVE para IA agéntica se convierte en su propio sub-corpus emitido por una CNA, con ≥50 CVE específicos de agente / skill / harness / sandbox publicados bajo la CNA autorizada por MITRE de CSAI, y al menos un marketplace de skills relevante (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) impone una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar.** La autorización CNA de CSAI por MITRE el 29/abr es la chispa institucional; el 28/abr ATT&CK v19 nombra las técnicas (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de MCP, despliegue de agentes maliciosos); el 30/abr el Agents SDK de OpenAI hace de la ejecución en sandbox una primitiva por defecto sobre 7 proveedores (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Novita Sandbox del 28/abr + Bedrock Managed Agents del 28/abr + hosted agents de Microsoft Foundry del 30/abr forman la contraparte del lado proveedor; LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 del 26/abr (una sola fila SQLi filtra claves OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock) + Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 del 28/abr + SGLang CVE-2026-5760 en arrastre demuestran el radio de explosión de la inyección a nivel de tooling del modelo. La fuerza motriz es la transferencia de riesgo empresarial — una vez existe una CNA con mandato explícito de IA agéntica, el ritmo de divulgación se comprime de "publicador aleatorio" a "emisor coordinado" y los marketplaces de skills no podrán seguir sin firma por defecto sin perder clientes empresariales. El primer trimestre operativo de CSAI (Q3 2026) es la zona de aterrizaje más probable.
summary.fil: **Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Ang Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization ang institutional spark; pinangalanan ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 ang techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); nagsa-ship ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ng native sandbox execution bilang default primitive sa 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents ang vendor-side counterpart; ipinapakita ng Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (isang SQLi row ay nagla-leak ng OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward na SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ang model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. Ang forcing function ay enterprise risk transfer — kapag may CNA na may explicit AI-agent mandate, ang disclosure cadence ay mauurong mula random-publisher patungo sa coordinated-issuer-driven, at hindi makakapagdesign ang skill marketplaces na mananatiling unsigned-by-default nang hindi nawawalan ng enterprise customers. Ang first operating quarter ng CSAI (Q3 2026) ang pinaka-malamang na landing zone para tumawid ang threshold.

bridges.text: Today's SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ~15d unpatched + Microsoft CVE-2026-26144 Excel XSS + Copilot Agent silent data exfil + Cisco DefenseClaw + Microsoft Agent 365 + Stellar Cyber survey supports `because` (CNA-issued sub-corpus formation continues + host-app + agent chain extends). prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el Q3 de 2026 la clase de CVE para IA agéntica se convierte en su propio sub-corpus emitido por una CNA, con ≥50 CVE específicos de agente / skill / harness / sandbox publicados bajo la CNA autorizada por MITRE de CSAI, y al menos un marketplace de skills relevante (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) impone una puerta obligatoria de firma + atestación de procedencia antes de publicar.** La autorización CNA de CSAI por MITRE el 29/abr es la chispa institucional; el 28/abr ATT&CK v19 nombra las técnicas (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de MCP, despliegue de agentes maliciosos); el 30/abr el Agents SDK de OpenAI hace de la ejecución en sandbox una primitiva por defecto sobre 7 proveedores (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); Novita Sandbox del 28/abr + Bedrock Managed Agents del 28/abr + hosted agents de Microsoft Foundry del 30/abr forman la contraparte del lado proveedor; LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 del 26/abr (una sola fila SQLi filtra claves OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock) + Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 del 28/abr + SGLang CVE-2026-5760 en arrastre demuestran el radio de explosión de la inyección a nivel de tooling del modelo. La fuerza motriz es la transferencia de riesgo empresarial — una vez existe una CNA con mandato explícito de IA agéntica, el ritmo de divulgación se comprime de "publicador aleatorio" a "emisor coordinado" y los marketplaces de skills no podrán seguir sin firma por defecto sin perder clientes empresariales. El primer trimestre operativo de CSAI (Q3 2026) es la zona de aterrizaje más probable.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Pagdating ng Q3 2026, ang agentic-AI CVE class ay magiging sariling first-class CNA-issued sub-corpus, na may ≥50 agent-/skill-/harness-/sandbox-specific CVEs na inilathala sa ilalim ng MITRE-authorized CNA ng CSAI, at magsa-ship ang hindi bababa sa isang major skill marketplace (Anthropic skills, ClawHub, Multica, Hermes, Hugging Face skills) ng mandatory signed-+-provenance-attested gate bago mag-publish.** Ang Apr 29 CSAI MITRE-CNA authorization ang institutional spark; pinangalanan ng Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 ang techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); nagsa-ship ang Apr 30 OpenAI Agents SDK ng native sandbox execution bilang default primitive sa 7 sandbox providers (Blaxel/Cloudflare/Daytona/E2B/Modal/Runloop/Vercel); ang Apr 28 Novita Sandbox + Apr 28 AWS Bedrock Managed Agents + Apr 30 Microsoft Foundry hosted agents ang vendor-side counterpart; ipinapakita ng Apr 26 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 (isang SQLi row ay nagla-leak ng OpenAI + Anthropic + Bedrock keys) + Apr 28 Spring AI CVE-2026-40967 + carry-forward na SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ang model-tooling-layer-injection blast radius. Ang forcing function ay enterprise risk transfer — kapag may CNA na may explicit AI-agent mandate, ang disclosure cadence ay mauurong mula random-publisher patungo sa coordinated-issuer-driven, at hindi makakapagdesign ang skill marketplaces na mananatiling unsigned-by-default nang hindi nawawalan ng enterprise customers. Ang first operating quarter ng CSAI (Q3 2026) ang pinaka-malamang na landing zone para tumawid ang threshold.

nodes.label: LLM-tooling + Linux-kernel CVE chain becomes dominant attack pattern by H2 2026
nodes.short_label: LLM-tooling + Linux-kernel CVE chain becomes dominant attack pattern by H2 2026
nodes.title: LLM-tooling + Linux-kernel CVE chain becomes dominant attack pattern by H2 2026
nodes.description: **By H2 2026 the May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + the Apr 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + the unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 trio makes "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" the dominant attacker pattern — at least one major IR firm publishes a public post-mortem of a real intrusion that pairs an LLM-gateway / agent-harness / inference-runtime CVE with a Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail or its successor) for full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, and at least one CSAI-CNA-issued advisory explicitly carves out the LLM-tooling + kernel chain as a named technique within ATT&CK v19's Defense Impairment.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 already names the agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); the May 1 Copy Fail wave gives attackers a universal-Linux LPE with confirmed in-the-wild use against cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); the LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent gives them the lateral-movement vector. CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization is the disclosure-issuance side; the path of least resistance for an IR firm Q3 incident report is one cloud-multi-tenant intrusion stitched together this exact way.

title.fil: Sa H2 2026, ang LLM-tooling + Linux-kernel CVE chain ay magiging dominanteng pattern ng pag-atake

description.en: **By H2 2026 the May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + the Apr 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + the unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 trio makes "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" the dominant attacker pattern — at least one major IR firm publishes a public post-mortem of a real intrusion that pairs an LLM-gateway / agent-harness / inference-runtime CVE with a Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail or its successor) for full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, and at least one CSAI-CNA-issued advisory explicitly carves out the LLM-tooling + kernel chain as a named technique within ATT&CK v19's Defense Impairment.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 already names the agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); the May 1 Copy Fail wave gives attackers a universal-Linux LPE with confirmed in-the-wild use against cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); the LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent gives them the lateral-movement vector. CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization is the disclosure-issuance side; the path of least resistance for an IR firm Q3 incident report is one cloud-multi-tenant intrusion stitched together this exact way.
description.ja: **2026年下半期までに、5月1日 Copy Fail(CVE-2026-31431)BOD-22-01 14日期限 + 4月30日 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26時間悪用ウィンドウ + 5月2日時点で未パッチの SGLang CVE-2026-5760 という3点セットが「LLMツーリング層 CVE のサプライチェーン武器化」を支配的な攻撃者パターンに押し上げる。少なくとも1つの主要 IR 企業が、LLMゲートウェイ・エージェントハーネス・推論ランタイムの CVE と Linux カーネル LPE(Copy Fail またはその後継)を組み合わせてマルチテナント推論基盤に対する完全チェーン root を実現した実際の侵害について公開ポストモーテムを発表する。少なくとも1件の CSAI-CNA 発行アドバイザリが LLMツーリング+カーネルチェーンを ATT&CK v19 の Defense Impairment 内の名前付き手法として明示する。** 4月28日の ATT&CK v19 が既にエージェント手法(コンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出し悪用、MCP サーバー侵害、悪意あるエージェント展開)を命名済み。5月1日の Copy Fail は攻撃者にユニバーサル Linux LPE を提供し、Microsoft Security Blog がクラウドサービスプロバイダーへの実環境利用を確認済み。LiteLLM の SQLi 1行漏えいが OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock キーを流出させる先例が横展開ベクトルを与える。CSAI の4月29日 CNA 認定が開示発行側で、IR 企業の第3四半期インシデントレポートでこの組み合わせが1件のクラウド・マルチテナント侵害として登場するのが最小抵抗線。
description.es: **Para el H2 2026 el trío plazo BOD-22-01 de 14 días del Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) del 1 de mayo + ventana de explotación de 26 horas del LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 del 30 de abril + el sin parchar al 1 de mayo SGLang CVE-2026-5760 hace de la "armamentización de cadena de suministro de CVEs en la capa de tooling LLM" el patrón de atacante dominante — al menos una firma de IR importante publica un post-mortem público de una intrusión real que empareja un CVE de gateway-LLM/agent-harness/inference-runtime con un LPE de kernel Linux (Copy Fail o su sucesor) para una cadena completa root-en-inferencia-multi-tenant, y al menos una advisory emitida por CSAI-CNA carve-out explícitamente la cadena LLM-tooling + kernel como técnica nombrada dentro del Defense Impairment de ATT&CK v19.** ATT&CK v19 del 28 de abril ya nombra las técnicas agénticas (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de servidor MCP, despliegue de agentes maliciosos); la ola Copy Fail del 1 de mayo da a los atacantes un LPE Linux universal con uso confirmado in-the-wild contra proveedores cloud (según divulgación del Microsoft Security Blog); el precedente de SQLi-fila-fuga-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys de LiteLLM les da el vector de movimiento lateral. La autorización CNA del 29 de abril de CSAI es el lado de emisión de divulgaciones; la ruta de menor resistencia para un informe de incidente del Q3 de una firma IR es una intrusión cloud multi-tenant ensamblada exactamente así.
description.fil: **Sa H2 2026, ang trio ng May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + April 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + ang unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ay magpapadominante sa "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" bilang attacker pattern — kahit isang major IR firm ay maglalabas ng public post-mortem ng totoong intrusion na pinagsasama ang LLM-gateway/agent-harness/inference-runtime CVE sa Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail o ang successor nito) para sa full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, at kahit isang CSAI-CNA-issued advisory ay explicitly mag-carve-out ng LLM-tooling + kernel chain bilang named technique sa loob ng Defense Impairment ng ATT&CK v19.** Pinangalanan na ng April 28 ATT&CK v19 ang agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); binibigyan ng May 1 Copy Fail wave ang attackers ng universal-Linux LPE na may confirmed in-the-wild use laban sa cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); ang LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent ang nagbibigay sa kanila ng lateral-movement vector. Ang April 29 CSAI CNA authorization ang disclosure-issuance side; pinakamadaling daan para sa Q3 incident report ng IR firm ay isang cloud-multi-tenant intrusion na pinagsama-sama nang ganito.

eli14.fil: Pwedeng pagsamahin ng hackers ang AI-tooling bug + Linux-kernel bug para makuha ang shared AI servers.

bridges.text: Today's SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ~15d unpatched + CERT/CC ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment workaround + Microsoft CVE-2026-26144 Excel XSS + Copilot Agent silent data exfil supports `because` (LLM-tooling chain forming, kernel leg quiet). detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By H2 2026 the May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + the Apr 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + the unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 trio makes "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" the dominant attacker pattern — at least one major IR firm publishes a public post-mortem of a real intrusion that pairs an LLM-gateway / agent-harness / inference-runtime CVE with a Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail or its successor) for full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, and at least one CSAI-CNA-issued advisory explicitly carves out the LLM-tooling + kernel chain as a named technique within ATT&CK v19's Defense Impairment.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 already names the agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); the May 1 Copy Fail wave gives attackers a universal-Linux LPE with confirmed in-the-wild use against cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); the LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent gives them the lateral-movement vector. CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization is the disclosure-issuance side; the path of least resistance for an IR firm Q3 incident report is one cloud-multi-tenant intrusion stitched together this exact way.
detail.prediction_summary: **By H2 2026 the May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + the Apr 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + the unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 trio makes "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" the dominant attacker pattern — at least one major IR firm publishes a public post-mortem of a real intrusion that pairs an LLM-gateway / agent-harness / inference-runtime CVE with a Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail or its successor) for full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, and at least one CSAI-CNA-issued advisory explicitly carves out the LLM-tooling + kernel chain as a named technique within ATT&CK v19's Defense Impairment.** Apr 28 ATT&CK v19 already names the agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); the May 1 Copy Fail wave gives attackers a universal-Linux LPE with confirmed in-the-wild use against cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); the LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent gives them the lateral-movement vector. CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization is the disclosure-issuance side; the path of least resistance for an IR firm Q3 incident report is one cloud-multi-tenant intrusion stitched together this exact way.

CSAI's Apr 29 CNA authorization is the disclosure-issuance side; the path of least resistance for an IR firm Q3 incident report is one cloud-multi-tenant intrusion stitched together this exact way.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年下半期までに、5月1日 Copy Fail(CVE-2026-31431)BOD-22-01 14日期限 + 4月30日 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26時間悪用ウィンドウ + 5月2日時点で未パッチの SGLang CVE-2026-5760 という3点セットが「LLMツーリング層 CVE のサプライチェーン武器化」を支配的な攻撃者パターンに押し上げる。少なくとも1つの主要 IR 企業が、LLMゲートウェイ・エージェントハーネス・推論ランタイムの CVE と Linux カーネル LPE(Copy Fail またはその後継)を組み合わせてマルチテナント推論基盤に対する完全チェーン root を実現した実際の侵害について公開ポストモーテムを発表する。少なくとも1件の CSAI-CNA 発行アドバイザリが LLMツーリング+カーネルチェーンを ATT&CK v19 の Defense Impairment 内の名前付き手法として明示する。** 4月28日の ATT&CK v19 が既にエージェント手法(コンテキスト汚染、ツール呼び出し悪用、MCP サーバー侵害、悪意あるエージェント展開)を命名済み。5月1日の Copy Fail は攻撃者にユニバーサル Linux LPE を提供し、Microsoft Security Blog がクラウドサービスプロバイダーへの実環境利用を確認済み。LiteLLM の SQLi 1行漏えいが OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock キーを流出させる先例が横展開ベクトルを与える。CSAI の4月29日 CNA 認定が開示発行側で、IR 企業の第3四半期インシデントレポートでこの組み合わせが1件のクラウド・マルチテナント侵害として登場するのが最小抵抗線。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el H2 2026 el trío plazo BOD-22-01 de 14 días del Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) del 1 de mayo + ventana de explotación de 26 horas del LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 del 30 de abril + el sin parchar al 1 de mayo SGLang CVE-2026-5760 hace de la "armamentización de cadena de suministro de CVEs en la capa de tooling LLM" el patrón de atacante dominante — al menos una firma de IR importante publica un post-mortem público de una intrusión real que empareja un CVE de gateway-LLM/agent-harness/inference-runtime con un LPE de kernel Linux (Copy Fail o su sucesor) para una cadena completa root-en-inferencia-multi-tenant, y al menos una advisory emitida por CSAI-CNA carve-out explícitamente la cadena LLM-tooling + kernel como técnica nombrada dentro del Defense Impairment de ATT&CK v19.** ATT&CK v19 del 28 de abril ya nombra las técnicas agénticas (envenenamiento de contexto, abuso de invocación de herramientas, compromiso de servidor MCP, despliegue de agentes maliciosos); la ola Copy Fail del 1 de mayo da a los atacantes un LPE Linux universal con uso confirmado in-the-wild contra proveedores cloud (según divulgación del Microsoft Security Blog); el precedente de SQLi-fila-fuga-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys de LiteLLM les da el vector de movimiento lateral. La autorización CNA del 29 de abril de CSAI es el lado de emisión de divulgaciones; la ruta de menor resistencia para un informe de incidente del Q3 de una firma IR es una intrusión cloud multi-tenant ensamblada exactamente así.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Sa H2 2026, ang trio ng May 1 Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431) BOD-22-01 14-day deadline + April 30 LiteLLM CVE-2026-42208 26-hour exploitation window + ang unpatched-into-May-1 SGLang CVE-2026-5760 ay magpapadominante sa "supply-chain weaponization of LLM-tooling-layer CVEs" bilang attacker pattern — kahit isang major IR firm ay maglalabas ng public post-mortem ng totoong intrusion na pinagsasama ang LLM-gateway/agent-harness/inference-runtime CVE sa Linux-kernel LPE (Copy Fail o ang successor nito) para sa full-chain root-on-multi-tenant-inference, at kahit isang CSAI-CNA-issued advisory ay explicitly mag-carve-out ng LLM-tooling + kernel chain bilang named technique sa loob ng Defense Impairment ng ATT&CK v19.** Pinangalanan na ng April 28 ATT&CK v19 ang agentic techniques (context poisoning, tool invocation abuse, MCP server compromise, malicious agent deployment); binibigyan ng May 1 Copy Fail wave ang attackers ng universal-Linux LPE na may confirmed in-the-wild use laban sa cloud service providers (per Microsoft Security Blog disclosure); ang LiteLLM SQLi-row-leaks-OpenAI/Anthropic/Bedrock-keys precedent ang nagbibigay sa kanila ng lateral-movement vector. Ang April 29 CSAI CNA authorization ang disclosure-issuance side; pinakamadaling daan para sa Q3 incident report ng IR firm ay isang cloud-multi-tenant intrusion na pinagsama-sama nang ganito.

nodes.label: Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.
nodes.short_label: Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.
nodes.description: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy — opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026.

description.en: **"Training-vs-inference SKU split" becomes the standard for custom AI silicon.** Google's TPU 8t / 8i split extends the Trainium-vs-Inferentia line and locks in **hyperscaler in-house silicon as architecturally separate for training vs inference**. In H2 2026 / H1 2027, expect Microsoft MAIA and Meta MTIA to adopt the same dual-track SKU strategy — opposing NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin's "single architecture, both workloads." Inference-tuned SKUs assume native FP4 / MXFP4 and drive **$/query competition** to a peak in Q3 2026.
description.ja: **「訓練 / 推論の SKU 分離」がカスタム AI シリコンの標準設計に** — Google TPU 8t / 8i の分割は、Trainium（訓練）/ Inferentia（推論）分離の延長線で **ハイパースケーラの自社チップが訓練・推論を別アーキテクチャに固定** する流れを決定づけた。2026 後半〜2027 前半には Microsoft MAIA、Meta MTIA もこの「二刀流」SKU 戦略を採用、NVIDIA Blackwell / Vera Rubin 系の「単一アーキで両対応」に対抗する構図が固定化。推論特化 SKU は FP4 / MXFP4 ネイティブを前提に **$/query の下方競争** が 2026 Q3 にピークを迎える。

nodes.label: 27B Dense + 1M context" becomes the de facto standard for enterprise local LLMs in H2 2026.
nodes.short_label: 27B Dense + 1M context" becomes the de facto standard for enterprise local LLMs in H2 2026.
nodes.description: **"27B Dense + 1M context" becomes the de facto standard for enterprise local LLMs in H2 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B demonstrates that the package — no MoE routing complexity, runs on a single RTX 4090, 1M context, Apache 2.0 — reaches flagship-grade coding ability. By Q3 2026, Mistral / Meta / DeepSeek / Google Gemma will each ship 20-30B Dense × 1M context × Apache/Llama-style models. The differentiators for 70B+ MoE narrow to multimodal understanding, tool breadth, and long-horizon reasoning. On-prem inference's default VRAM requirement shifts down from RTX 6000 48GB / H100 80GB to **RTX 4090 24GB / Apple M4 Max 64GB**.

The differentiators for 70B+ MoE narrow to multimodal understanding, tool breadth, and long-horizon reasoning. nodes.label: The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.
nodes.short_label: The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.
nodes.description: **The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.** Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B (dense, beats 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s on RTX 3090 at Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode on M5 Max for Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x cheaper than Claude Opus 4.7**) compose a **3-corner squeeze** on the proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. By Q3 2026, **enterprise dev tools default to a hybrid harness** — local Qwen 3.6-class for "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API only for "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — and all Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ship a **local-first toggle** by default. "Cloud-only coding agent" becomes a 2024-era artifact.

description.en: **The "consumer-GPU coding agent" displaces the cloud-only coding API for ≥30% of dev workloads by Q3 2026.** Apr 22's Qwen3.6-27B (dense, beats 397B-A17B on SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s on RTX 3090 at Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode on M5 Max for Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x cheaper than Claude Opus 4.7**) compose a **3-corner squeeze** on the proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. By Q3 2026, **enterprise dev tools default to a hybrid harness** — local Qwen 3.6-class for "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API only for "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — and all Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ship a **local-first toggle** by default. "Cloud-only coding agent" becomes a 2024-era artifact.
description.ja: **「コンシューマ GPU 上のコーディングエージェント」が Q3 2026 までに開発ワークロードの 30% 以上でクラウドオンリー API を置き換える。** 4/22 の Qwen3.6-27B (Dense、SWE-bench Verified で 397B-A17B を撃破、**RTX 3090 + Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB で 40 tok/s**) + 4/23 の Ollama MLX プレビュー (M5 Max + Qwen3.5-35B-A3B で prefill 1.57 倍 / decode 1.93 倍) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75% オフ API (**Claude Opus 4.7 比で実効 ~28 倍安価**) が独自フロンティア API SaaS モデルへの **3 方向の挟撃**を構成。Q3 2026 までに **エンタープライズ開発ツールはハイブリッドハーネスがデフォルト** — 「コーディング、リファクタリング、Lint、テスト」はローカル Qwen 3.6 クラス、「長期計画 / マルチツール推論」のみリモート フロンティア API — が標準化。Big-3 IDE (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) はすべて **ローカルファースト切替** をデフォルトで搭載。「クラウドオンリー コーディングエージェント」は 2024 年遺物となる。
description.es: **El "agente de coding sobre GPU de consumo" desplaza a la API de coding solo-cloud en ≥30 % de las cargas dev para el T3 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B del 22/4 (denso, supera al 397B-A17B en SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s en RTX 3090 con Q4_K_M ~16,8 GB**) + el preview MLX de Ollama del 23/4 (1,57x prefill / 1,93x decode en M5 Max sobre Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + la API DeepSeek V4-Pro 75 % off (**efectivamente ~28x más barata que Claude Opus 4.7**) componen un **acoso a tres bandas** sobre el modelo SaaS de API frontera propietaria. Para el T3 2026, **las herramientas dev empresariales adoptan por defecto un harness híbrido** — Qwen 3.6 local para "coding, refactor, lint, test" + API frontera remota solo para "planificación de horizonte largo / razonamiento multi-tool" — y los Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) traen un **conmutador local-first** activado por defecto. El "agente de coding solo-cloud" queda como reliquia de 2024.
description.fil: **Papalitan ng "consumer-GPU coding agent" ang cloud-only coding API sa ≥30% ng dev workloads pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang Apr 22 Qwen3.6-27B (dense, nakahihigit sa 397B-A17B sa SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s sa RTX 3090 sa Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode sa M5 Max para sa Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x mas mura kaysa Claude Opus 4.7**) ay bumubuo ng **3-corner squeeze** sa proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, **gagamit ang enterprise dev tools ng hybrid harness bilang default** — local Qwen 3.6-class para sa "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API lamang para sa "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — at lahat ng Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ay maglalabas ng **local-first toggle** bilang default. Magiging 2024-era artifact na lang ang "cloud-only coding agent".

bridges.text: Today's Chinese open-weight stack carry (DeepSeek V4 + Qwen 3.6 + Kimi K2.6 + GLM-5.1) + Bonsai-8B + Foundry Local + Unsloth 2026.4.8 + Google Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite at $0.25 supports `because` (consumer-GPU-capable open-weight stack matures + per-token-margin compression). Reason: open-weight stack continues to widen + Google joins the per-token-margin compression at $0.25/M. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: no enterprise dev-tool vendor has yet published "≥30% local-first toggle by default" telemetry.

Reason: ang open-weight stack ay nakakatalo na sa GPT-5.4 sa SWE-Bench Pro sa consumer-hardware price points. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: walang enterprise dev-tool vendor na nag-publish ng "≥30% local-first toggle by default" telemetry.

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「コンシューマ GPU 上のコーディングエージェント」が Q3 2026 までに開発ワークロードの 30% 以上でクラウドオンリー API を置き換える。** 4/22 の Qwen3.6-27B (Dense、SWE-bench Verified で 397B-A17B を撃破、**RTX 3090 + Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB で 40 tok/s**) + 4/23 の Ollama MLX プレビュー (M5 Max + Qwen3.5-35B-A3B で prefill 1.57 倍 / decode 1.93 倍) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75% オフ API (**Claude Opus 4.7 比で実効 ~28 倍安価**) が独自フロンティア API SaaS モデルへの **3 方向の挟撃**を構成。Q3 2026 までに **エンタープライズ開発ツールはハイブリッドハーネスがデフォルト** — 「コーディング、リファクタリング、Lint、テスト」はローカル Qwen 3.6 クラス、「長期計画 / マルチツール推論」のみリモート フロンティア API — が標準化。Big-3 IDE (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) はすべて **ローカルファースト切替** をデフォルトで搭載。「クラウドオンリー コーディングエージェント」は 2024 年遺物となる。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **El "agente de coding sobre GPU de consumo" desplaza a la API de coding solo-cloud en ≥30 % de las cargas dev para el T3 2026.** Qwen3.6-27B del 22/4 (denso, supera al 397B-A17B en SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s en RTX 3090 con Q4_K_M ~16,8 GB**) + el preview MLX de Ollama del 23/4 (1,57x prefill / 1,93x decode en M5 Max sobre Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + la API DeepSeek V4-Pro 75 % off (**efectivamente ~28x más barata que Claude Opus 4.7**) componen un **acoso a tres bandas** sobre el modelo SaaS de API frontera propietaria. Para el T3 2026, **las herramientas dev empresariales adoptan por defecto un harness híbrido** — Qwen 3.6 local para "coding, refactor, lint, test" + API frontera remota solo para "planificación de horizonte largo / razonamiento multi-tool" — y los Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) traen un **conmutador local-first** activado por defecto. El "agente de coding solo-cloud" queda como reliquia de 2024.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Papalitan ng "consumer-GPU coding agent" ang cloud-only coding API sa ≥30% ng dev workloads pagdating ng Q3 2026.** Ang Apr 22 Qwen3.6-27B (dense, nakahihigit sa 397B-A17B sa SWE-bench Verified, **40 tok/s sa RTX 3090 sa Q4_K_M ~16.8 GB**) + Apr 23 Ollama MLX preview (1.57x prefill / 1.93x decode sa M5 Max para sa Qwen3.5-35B-A3B) + DeepSeek V4-Pro 75%-off API (**effectively ~28x mas mura kaysa Claude Opus 4.7**) ay bumubuo ng **3-corner squeeze** sa proprietary frontier-API SaaS model. Pagdating ng Q3 2026, **gagamit ang enterprise dev tools ng hybrid harness bilang default** — local Qwen 3.6-class para sa "coding, refactor, lint, test" + remote frontier API lamang para sa "long-horizon planning / multi-tool reasoning" — at lahat ng Big-3 IDEs (Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro Power) ay maglalabas ng **local-first toggle** bilang default. Magiging 2024-era artifact na lang ang "cloud-only coding agent".

nodes.label: By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack
nodes.short_label: By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack
nodes.description: **By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM all ship a `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (or equivalent) flag with TurboQuant + at least one alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Apr 27-29 makes this a near-certainty: **TurboQuant lands at ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **SGLang PR #21419 already in-tree** with a fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) hitting 93-105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** at Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demoing multi-agent shared-pool quantization, and **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** circulating before Google's official Python release lands in Q2 2026. The economic forcing function is the same Mag-7 capex tape the Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report just cracked: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that can move from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x. By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs.

description.en: **By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM all ship a `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (or equivalent) flag with TurboQuant + at least one alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Apr 27-29 makes this a near-certainty: **TurboQuant lands at ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **SGLang PR #21419 already in-tree** with a fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) hitting 93-105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** at Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demoing multi-agent shared-pool quantization, and **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** circulating before Google's official Python release lands in Q2 2026. The economic forcing function is the same Mag-7 capex tape the Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report just cracked: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that can move from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x. By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs.
description.ja: **Q4 2026までに、KVキャッシュ圧縮dtypeはすべての主要推論スタックでファーストクラスのデプロイ・ノブとして露出する — vLLM、SGLang、TGI、Ollama、llama.cpp、NVIDIA TensorRT-LLMが TurboQuant + 1つ以上の代替(KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention)を同梱した`--kv-cache-dtype turboquant`(または同等)フラグを出荷する。** 4/27–29がこれをほぼ確実にしている: **TurboQuantがICLR 2026 + Google Researchブログに着地**、**SGLang PR #21419は既にツリー内**(融合カーネル書き換え#23134でbf16比93–105%スループット)、**NVIDIA kvpress**はDecoding-Press成熟、**PolyKV(arxiv 2604.24971)**がマルチエージェント共有プール量子化を実証、**コミュニティMLX + Triton + vLLM移植**がGoogleの公式Python実装(Q2 2026予定)に先行して流通。経済的な強制力は4/28のWSJ OpenAI未達が割ったMag 7キャペックス相場と同一: メモリ帯域律速の長コンテキスト・ワークロードがFP16から3.5ビットへ移れれば、トークン当たり実効コストは約5–6倍カットできる。Q4 2026までにハイパースケーラはBedrock/Azure/Vertexのトークン課金を圧縮キャッシュ・ティアにオプトイン依存させ、昨日レポートの「インクリメンタルGPUキャペックスへのハードキャップ」テーゼは GPUを減らすのではなくこのレバーで締まる。
description.es: **Para Q4 2026 el dtype de compresión de KV-cache se expone como un knob de despliegue de primera clase en cada stack de inferencia mayor — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM lanzan un flag `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o equivalente) con TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** El periodo 27–29 abr lo vuelve casi seguro: **TurboQuant aterriza en ICLR 2026 + blog de Google Research**, **el PR #21419 de SGLang ya está in-tree** con una rescritura de fused-kernel (#23134) llegando a 93–105% del throughput bf16, **NVIDIA kvpress** alcanza madurez en Decoding-Press, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demuestra cuantización con pool compartido multi-agente y **ports comunitarios MLX + Triton + vLLM** circulan antes de que llegue la liberación oficial Python de Google en Q2 2026. La función forzante económica es el mismo tape de capex Mag-7 que el reporte del WSJ del 28-abr sobre OpenAI acaba de fracturar: cada workload long-context limitado por ancho de banda de memoria que pueda mover de FP16 a 3,5 bits recorta el costo efectivo por token unas 5–6x. Para Q4 2026 los hyperscalers condicionan los precios por token de Bedrock/Azure/Vertex a tiers opt-in de cache comprimido, y la tesis de hard-cap a capex GPU incremental del reporte de ayer aprieta vía esta palanca y no por menos GPUs.
description.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, isang first-class deployment knob na ang KV-cache-compression dtype sa bawat major inference stack — magla-launch ang vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM ng `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o katumbas) flag na may TurboQuant + di bababa sa isang alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Ginagawang halos siguradong ito ng Apr 27–29: **pumasok ang TurboQuant sa ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **in-tree na ang SGLang PR #21419** na may fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) na umabot ng 93–105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** sa Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** na nag-demo ng multi-agent shared-pool quantization, at **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** na umiikot bago pa man dumating ang opisyal na Python release ng Google sa Q2 2026. Ang economic forcing function ay ang parehong Mag-7 capex tape na binitak ng Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na puwedeng lumipat mula FP16 patungo sa 3.5-bit ay nagbabawas ng effective per-token cost ng ~5–6x. Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, ipo-condition ng hyperscalers ang per-token pricing ng Bedrock/Azure/Vertex sa opt-in compressed-cache tiers, at higpit ang thesis ng kahapon na hard-cap sa incremental GPU capex sa pamamagitan nitong lever, hindi sa pamamagitan ng pagbawas ng GPU.

detail.title: By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack

bridges.text: Today's SGLang vs vLLM 29% throughput gap on H100 (RadixAttention prefix-cache) + SGLang day-0 support for MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + SGLang Diffusion (Jan 2026) + Unsloth 12x MoE + 1.8-3.3x BERT/embedding (Hugging Face joint engineering) + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage Unsloth guide supports `landing` (cross-stack deployment-knob exposure). Reason: production-serving Pareto-frontier now has a measurable shared-prefix-cache vs multi-hardware split so that the inference-engine choice is no longer commodity, and the training-side compression knob (12x MoE, 70% VRAM reduction) compounds the same architecture trend. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: TGI + Ollama + TensorRT-LLM still missing the explicit `--kv-cache-dtype` flag.

text_locales.en: Today's SGLang vs vLLM 29% throughput gap on H100 (RadixAttention prefix-cache) + SGLang day-0 support for MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + SGLang Diffusion (Jan 2026) + Unsloth 12x MoE + 1.8-3.3x BERT/embedding (Hugging Face joint engineering) + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage Unsloth guide supports `landing` (cross-stack deployment-knob exposure). Reason: production-serving Pareto-frontier now has a measurable shared-prefix-cache vs multi-hardware split so that the inference-engine choice is no longer commodity, and the training-side compression knob (12x MoE, 70% VRAM reduction) compounds the same architecture trend. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: TGI + Ollama + TensorRT-LLM still missing the explicit `--kv-cache-dtype` flag.
text_locales.ja: 本日の H100 上 SGLang vs vLLM 29% スループットギャップ（RadixAttention プリフィックスキャッシュ）+ SGLang day-0 サポート（MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2）+ SGLang Diffusion（2026年1月）+ Unsloth 12倍 MoE + 1.8-3.3倍 BERT/embedding（Hugging Face 共同エンジニアリング）+ NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage Unsloth ガイドは `landing`（クロススタック展開ノブ露出）を支持する。理由: 本番サービングのパレートフロンティアが今や測定可能な共有プリフィックスキャッシュ vs マルチハードウェアの分裂を持ち、推論エンジン選択がもはやコモディティではなくなり、トレーニング側の圧縮ノブ（12倍 MoE、70% VRAM 削減）が同じアーキテクチャ・トレンドを複合化するように。Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: TGI + Ollama + TensorRT-LLM はまだ明示的な `--kv-cache-dtype` フラグを欠く。

Razón: la Pareto-frontier de production-serving ahora tiene un split medible shared-prefix-cache vs multi-hardware so_that la elección de inference-engine ya no es commodity, y el knob de compresión training-side (12x MoE, 70% reducción VRAM) compounds la misma tendencia arquitectónica. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: TGI + Ollama + TensorRT-LLM aún sin flag explícito `--kv-cache-dtype`.

bridges.text: Today's SGLang TurboQuant #21419 + #23134 + llama.cpp #20969 + PolyKV + NVIDIA kvpress + new arxiv wave (SideQuest reasoning-driven KV cache management; DepthKV layer-dependent pruning) + KVFundaBench + vLLM v0.20.0 + Unsloth 2026.4.8 supports `landing` (cross-stack deployment-knob exposure). Reason: alternatives-to-TurboQuant set is broadening on cadence + reasoning-driven and layer-aware variants now research-mature. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: TGI + Ollama + TensorRT-LLM still missing the explicit `--kv-cache-dtype` flag.

Remaining gap: TGI + Ollama + TensorRT-LLM ay nawawala pa rin ang explicit `--kv-cache-dtype` flag.
