detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM all ship a `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (or equivalent) flag with TurboQuant + at least one alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Apr 27-29 makes this a near-certainty: **TurboQuant lands at ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **SGLang PR #21419 already in-tree** with a fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) hitting 93-105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** at Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demoing multi-agent shared-pool quantization, and **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** circulating before Google's official Python release lands in Q2 2026. The economic forcing function is the same Mag-7 capex tape the Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report just cracked: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that can move from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x. By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs.
detail.prediction_summary: **By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM all ship a `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (or equivalent) flag with TurboQuant + at least one alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Apr 27-29 makes this a near-certainty: **TurboQuant lands at ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **SGLang PR #21419 already in-tree** with a fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) hitting 93-105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** at Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demoing multi-agent shared-pool quantization, and **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** circulating before Google's official Python release lands in Q2 2026. The economic forcing function is the same Mag-7 capex tape the Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report just cracked: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that can move from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x. By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs.

prediction_summary_locales.en: **By Q4 2026 KV-cache-compression dtype is exposed as a first-class deployment knob in every major inference stack — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM all ship a `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (or equivalent) flag with TurboQuant + at least one alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Apr 27-29 makes this a near-certainty: **TurboQuant lands at ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **SGLang PR #21419 already in-tree** with a fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) hitting 93-105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** at Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demoing multi-agent shared-pool quantization, and **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** circulating before Google's official Python release lands in Q2 2026. The economic forcing function is the same Mag-7 capex tape the Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report just cracked: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that can move from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x. By Q4 2026 hyperscalers gate Bedrock/Azure/Vertex per-token pricing on opt-in compressed-cache tiers, and the hardware-cap-on-incremental-GPU-capex thesis from yesterday's report tightens via this lever rather than via fewer GPUs.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **Q4 2026までに、KVキャッシュ圧縮dtypeはすべての主要推論スタックでファーストクラスのデプロイ・ノブとして露出する — vLLM、SGLang、TGI、Ollama、llama.cpp、NVIDIA TensorRT-LLMが TurboQuant + 1つ以上の代替(KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention)を同梱した`--kv-cache-dtype turboquant`(または同等)フラグを出荷する。** 4/27–29がこれをほぼ確実にしている: **TurboQuantがICLR 2026 + Google Researchブログに着地**、**SGLang PR #21419は既にツリー内**(融合カーネル書き換え#23134でbf16比93–105%スループット)、**NVIDIA kvpress**はDecoding-Press成熟、**PolyKV(arxiv 2604.24971)**がマルチエージェント共有プール量子化を実証、**コミュニティMLX + Triton + vLLM移植**がGoogleの公式Python実装(Q2 2026予定)に先行して流通。経済的な強制力は4/28のWSJ OpenAI未達が割ったMag 7キャペックス相場と同一: メモリ帯域律速の長コンテキスト・ワークロードがFP16から3.5ビットへ移れれば、トークン当たり実効コストは約5–6倍カットできる。Q4 2026までにハイパースケーラはBedrock/Azure/Vertexのトークン課金を圧縮キャッシュ・ティアにオプトイン依存させ、昨日レポートの「インクリメンタルGPUキャペックスへのハードキャップ」テーゼは GPUを減らすのではなくこのレバーで締まる。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para Q4 2026 el dtype de compresión de KV-cache se expone como un knob de despliegue de primera clase en cada stack de inferencia mayor — vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM lanzan un flag `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o equivalente) con TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** El periodo 27–29 abr lo vuelve casi seguro: **TurboQuant aterriza en ICLR 2026 + blog de Google Research**, **el PR #21419 de SGLang ya está in-tree** con una rescritura de fused-kernel (#23134) llegando a 93–105% del throughput bf16, **NVIDIA kvpress** alcanza madurez en Decoding-Press, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** demuestra cuantización con pool compartido multi-agente y **ports comunitarios MLX + Triton + vLLM** circulan antes de que llegue la liberación oficial Python de Google en Q2 2026. La función forzante económica es el mismo tape de capex Mag-7 que el reporte del WSJ del 28-abr sobre OpenAI acaba de fracturar: cada workload long-context limitado por ancho de banda de memoria que pueda mover de FP16 a 3,5 bits recorta el costo efectivo por token unas 5–6x. Para Q4 2026 los hyperscalers condicionan los precios por token de Bedrock/Azure/Vertex a tiers opt-in de cache comprimido, y la tesis de hard-cap a capex GPU incremental del reporte de ayer aprieta vía esta palanca y no por menos GPUs.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, isang first-class deployment knob na ang KV-cache-compression dtype sa bawat major inference stack — magla-launch ang vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM ng `--kv-cache-dtype turboquant` (o katumbas) flag na may TurboQuant + di bababa sa isang alternative (KVTC / kvpress / TriAttention).** Ginagawang halos siguradong ito ng Apr 27–29: **pumasok ang TurboQuant sa ICLR 2026 + Google Research blog**, **in-tree na ang SGLang PR #21419** na may fused-kernel rewrite (#23134) na umabot ng 93–105% bf16 throughput, **NVIDIA kvpress** sa Decoding-Press maturity, **PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971)** na nag-demo ng multi-agent shared-pool quantization, at **community MLX + Triton + vLLM ports** na umiikot bago pa man dumating ang opisyal na Python release ng Google sa Q2 2026. Ang economic forcing function ay ang parehong Mag-7 capex tape na binitak ng Apr 28 OpenAI-miss WSJ report: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na puwedeng lumipat mula FP16 patungo sa 3.5-bit ay nagbabawas ng effective per-token cost ng ~5–6x. Pagsapit ng Q4 2026, ipo-condition ng hyperscalers ang per-token pricing ng Bedrock/Azure/Vertex sa opt-in compressed-cache tiers, at higpit ang thesis ng kahapon na hard-cap sa incremental GPU capex sa pamamagitan nitong lever, hindi sa pamamagitan ng pagbawas ng GPU.

nodes.label: By H2 2026 every major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) exposes a unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob
nodes.short_label: By H2 2026 every major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) exposes a unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob
nodes.description: **By H2 2026 every major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) exposes a unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + at least one alternative — and Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ships native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML / WinML execution providers as a Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: SGLang PR #21419 in-tree; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite hitting 93–105% bf16 throughput; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool for multi-agent inference; NVIDIA kvpress at Decoding-Press maturity; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread active; Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference 20-30% faster. Foundry Local is the missing enterprise-Windows entry point — Microsoft ships it as a ~20MB native library that bundles local AI into any app with hardware-matched WinML execution providers, and the obvious next step for Q2 2026 is to surface a TurboQuant flag in the Foundry Catalog. The economic forcing function is the same Mag 7 capex tape: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that moves from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x, and Foundry Local makes that switch invisible to end-developers.

description.en: **By H2 2026 every major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) exposes a unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + at least one alternative — and Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ships native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML / WinML execution providers as a Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: SGLang PR #21419 in-tree; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite hitting 93–105% bf16 throughput; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool for multi-agent inference; NVIDIA kvpress at Decoding-Press maturity; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread active; Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference 20-30% faster. Foundry Local is the missing enterprise-Windows entry point — Microsoft ships it as a ~20MB native library that bundles local AI into any app with hardware-matched WinML execution providers, and the obvious next step for Q2 2026 is to surface a TurboQuant flag in the Foundry Catalog. The economic forcing function is the same Mag 7 capex tape: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that moves from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x, and Foundry Local makes that switch invisible to end-developers.
description.ja: **2026年 H2 までに、すべての主要ローカル LLM エコシステム (vLLM、SGLang、TGI、Ollama、llama.cpp、NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM、Foundry Local) が統一された圧縮 KV キャッシュデプロイメントノブ — TurboQuant + 少なくとも 1つの代替 — を公開し、Foundry Local (Microsoft、4/9 GA) が Windows ML / WinML 実行プロバイダーに紐づく Windows デフォルト最適化として TurboQuant ネイティブ統合を出荷する。** 4/27-29 のエビデンス: SGLang PR #21419 がツリーイン; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode カーネル書き直しが bf16 比 93–105% スループットに到達; vLLM v0.19.0 (4/2) が torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / 非同期スケジューラデフォルト + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971、4/27) はマルチエージェント推論のための共有非対称 KV プール; NVIDIA kvpress は Decoding-Press 成熟段階; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant ディスカッションスレッドはアクティブ; Unsloth 2026.4.8 推論 20-30% 高速化。Foundry Local は欠落していたエンタープライズ Windows エントリポイント — Microsoft はハードウェア対応 WinML 実行プロバイダーで任意のアプリにローカル AI をバンドルする約 20MB のネイティブライブラリとして出荷しており、2026年 Q2 の自明な次の一歩は Foundry Catalog で TurboQuant フラグを公開することだ。経済的強制関数は同じ Mag 7 設備投資テープ: メモリ帯域制約のロングコンテキストワークロードが FP16 から 3.5ビットに移ると、トークンあたりの実効コストは ~5-6倍下がり、Foundry Local はそのスイッチをエンドデベロッパーから不可視にする。
description.es: **(Tecnológica) Para H2 2026 cada gran ecosistema de LLM local (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) expone un selector unificado de despliegue de KV-cache comprimida — TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa — y Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA 9-abr) integra TurboQuant nativo ligado a los proveedores de ejecución Windows ML / WinML como optimización por defecto en Windows.** Evidencia 27-29 abr: SGLang PR #21419 ya en árbol; reescritura de kernel fused-Triton-decode SGLang #23134 alcanzando 93–105% de throughput vs bf16; vLLM v0.19.0 (2-abr) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / scheduler asíncrono por defecto + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, 27-abr) pool KV asimétrico compartido para inferencia multi-agente; NVIDIA kvpress en madurez Decoding-Press; hilo de discusión llama.cpp #20969 sobre TurboQuant activo; Unsloth 2026.4.8 con inferencia 20-30% más rápida. Foundry Local es el punto de entrada empresarial Windows que faltaba — Microsoft lo distribuye como una librería nativa de ~20MB que empaqueta IA local en cualquier app con proveedores de ejecución WinML adaptados al hardware, y el siguiente paso obvio para Q2 2026 es exponer un flag TurboQuant en el Foundry Catalog. La función forzada económica es la misma cinta de capex Mag 7: cada carga de trabajo de contexto largo limitada por ancho de banda de memoria que pase de FP16 a 3,5 bits recorta el coste efectivo por token ~5-6x, y Foundry Local hace ese cambio invisible para los desarrolladores.
description.fil: **Bago matapos ang H2 2026, ipo-publish ng bawat major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) ang unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + hindi bababa sa isang alternative — at magsi-ship ang Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ng native TurboQuant integration na nakatali sa Windows ML / WinML execution providers bilang Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: in-tree na ang SGLang PR #21419; umaabot sa 93–105% bf16 throughput ang SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool para sa multi-agent inference; Decoding-Press maturity ang NVIDIA kvpress; aktibo ang llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread; 20-30% mas mabilis ang inference ng Unsloth 2026.4.8. Ang Foundry Local ang nawawalang enterprise-Windows entry point — ini-ship ito ng Microsoft bilang ~20MB native library na nag-bubundle ng local AI sa anumang app na may hardware-matched WinML execution providers, at ang halatang susunod na hakbang para sa Q2 2026 ay i-surface ang TurboQuant flag sa Foundry Catalog. Ang economic forcing function ay ang parehong Mag 7 capex tape: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na lilipat mula FP16 patungong 3.5-bit ay magpaputol sa effective per-token cost ng ~5-6x, at ginagawang invisible ng Foundry Local ang switch na iyon sa end-developers.

summary.en: **By H2 2026 every major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) exposes a unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + at least one alternative — and Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ships native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML / WinML execution providers as a Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: SGLang PR #21419 in-tree; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite hitting 93–105% bf16 throughput; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool for multi-agent inference; NVIDIA kvpress at Decoding-Press maturity; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread active; Unsloth 2026.4.8 inference 20-30% faster. Foundry Local is the missing enterprise-Windows entry point — Microsoft ships it as a ~20MB native library that bundles local AI into any app with hardware-matched WinML execution providers, and the obvious next step for Q2 2026 is to surface a TurboQuant flag in the Foundry Catalog. The economic forcing function is the same Mag 7 capex tape: every memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload that moves from FP16 to 3.5-bit cuts effective per-token cost ~5-6x, and Foundry Local makes that switch invisible to end-developers.
summary.ja: **2026年 H2 までに、すべての主要ローカル LLM エコシステム (vLLM、SGLang、TGI、Ollama、llama.cpp、NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM、Foundry Local) が統一された圧縮 KV キャッシュデプロイメントノブ — TurboQuant + 少なくとも 1つの代替 — を公開し、Foundry Local (Microsoft、4/9 GA) が Windows ML / WinML 実行プロバイダーに紐づく Windows デフォルト最適化として TurboQuant ネイティブ統合を出荷する。** 4/27-29 のエビデンス: SGLang PR #21419 がツリーイン; SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode カーネル書き直しが bf16 比 93–105% スループットに到達; vLLM v0.19.0 (4/2) が torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / 非同期スケジューラデフォルト + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971、4/27) はマルチエージェント推論のための共有非対称 KV プール; NVIDIA kvpress は Decoding-Press 成熟段階; llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant ディスカッションスレッドはアクティブ; Unsloth 2026.4.8 推論 20-30% 高速化。Foundry Local は欠落していたエンタープライズ Windows エントリポイント — Microsoft はハードウェア対応 WinML 実行プロバイダーで任意のアプリにローカル AI をバンドルする約 20MB のネイティブライブラリとして出荷しており、2026年 Q2 の自明な次の一歩は Foundry Catalog で TurboQuant フラグを公開することだ。経済的強制関数は同じ Mag 7 設備投資テープ: メモリ帯域制約のロングコンテキストワークロードが FP16 から 3.5ビットに移ると、トークンあたりの実効コストは ~5-6倍下がり、Foundry Local はそのスイッチをエンドデベロッパーから不可視にする。
summary.es: **(Tecnológica) Para H2 2026 cada gran ecosistema de LLM local (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) expone un selector unificado de despliegue de KV-cache comprimida — TurboQuant + al menos una alternativa — y Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA 9-abr) integra TurboQuant nativo ligado a los proveedores de ejecución Windows ML / WinML como optimización por defecto en Windows.** Evidencia 27-29 abr: SGLang PR #21419 ya en árbol; reescritura de kernel fused-Triton-decode SGLang #23134 alcanzando 93–105% de throughput vs bf16; vLLM v0.19.0 (2-abr) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / scheduler asíncrono por defecto + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, 27-abr) pool KV asimétrico compartido para inferencia multi-agente; NVIDIA kvpress en madurez Decoding-Press; hilo de discusión llama.cpp #20969 sobre TurboQuant activo; Unsloth 2026.4.8 con inferencia 20-30% más rápida. Foundry Local es el punto de entrada empresarial Windows que faltaba — Microsoft lo distribuye como una librería nativa de ~20MB que empaqueta IA local en cualquier app con proveedores de ejecución WinML adaptados al hardware, y el siguiente paso obvio para Q2 2026 es exponer un flag TurboQuant en el Foundry Catalog. La función forzada económica es la misma cinta de capex Mag 7: cada carga de trabajo de contexto largo limitada por ancho de banda de memoria que pase de FP16 a 3,5 bits recorta el coste efectivo por token ~5-6x, y Foundry Local hace ese cambio invisible para los desarrolladores.
summary.fil: **Bago matapos ang H2 2026, ipo-publish ng bawat major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) ang unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob — TurboQuant + hindi bababa sa isang alternative — at magsi-ship ang Foundry Local (Microsoft, GA Apr 9) ng native TurboQuant integration na nakatali sa Windows ML / WinML execution providers bilang Windows-default optimization.** Apr 27-29 evidence: in-tree na ang SGLang PR #21419; umaabot sa 93–105% bf16 throughput ang SGLang #23134 fused-Triton-decode kernel rewrite; vLLM v0.19.0 (Apr 2) torch 2.11 / Python 3.14 / async scheduler default + Model Runner V2; PolyKV (arxiv 2604.24971, Apr 27) shared asymmetric KV-pool para sa multi-agent inference; Decoding-Press maturity ang NVIDIA kvpress; aktibo ang llama.cpp #20969 TurboQuant discussion thread; 20-30% mas mabilis ang inference ng Unsloth 2026.4.8. Ang Foundry Local ang nawawalang enterprise-Windows entry point — ini-ship ito ng Microsoft bilang ~20MB native library na nag-bubundle ng local AI sa anumang app na may hardware-matched WinML execution providers, at ang halatang susunod na hakbang para sa Q2 2026 ay i-surface ang TurboQuant flag sa Foundry Catalog. Ang economic forcing function ay ang parehong Mag 7 capex tape: bawat memory-bandwidth-bound long-context workload na lilipat mula FP16 patungong 3.5-bit ay magpaputol sa effective per-token cost ng ~5-6x, at ginagawang invisible ng Foundry Local ang switch na iyon sa end-developers.

detail.title: By H2 2026 every major local-LLM ecosystem (vLLM, SGLang, TGI, Ollama, llama.cpp, NVIDIA TensorRT-LLM, Foundry Local) exposes a unified compressed-KV-cache deployment knob

bridges.text: Today's full inference-stack coverage — SGLang vs vLLM 29% throughput gap + day-0 model coverage + SGLang Diffusion + Unsloth 12x MoE + Hugging Face BERT pact + NVIDIA DGX Spark integration + Unsloth Studio 100%-offline runtime — supports `landing` (unified compressed-KV-cache + training-stack deployment knob). Reason: cross-stack convergence is visible across SGLang, vLLM, Unsloth, and the consumer-GPU + RTX laptop tiers because the production-serving and fine-tuning Pareto-frontier hits the same memory-bandwidth ceiling. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: Foundry Local does not yet ship native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML.

text_locales.en: Today's full inference-stack coverage — SGLang vs vLLM 29% throughput gap + day-0 model coverage + SGLang Diffusion + Unsloth 12x MoE + Hugging Face BERT pact + NVIDIA DGX Spark integration + Unsloth Studio 100%-offline runtime — supports `landing` (unified compressed-KV-cache + training-stack deployment knob). Reason: cross-stack convergence is visible across SGLang, vLLM, Unsloth, and the consumer-GPU + RTX laptop tiers because the production-serving and fine-tuning Pareto-frontier hits the same memory-bandwidth ceiling. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: Foundry Local does not yet ship native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML.
text_locales.ja: 本日のフル推論スタック・カバレッジ — SGLang vs vLLM 29% スループットギャップ + day-0 モデル・カバレッジ + SGLang Diffusion + Unsloth 12倍 MoE + Hugging Face BERT 提携 + NVIDIA DGX Spark 統合 + Unsloth Studio 100% オフライン・ランタイム — は `landing`（統合圧縮 KV キャッシュ + トレーニングスタック展開ノブ）を支持する。理由: クロススタック収束が SGLang、vLLM、Unsloth、コンシューマー GPU + RTX ラップトップ層横断で可視であり、本番サービングとファインチューニングのパレートフロンティアが同じメモリ帯域幅天井に当たるため。Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: Foundry Local はまだ Windows ML 連携の native TurboQuant 統合未出荷。
text_locales.es: La cobertura full inference-stack de hoy — brecha throughput SGLang vs vLLM 29% + day-0 model coverage + SGLang Diffusion + Unsloth 12x MoE + pacto Hugging Face BERT + integración NVIDIA DGX Spark + runtime Unsloth Studio 100%-offline — apoya `landing` (deployment-knob unificado compressed-KV-cache + training-stack). Razón: convergencia cross-stack visible a través de SGLang, vLLM, Unsloth, y los tiers consumer-GPU + RTX laptop porque la Pareto-frontier de production-serving y fine-tuning golpea el mismo techo memory-bandwidth. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: Foundry Local aún no entrega integración nativa TurboQuant atada a Windows ML.
text_locales.fil: Today's full inference-stack coverage — SGLang vs vLLM 29% throughput gap + day-0 model coverage + SGLang Diffusion + Unsloth 12x MoE + Hugging Face BERT pact + NVIDIA DGX Spark integration + Unsloth Studio 100%-offline runtime — ay nag-su-suporta sa `landing` (unified compressed-KV-cache + training-stack deployment knob). Reason: cross-stack convergence ay visible across SGLang, vLLM, Unsloth, at ang consumer-GPU + RTX laptop tiers because ang production-serving at fine-tuning Pareto-frontier ay tumatama sa parehong memory-bandwidth ceiling. Coherence 5/5. Remaining gap: ang Foundry Local ay hindi pa nag-shi-ship ng native TurboQuant integration tied to Windows ML.

nodes.description: **By H2 2026 the Unsloth 2026 update wave — 12x faster MoE training + ultra-long-context Reinforcement Learning + 1.8-3.3x faster embedding / BERT / classifier training with 20% less VRAM and 2x longer context (joint Hugging Face engineering) + Unsloth Studio Mar 17 100%-offline GGUF + Safetensors runtime + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage fine-tuning guide (RTX-laptop performance up 2.5x) — combined with the SGLang 29% throughput advantage on H100 (RadixAttention prefix-cache shared with vLLM at ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + day-0 SGLang support for MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + the Apr 28-May 3 KV-cache arxiv wave (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) makes consumer-GPU training operationally equivalent to enterprise-GPU 2024-baseline; expect ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, or Google Vertex AI) to ship a managed Unsloth-as-a-service tier with managed-runtime + IAM + audit + cost-optimized GPU pool to close the consumer-GPU → enterprise-fine-tuning gap before AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite cycles.** Forcing function is the procurement-friction asymmetry: enterprises with internal Unsloth pilots already see 70%-VRAM-reduction economics on consumer GPUs, but enterprise security + governance demands a managed control plane that the open-source CLI doesn't provide; whichever hyperscaler ships first absorbs the migration. Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI all have the runtime substrate; the missing piece is the fine-tuning-as-a-service surface that unifies the open-source kernel performance with managed-IAM enterprise governance.

description.en: **By H2 2026 the Unsloth 2026 update wave — 12x faster MoE training + ultra-long-context Reinforcement Learning + 1.8-3.3x faster embedding / BERT / classifier training with 20% less VRAM and 2x longer context (joint Hugging Face engineering) + Unsloth Studio Mar 17 100%-offline GGUF + Safetensors runtime + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage fine-tuning guide (RTX-laptop performance up 2.5x) — combined with the SGLang 29% throughput advantage on H100 (RadixAttention prefix-cache shared with vLLM at ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + day-0 SGLang support for MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + the Apr 28-May 3 KV-cache arxiv wave (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) makes consumer-GPU training operationally equivalent to enterprise-GPU 2024-baseline; expect ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, or Google Vertex AI) to ship a managed Unsloth-as-a-service tier with managed-runtime + IAM + audit + cost-optimized GPU pool to close the consumer-GPU → enterprise-fine-tuning gap before AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite cycles.** Forcing function is the procurement-friction asymmetry: enterprises with internal Unsloth pilots already see 70%-VRAM-reduction economics on consumer GPUs, but enterprise security + governance demands a managed control plane that the open-source CLI doesn't provide; whichever hyperscaler ships first absorbs the migration. Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI all have the runtime substrate; the missing piece is the fine-tuning-as-a-service surface that unifies the open-source kernel performance with managed-IAM enterprise governance.
description.ja: **2026年下半期までに、Unsloth 2026アップデートの波 — 12倍高速MoE学習 + 超ロングコンテキスト強化学習 + 1.8〜3.3倍高速 embedding / BERT / 分類器学習でVRAM 20%削減 + コンテキスト2倍長（Hugging Face共同エンジニアリング） + Unsloth Studio 3月17日 100%オフラインGGUF + Safetensorsランタイム + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garageファインチューニングガイド（RTXラップトップ性能2.5倍向上） — がSGLangのH100上での29%スループット優位（RadixAttentionプレフィックスキャッシュ vLLM比 約16,200 vs 約12,500 tok/s） + SGLangのMiMo-V2-Flash、Nemotron 3 Nano、Mistral Large 3、LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion、MiniMax M2へのday-0サポート + 4月28日〜5月3日のKVキャッシュarxiv波（SideQuest、DepthKV、KVFundaBench）と組み合わさり、コンシューマーGPU学習をエンタープライズGPU 2024ベースラインと運用上同等にする。1社以上のハイパースケーラー（AWS Bedrock fine-tuning、Azure AI Foundry、またはGoogle Vertex AI）が、コンシューマーGPU → エンタープライズファインチューニング間のギャップを埋めるため、AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Igniteのサイクルまでに、マネージドランタイム + IAM + 監査 + コスト最適化GPUプールを伴うマネージドUnsloth-as-a-serviceティアを出荷することが期待される。** 強制関数は調達摩擦の非対称性: 内部Unslothパイロットを持つ企業はコンシューマーGPUで既にVRAM 70%削減の経済性を得ているが、エンタープライズのセキュリティ + ガバナンス要件にはマネージド・コントロールプレーンが必要であり、オープンソースCLIではこれを提供できない。最初に出荷したハイパースケーラーが移行需要を吸収する。Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AIはいずれもランタイム基盤を持っており、欠けているピースは、オープンソースカーネル性能とマネージドIAMエンタープライズガバナンスを統合するファインチューニング・アズ・ア・サービスのサーフェスである。
description.es: **Para el H2 2026 la ola de updates Unsloth 2026 — entrenamiento MoE 12x más rápido + Reinforcement Learning con contexto ultra-largo + entrenamiento embedding / BERT / clasificador 1.8-3.3x más rápido con 20% menos VRAM y 2x más contexto (engineering conjunta con Hugging Face) + Unsloth Studio del 17 mar runtime 100%-offline GGUF + Safetensors + guía de fine-tuning NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage (rendimiento RTX-laptop sube 2.5x) — combinada con la ventaja de throughput 29% de SGLang en H100 (prefix-cache RadixAttention compartida con vLLM a ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + soporte day-0 SGLang para MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + la ola arxiv del 28 abril-3 mayo sobre KV-cache (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) hace al entrenamiento con GPU consumer operativamente equivalente al baseline 2024 con GPU empresarial; se espera que ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, o Google Vertex AI) entregue un tier managed Unsloth-as-a-service con runtime managed + IAM + audit + pool GPU optimizado en costo para cerrar la brecha consumer-GPU → enterprise-fine-tuning antes de los ciclos AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite.** La función forzante es la asimetría procurement-friction: las empresas con pilotos internos de Unsloth ya ven economía de reducción 70% VRAM en GPUs consumer, pero la seguridad + governance empresarial demandan un plano de control managed que el CLI open-source no provee; el hyperscaler que entregue primero absorbe la migración. Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI tienen todos el sustrato runtime; la pieza faltante es la superficie fine-tuning-as-a-service que unifique el rendimiento del kernel open-source con la governance empresarial managed-IAM.
description.fil: **Pagsapit ng H2 2026 ang Unsloth 2026 update wave — 12x na mas mabilis na MoE training + ultra-long-context Reinforcement Learning + 1.8-3.3x na mas mabilis na embedding / BERT / classifier training na may 20% mas kaunting VRAM at 2x mas mahabang context (joint Hugging Face engineering) + Unsloth Studio Mar 17 100%-offline GGUF + Safetensors runtime + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage fine-tuning guide (RTX-laptop performance umangat 2.5x) — kasama ang SGLang 29% throughput advantage sa H100 (RadixAttention prefix-cache shared sa vLLM sa ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + day-0 SGLang support para sa MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + ang Apr 28-May 3 KV-cache arxiv wave (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) ay ginagawa ang consumer-GPU training na operationally equivalent sa enterprise-GPU 2024-baseline; inaasahang ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, o Google Vertex AI) ay maglalabas ng managed Unsloth-as-a-service tier na may managed-runtime + IAM + audit + cost-optimized GPU pool upang isara ang consumer-GPU → enterprise-fine-tuning gap bago ang AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite cycles.** Ang forcing function ay ang procurement-friction asymmetry: ang mga enterprise na may internal Unsloth pilots ay nakikita na ang 70%-VRAM-reduction economics sa consumer GPUs, ngunit ang enterprise security + governance ay humihingi ng managed control plane na hindi ibinibigay ng open-source CLI; alinmang hyperscaler ang unang maglabas ang aabsorb sa migration. Ang Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI ay parehong may runtime substrate; ang nawawalang piraso ay ang fine-tuning-as-a-service surface na nagbubuklod sa open-source kernel performance sa managed-IAM enterprise governance.

Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI all have the runtime substrate; the missing piece is the fine-tuning-as-a-service surface that unifies the open-source kernel performance with managed-IAM enterprise governance.

eli14.en: Local-LLM training is now twice as fast and uses 70% less VRAM — soon big clouds will rent that out as a managed service.
eli14.ja: ローカルLLM学習は今や2倍高速でVRAMも70%少なくて済む — 近いうちに大手クラウドがそれをマネージドサービスとして貸し出すだろう。
eli14.es: El entrenamiento de LLMs local es ahora el doble de rápido y usa 70% menos VRAM — pronto las grandes nubes lo rentarán como servicio managed.
eli14.fil: Ang local-LLM training ngayon ay dalawang beses na mas mabilis at gumagamit ng 70% mas kaunting VRAM — malapit na itong i-rent out ng malalaking clouds bilang managed service.

detail.summary_short: Unsloth's 12x MoE training + Hugging Face BERT/embedding pact + NVIDIA DGX Spark integration converges with SGLang's 29% serving advantage to set a new Pareto-frontier for local-LLM training and inference. By H2 2026 ≥1 hyperscaler ships a managed Unsloth-as-a-service tier targeting enterprise fine-tuning workloads.

summary_short_locales.en: Unsloth's 12x MoE training + Hugging Face BERT/embedding pact + NVIDIA DGX Spark integration converges with SGLang's 29% serving advantage to set a new Pareto-frontier for local-LLM training and inference. By H2 2026 ≥1 hyperscaler ships a managed Unsloth-as-a-service tier targeting enterprise fine-tuning workloads.
summary_short_locales.ja: Unslothの12倍 MoE学習 + Hugging Face BERT/embedding提携 + NVIDIA DGX Sparkインテグレーションが、SGLangの29%配信優位と収斂し、ローカルLLM学習・推論の新たなパレートフロンティアを構築する。2026年下半期までに1社以上のハイパースケーラーが、エンタープライズファインチューニング・ワークロードを狙ったマネージドUnsloth-as-a-serviceティアを出荷する。
summary_short_locales.es: El entrenamiento MoE 12x de Unsloth + el pacto BERT/embedding con Hugging Face + integración NVIDIA DGX Spark converge con la ventaja serving 29% de SGLang para fijar una nueva frontera Pareto para entrenamiento e inferencia local de LLMs. Para H2 2026 ≥1 hyperscaler entrega un tier managed de Unsloth-as-a-service apuntando a cargas empresariales de fine-tuning.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang Unsloth's 12x MoE training + Hugging Face BERT/embedding pact + NVIDIA DGX Spark integration ay nag-converge sa SGLang's 29% serving advantage upang magtakda ng bagong Pareto-frontier para sa local-LLM training at inference. Pagsapit ng H2 2026 ≥1 hyperscaler ay maglalabas ng managed Unsloth-as-a-service tier na nakatutok sa enterprise fine-tuning workloads.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By H2 2026 the Unsloth 2026 update wave — 12x faster MoE training + ultra-long-context Reinforcement Learning + 1.8-3.3x faster embedding / BERT / classifier training with 20% less VRAM and 2x longer context (joint Hugging Face engineering) + Unsloth Studio Mar 17 100%-offline GGUF + Safetensors runtime + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage fine-tuning guide (RTX-laptop performance up 2.5x) — combined with the SGLang 29% throughput advantage on H100 (RadixAttention prefix-cache shared with vLLM at ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + day-0 SGLang support for MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + the Apr 28-May 3 KV-cache arxiv wave (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) makes consumer-GPU training operationally equivalent to enterprise-GPU 2024-baseline; expect ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, or Google Vertex AI) to ship a managed Unsloth-as-a-service tier with managed-runtime + IAM + audit + cost-optimized GPU pool to close the consumer-GPU → enterprise-fine-tuning gap before AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite cycles.** Forcing function is the procurement-friction asymmetry: enterprises with internal Unsloth pilots already see 70%-VRAM-reduction economics on consumer GPUs, but enterprise security + governance demands a managed control plane that the open-source CLI doesn't provide; whichever hyperscaler ships first absorbs the migration. Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI all have the runtime substrate; the missing piece is the fine-tuning-as-a-service surface that unifies the open-source kernel performance with managed-IAM enterprise governance.
detail.prediction_summary: **By H2 2026 the Unsloth 2026 update wave — 12x faster MoE training + ultra-long-context Reinforcement Learning + 1.8-3.3x faster embedding / BERT / classifier training with 20% less VRAM and 2x longer context (joint Hugging Face engineering) + Unsloth Studio Mar 17 100%-offline GGUF + Safetensors runtime + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage fine-tuning guide (RTX-laptop performance up 2.5x) — combined with the SGLang 29% throughput advantage on H100 (RadixAttention prefix-cache shared with vLLM at ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + day-0 SGLang support for MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + the Apr 28-May 3 KV-cache arxiv wave (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) makes consumer-GPU training operationally equivalent to enterprise-GPU 2024-baseline; expect ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, or Google Vertex AI) to ship a managed Unsloth-as-a-service tier with managed-runtime + IAM + audit + cost-optimized GPU pool to close the consumer-GPU → enterprise-fine-tuning gap before AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite cycles.** Forcing function is the procurement-friction asymmetry: enterprises with internal Unsloth pilots already see 70%-VRAM-reduction economics on consumer GPUs, but enterprise security + governance demands a managed control plane that the open-source CLI doesn't provide; whichever hyperscaler ships first absorbs the migration. Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI all have the runtime substrate; the missing piece is the fine-tuning-as-a-service surface that unifies the open-source kernel performance with managed-IAM enterprise governance.

prediction_summary_locales.en: **By H2 2026 the Unsloth 2026 update wave — 12x faster MoE training + ultra-long-context Reinforcement Learning + 1.8-3.3x faster embedding / BERT / classifier training with 20% less VRAM and 2x longer context (joint Hugging Face engineering) + Unsloth Studio Mar 17 100%-offline GGUF + Safetensors runtime + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage fine-tuning guide (RTX-laptop performance up 2.5x) — combined with the SGLang 29% throughput advantage on H100 (RadixAttention prefix-cache shared with vLLM at ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + day-0 SGLang support for MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + the Apr 28-May 3 KV-cache arxiv wave (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) makes consumer-GPU training operationally equivalent to enterprise-GPU 2024-baseline; expect ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, or Google Vertex AI) to ship a managed Unsloth-as-a-service tier with managed-runtime + IAM + audit + cost-optimized GPU pool to close the consumer-GPU → enterprise-fine-tuning gap before AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite cycles.** Forcing function is the procurement-friction asymmetry: enterprises with internal Unsloth pilots already see 70%-VRAM-reduction economics on consumer GPUs, but enterprise security + governance demands a managed control plane that the open-source CLI doesn't provide; whichever hyperscaler ships first absorbs the migration. Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI all have the runtime substrate; the missing piece is the fine-tuning-as-a-service surface that unifies the open-source kernel performance with managed-IAM enterprise governance.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年下半期までに、Unsloth 2026アップデートの波 — 12倍高速MoE学習 + 超ロングコンテキスト強化学習 + 1.8〜3.3倍高速 embedding / BERT / 分類器学習でVRAM 20%削減 + コンテキスト2倍長（Hugging Face共同エンジニアリング） + Unsloth Studio 3月17日 100%オフラインGGUF + Safetensorsランタイム + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garageファインチューニングガイド（RTXラップトップ性能2.5倍向上） — がSGLangのH100上での29%スループット優位（RadixAttentionプレフィックスキャッシュ vLLM比 約16,200 vs 約12,500 tok/s） + SGLangのMiMo-V2-Flash、Nemotron 3 Nano、Mistral Large 3、LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion、MiniMax M2へのday-0サポート + 4月28日〜5月3日のKVキャッシュarxiv波（SideQuest、DepthKV、KVFundaBench）と組み合わさり、コンシューマーGPU学習をエンタープライズGPU 2024ベースラインと運用上同等にする。1社以上のハイパースケーラー（AWS Bedrock fine-tuning、Azure AI Foundry、またはGoogle Vertex AI）が、コンシューマーGPU → エンタープライズファインチューニング間のギャップを埋めるため、AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Igniteのサイクルまでに、マネージドランタイム + IAM + 監査 + コスト最適化GPUプールを伴うマネージドUnsloth-as-a-serviceティアを出荷することが期待される。** 強制関数は調達摩擦の非対称性: 内部Unslothパイロットを持つ企業はコンシューマーGPUで既にVRAM 70%削減の経済性を得ているが、エンタープライズのセキュリティ + ガバナンス要件にはマネージド・コントロールプレーンが必要であり、オープンソースCLIではこれを提供できない。最初に出荷したハイパースケーラーが移行需要を吸収する。Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AIはいずれもランタイム基盤を持っており、欠けているピースは、オープンソースカーネル性能とマネージドIAMエンタープライズガバナンスを統合するファインチューニング・アズ・ア・サービスのサーフェスである。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el H2 2026 la ola de updates Unsloth 2026 — entrenamiento MoE 12x más rápido + Reinforcement Learning con contexto ultra-largo + entrenamiento embedding / BERT / clasificador 1.8-3.3x más rápido con 20% menos VRAM y 2x más contexto (engineering conjunta con Hugging Face) + Unsloth Studio del 17 mar runtime 100%-offline GGUF + Safetensors + guía de fine-tuning NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage (rendimiento RTX-laptop sube 2.5x) — combinada con la ventaja de throughput 29% de SGLang en H100 (prefix-cache RadixAttention compartida con vLLM a ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + soporte day-0 SGLang para MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + la ola arxiv del 28 abril-3 mayo sobre KV-cache (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) hace al entrenamiento con GPU consumer operativamente equivalente al baseline 2024 con GPU empresarial; se espera que ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, o Google Vertex AI) entregue un tier managed Unsloth-as-a-service con runtime managed + IAM + audit + pool GPU optimizado en costo para cerrar la brecha consumer-GPU → enterprise-fine-tuning antes de los ciclos AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite.** La función forzante es la asimetría procurement-friction: las empresas con pilotos internos de Unsloth ya ven economía de reducción 70% VRAM en GPUs consumer, pero la seguridad + governance empresarial demandan un plano de control managed que el CLI open-source no provee; el hyperscaler que entregue primero absorbe la migración. Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI tienen todos el sustrato runtime; la pieza faltante es la superficie fine-tuning-as-a-service que unifique el rendimiento del kernel open-source con la governance empresarial managed-IAM.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Pagsapit ng H2 2026 ang Unsloth 2026 update wave — 12x na mas mabilis na MoE training + ultra-long-context Reinforcement Learning + 1.8-3.3x na mas mabilis na embedding / BERT / classifier training na may 20% mas kaunting VRAM at 2x mas mahabang context (joint Hugging Face engineering) + Unsloth Studio Mar 17 100%-offline GGUF + Safetensors runtime + NVIDIA DGX Spark RTX-AI Garage fine-tuning guide (RTX-laptop performance umangat 2.5x) — kasama ang SGLang 29% throughput advantage sa H100 (RadixAttention prefix-cache shared sa vLLM sa ~16,200 vs ~12,500 tok/s) + day-0 SGLang support para sa MiMo-V2-Flash, Nemotron 3 Nano, Mistral Large 3, LLaDA 2.0 Diffusion, MiniMax M2 + ang Apr 28-May 3 KV-cache arxiv wave (SideQuest, DepthKV, KVFundaBench) ay ginagawa ang consumer-GPU training na operationally equivalent sa enterprise-GPU 2024-baseline; inaasahang ≥1 hyperscaler (AWS Bedrock fine-tuning, Azure AI Foundry, o Google Vertex AI) ay maglalabas ng managed Unsloth-as-a-service tier na may managed-runtime + IAM + audit + cost-optimized GPU pool upang isara ang consumer-GPU → enterprise-fine-tuning gap bago ang AWS re:Invent / Microsoft Ignite cycles.** Ang forcing function ay ang procurement-friction asymmetry: ang mga enterprise na may internal Unsloth pilots ay nakikita na ang 70%-VRAM-reduction economics sa consumer GPUs, ngunit ang enterprise security + governance ay humihingi ng managed control plane na hindi ibinibigay ng open-source CLI; alinmang hyperscaler ang unang maglabas ang aabsorb sa migration. Ang Microsoft Foundry Agent Framework + AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime + Google Vertex AI ay parehong may runtime substrate; ang nawawalang piraso ay ang fine-tuning-as-a-service surface na nagbubuklod sa open-source kernel performance sa managed-IAM enterprise governance.

nodes.label: GGUF supply chains are the new battleground.
nodes.short_label: GGUF supply chains are the new battleground.
nodes.description: **GGUF supply chains are the new battleground.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (Jinja2 SSTI through GGUF, RCE) makes visible the fact that "model files themselves are carriers of executable code." By Q3 2026, Hugging Face / Ollama Library / ModelScope will require model-card + chat_template signature verification or sandboxed execution as a baseline; Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM will enable SSTI scanning by default at GGUF load time.

description.en: **GGUF supply chains are the new battleground.** SGLang CVE-2026-5760 (Jinja2 SSTI through GGUF, RCE) makes visible the fact that "model files themselves are carriers of executable code." By Q3 2026, Hugging Face / Ollama Library / ModelScope will require model-card + chat_template signature verification or sandboxed execution as a baseline; Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM will enable SSTI scanning by default at GGUF load time.
description.ja: **「GGUF 供給経路」がサプライチェーン攻撃の新しい主戦場** — SGLang CVE-2026-5760（GGUF 経由の Jinja2 SSTI で RCE）は「モデルファイル自体が実行可能コードのキャリア」である現実を可視化した。2026 Q3 までに Hugging Face / Ollama Library / ModelScope は **モデルカード + chat_template の署名検証／サンドボックス実行** を標準要件化し、Foundry Local / Bedrock / vLLM も GGUF ロード時に SSTI スキャンをデフォルト有効化する。

nodes.title: Frontier cyber-AI models become US export-control category by Q3 2026
nodes.description: **By Q3 2026 the Apr 7 Anthropic Mythos Preview launch under Project Glasswing (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) + the Apr 30 Bloomberg-disclosed NSA Project Aether benchmarking Mythos against classified sovereign cyber tools + the May 1 Pentagon CTO statement separating the Anthropic blacklist from the NSA Mythos engagement creates the regulatory-pull for the US to formally define a frontier cyber-capability AI export-control category — at least one government issuance (BIS Commerce Department export-control rule under Cat 5 part 2 dual-use cryptography or a parallel cyber-capability category, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, or White House executive order) explicitly names frontier cyber-AI as a license-required category; at least two other foundation labs (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, or Cohere) ship a comparable gated-distribution program with public partner-list disclosure mirroring the Glasswing pattern.** Forcing function is the asymmetry the Aether disclosure surfaces: the same model the Pentagon refused to procure is the one the NSA depends on for sovereign cyber benchmarking, which makes it impossible for the executive branch to leave the regulatory category undefined; the Apr 29 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) provide the disclosure-side regulatory infrastructure. The path of least resistance is BIS issuing a rule under Cat 5 because it has 30 years of dual-use-tech precedent and avoids carving up the full FDA-style approval regime that would slow open-source agent skills.

description.en: **By Q3 2026 the Apr 7 Anthropic Mythos Preview launch under Project Glasswing (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) + the Apr 30 Bloomberg-disclosed NSA Project Aether benchmarking Mythos against classified sovereign cyber tools + the May 1 Pentagon CTO statement separating the Anthropic blacklist from the NSA Mythos engagement creates the regulatory-pull for the US to formally define a frontier cyber-capability AI export-control category — at least one government issuance (BIS Commerce Department export-control rule under Cat 5 part 2 dual-use cryptography or a parallel cyber-capability category, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, or White House executive order) explicitly names frontier cyber-AI as a license-required category; at least two other foundation labs (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, or Cohere) ship a comparable gated-distribution program with public partner-list disclosure mirroring the Glasswing pattern.** Forcing function is the asymmetry the Aether disclosure surfaces: the same model the Pentagon refused to procure is the one the NSA depends on for sovereign cyber benchmarking, which makes it impossible for the executive branch to leave the regulatory category undefined; the Apr 29 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) provide the disclosure-side regulatory infrastructure. The path of least resistance is BIS issuing a rule under Cat 5 because it has 30 years of dual-use-tech precedent and avoids carving up the full FDA-style approval regime that would slow open-source agent skills.
description.ja: **2026年第3四半期までに、4月7日 Anthropic Mythos Preview のローンチ(Project Glasswing 下、~50ローンチパートナー + クリティカル・ソフトウェア・インフラ ~40組織 + $100M 利用クレジット + $4M オープンソース・セキュリティ寄付)+ 4月30日 Bloomberg 開示の NSA Project Aether(Mythos を機密ソブリン・サイバー・ツール対比ベンチマーク)+ 5月1日 Pentagon CTO 声明(Anthropic ブラックリストと NSA Mythos 関与の分離)が、米国がフロンティア・サイバー能力 AI 輸出管理カテゴリを正式に定義する規制プルを生む。少なくとも1件の政府発布(BIS 商務省輸出管理規則 Cat 5 part 2 デュアルユース暗号またはサイバー能力並行カテゴリ、NIST AI Cyber Center RFI フォローアップ、または White House 大統領令)が、フロンティア・サイバー AI を免許要件カテゴリとして明示。少なくとも他の2つの基礎モデル研究所(OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, Cohere)が、Glasswing パターンをミラーする公開パートナーリスト開示を伴う同等のゲート付き配布プログラムを出荷する。** 強制要因は Aether 開示が浮き彫りにする非対称性。Pentagon が調達を拒否したまさにそのモデルが、NSA がソブリン・サイバー・ベンチマークで依存しているモデルである — 行政府が規制カテゴリを未定義のまま残すことを不可能にする。4月29日 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA 権限 + ATT&CK v19 名前付き手法(MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse)が開示側の規制インフラを提供。最小抵抗線は BIS が Cat 5 で規則を発布することで、30年のデュアルユース技術前例を持ち、オープンソース・エージェント・スキルを遅滞させる FDA 型認証体制全体を切り分けることを避けられる。
description.es: **Para el Q3 2026 el lanzamiento Anthropic Mythos Preview del 7 abril bajo Project Glasswing (~50 socios fundadores + ~40 organizaciones de infraestructura crítica de software + $100M créditos de uso + $4M donaciones de seguridad open-source) + el NSA Project Aether revelado por Bloomberg el 30 abril (Mythos vs herramientas cyber soberanas clasificadas) + la declaración Pentagon CTO del 1 mayo separando la lista negra de Anthropic del compromiso NSA Mythos crea el regulatory-pull para que EE. UU. defina formalmente una categoría export-control de AI de capacidad cyber-frontera — al menos una emisión gubernamental (regla export-control BIS Departamento de Comercio bajo Cat 5 part 2 cripto dual-use o categoría paralela de capacidad cyber, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, u orden ejecutiva White House) explícitamente nombra cyber-AI de frontera como categoría que requiere licencia; al menos otros dos laboratorios fundacionales (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, o Cohere) entregan un programa comparable de distribución gated con divulgación pública de lista de socios reflejando el patrón Glasswing.** La función forzante es la asimetría que la divulgación Aether expone: el mismo modelo que el Pentágono rehusó adquirir es el que la NSA depende para benchmarking cyber soberano, lo que hace imposible que el ejecutivo deje la categoría regulatoria indefinida; la autoridad MITRE-CNA CSAI Foundation del 29 abril + técnicas nombradas ATT&CK v19 (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) proveen la infraestructura regulatoria del lado de divulgación. El camino de menor resistencia es BIS emitiendo una regla bajo Cat 5 porque tiene 30 años de precedente dual-use-tech y evita tallar el régimen completo de aprobación tipo FDA que ralentizaría agent skills open-source.
description.fil: **By Q3 2026 ang Apr 7 Anthropic Mythos Preview launch sa ilalim ng Project Glasswing (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) + ang Apr 30 Bloomberg-disclosed NSA Project Aether benchmarking ng Mythos laban sa classified sovereign cyber tools + ang May 1 Pentagon CTO statement na nag-separate sa Anthropic blacklist mula sa NSA Mythos engagement ay lumilikha ng regulatory-pull para sa US na formally mag-define ng frontier cyber-capability AI export-control category — at least isang government issuance (BIS Commerce Department export-control rule sa ilalim ng Cat 5 part 2 dual-use cryptography o parallel cyber-capability category, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, o White House executive order) ay explicitly nag-name ng frontier cyber-AI bilang license-required category; at least dalawa pang foundation labs (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, o Cohere) ay mag-shi-ship ng comparable gated-distribution program na may public partner-list disclosure na nag-mirror sa Glasswing pattern.** Ang forcing function ay ang asymmetry na ipinakikita ng Aether disclosure: ang same model na tinanggihan ng Pentagon na i-procure ay ang same model na inaasahan ng NSA para sa sovereign cyber benchmarking, na nagpapagawa ng impossible para sa executive branch na iwanan ang regulatory category na undefined; ang Apr 29 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) ay nagbibigay ng disclosure-side regulatory infrastructure. Ang path of least resistance ay BIS na mag-issue ng rule sa ilalim ng Cat 5 dahil mayroon itong 30 years of dual-use-tech precedent at iniiwasan ang pag-carve up ng full FDA-style approval regime na magpapabagal sa open-source agent skills.

The path of least resistance is BIS issuing a rule under Cat 5 because it has 30 years of dual-use-tech precedent and avoids carving up the full FDA-style approval regime that would slow open-source agent skills.

reasoning.because: Apr 30 NSA Project Aether benchmarks Mythos Preview against sovereign cyber tools; Pentagon CTO May 1 separates blacklist from Mythos
reasoning.given: Anthropic's Project Glasswing 50-org-restricted release + $100M credits sets the operative gated-distribution precedent for "too-dangerous-to-publish" frontier models
reasoning.so_that: ≥1 US government issuance (BIS export-control rule / NIST AI Cyber RFI / executive order) explicitly carves out frontier cyber-capability AI models as a license-required category
reasoning.landing: by Q3 2026; BIS or NIST or White House + ≥2 frontier labs publish parallel gated-distribution programs
reasoning.eli14: When the NSA started borrowing Anthropic's most powerful AI to find Microsoft bugs, the US government had to start regulating who else can borrow it.

because.en: Apr 30 NSA Project Aether benchmarks Mythos Preview against sovereign cyber tools; Pentagon CTO May 1 separates blacklist from Mythos

because.es: NSA Project Aether 30 abril compara Mythos Preview contra herramientas soberanas; Pentagon CTO 1 mayo separa lista negra de Mythos
because.fil: Apr 30 NSA Project Aether ay nag-benchmark ng Mythos Preview laban sa sovereign cyber tools; Pentagon CTO May 1 ay nag-separate ng blacklist mula sa Mythos

given.en: Anthropic's Project Glasswing 50-org-restricted release + $100M credits sets the operative gated-distribution precedent for "too-dangerous-to-publish" frontier models
given.ja: Anthropic の Project Glasswing 50組織限定リリース + $100M クレジットが「公開するには危険すぎる」フロンティアモデルのゲート付き配布の運用前例を設定
given.es: el lanzamiento restringido a 50 organizaciones de Project Glasswing de Anthropic + $100M en créditos sienta el precedente operativo de distribución gated para modelos frontera "demasiado peligrosos para publicar"
given.fil: ang Anthropic's Project Glasswing 50-org-restricted release + $100M credits ay nag-set ng operative gated-distribution precedent para sa "too-dangerous-to-publish" frontier models

so_that.en: ≥1 US government issuance (BIS export-control rule / NIST AI Cyber RFI / executive order) explicitly carves out frontier cyber-capability AI models as a license-required category
so_that.ja: ≥1 米政府発布(BIS 輸出管理規則 / NIST AI Cyber RFI / 大統領令)がフロンティア・サイバー能力 AI モデルを免許要件カテゴリとして明示
so_that.es: ≥1 emisión del gobierno de EE. UU. (regla export-control BIS / NIST AI Cyber RFI / orden ejecutiva) explícitamente designa modelos AI de capacidad cyber-frontera como categoría que requiere licencia
so_that.fil: ≥1 US government issuance (BIS export-control rule / NIST AI Cyber RFI / executive order) ay explicitly nag-carve out ng frontier cyber-capability AI models bilang license-required category

landing.en: by Q3 2026; BIS or NIST or White House + ≥2 frontier labs publish parallel gated-distribution programs
landing.ja: by Q3 2026; BIS または NIST または White House + ≥2 フロンティア研究所が並行ゲート付き配布プログラムを公表
landing.es: by Q3 2026; BIS o NIST o White House + ≥2 laboratorios de frontera publican programas paralelos de distribución gated
landing.fil: by Q3 2026; BIS o NIST o White House + ≥2 frontier labs ay magpa-publish ng parallel gated-distribution programs

eli14.en: When the NSA started borrowing Anthropic's most powerful AI to find Microsoft bugs, the US government had to start regulating who else can borrow it.
eli14.ja: NSA が Anthropic の最強 AI を借りて Microsoft のバグ探しを始めた以上、米政府は他に誰が借りられるかの規制を始めざるを得ない。
eli14.es: Cuando la NSA empezó a tomar prestado el AI más poderoso de Anthropic para encontrar bugs en Microsoft, EE. UU. tuvo que empezar a regular quién más puede tomarlo prestado.
eli14.fil: Nang sinimulan ng NSA na manghiram ng pinakamakapangyarihang AI ng Anthropic para hanapin ang Microsoft bugs, kinailangang simulan ng US government na mag-regulate kung sino pang ibang puwedeng manghiram nito.

title_locales.en: Frontier cyber-AI models become US export-control category by Q3 2026

detail.summary_short: NSA's Project Aether benchmarking Mythos Preview against classified cyber tools forces the US to define a license-required category for frontier cyber-capability AI. By Q3 2026 BIS or NIST publishes the rule and ≥2 other labs ship comparable gated-distribution programs.

summary_short_locales.en: NSA's Project Aether benchmarking Mythos Preview against classified cyber tools forces the US to define a license-required category for frontier cyber-capability AI. By Q3 2026 BIS or NIST publishes the rule and ≥2 other labs ship comparable gated-distribution programs.
summary_short_locales.ja: NSA の Project Aether が Mythos Preview を機密サイバー・ツールと比較ベンチマークしたことで、米国はフロンティア・サイバー能力 AI のための免許要件カテゴリを定義せざるを得なくなる。Q3 2026までに BIS または NIST が規則を公開し、≥2 の他研究所が同等のゲート付き配布プログラムを出荷。
summary_short_locales.es: El benchmark Project Aether de NSA contra Mythos Preview vs herramientas cyber clasificadas fuerza a EE. UU. a definir una categoría que requiere licencia para AI de capacidad cyber-frontera. Para Q3 2026 BIS o NIST publica la regla y ≥2 otros laboratorios entregan programas comparables de distribución gated.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang NSA's Project Aether benchmarking ng Mythos Preview laban sa classified cyber tools ay nag-force sa US na mag-define ng license-required category para sa frontier cyber-capability AI. By Q3 2026, ang BIS o NIST ay magpa-publish ng rule at ≥2 ibang labs ay mag-shi-ship ng comparable gated-distribution programs.

bridges.text: Today's Anthropic Mythos disclosure carry + Pentagon 8-vendor exclusion of Anthropic + Anthropic May 4 $1.5B JV (structured-equity wrapper for sub-cyber commercial deployment) supports `because` (regulatory-pull for frontier cyber-AI export-control category builds + commercial-deployment tier separates). Reason: the JV is the operative tier-separation between cyber-capability (Glasswing-gated, not in JV) and enterprise-services (JV-wrapped, sub-cyber) because the bifurcation makes the export-control category easier for BIS to define. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: no BIS / NIST / EO issuance yet.

text_locales.en: Today's Anthropic Mythos disclosure carry + Pentagon 8-vendor exclusion of Anthropic + Anthropic May 4 $1.5B JV (structured-equity wrapper for sub-cyber commercial deployment) supports `because` (regulatory-pull for frontier cyber-AI export-control category builds + commercial-deployment tier separates). Reason: the JV is the operative tier-separation between cyber-capability (Glasswing-gated, not in JV) and enterprise-services (JV-wrapped, sub-cyber) because the bifurcation makes the export-control category easier for BIS to define. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: no BIS / NIST / EO issuance yet.
text_locales.ja: 本日の Anthropic Mythos 開示繰り越し + 国防総省 8社 Anthropic 除外 + Anthropic 5月4日 $1.5B JV（サブサイバー商用展開向け構造化エクイティ・ラッパー）は `because`（フロンティア・サイバー AI 輸出管理カテゴリ向けの規制プル構築 + 商用展開層分離）を支持する。理由: JV がサイバー能力（Glasswing ゲート付き、JV 内ではなし）とエンタープライズサービス（JV ラップ、サブサイバー）の運用上の層分離であり、二分化が BIS による輸出管理カテゴリ定義を容易にするため。Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: BIS / NIST / EO 発出はまだなし。
text_locales.es: Carry Anthropic Mythos disclosure de hoy + exclusión Pentágono 8-vendor de Anthropic + JV $1.5B Anthropic May 4 (wrapper structured-equity para sub-cyber commercial deployment) apoya `because` (regulatory-pull para categoría export-control frontier cyber-AI construye + tier commercial-deployment separa). Razón: el JV es la tier-separation operativa entre cyber-capability (Glasswing-gated, no en JV) y enterprise-services (JV-wrapped, sub-cyber) porque la bifurcación hace la categoría export-control más fácil de definir para BIS. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: aún sin emisión BIS / NIST / EO.
text_locales.fil: Today's Anthropic Mythos disclosure carry + Pentagon 8-vendor exclusion ng Anthropic + Anthropic May 4 $1.5B JV (structured-equity wrapper para sa sub-cyber commercial deployment) ay nag-su-suporta sa `because` (regulatory-pull para sa frontier cyber-AI export-control category ay nag-bu-build + commercial-deployment tier ay naghihiwalay). Reason: ang JV ay ang operative tier-separation sa pagitan ng cyber-capability (Glasswing-gated, hindi nasa JV) at enterprise-services (JV-wrapped, sub-cyber) because ang bifurcation ay nagpapadali sa export-control category para sa BIS na ma-define. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: walang BIS / NIST / EO issuance pa.

readings.cluster_narrative: Broad support across 2 clusters. Largest is 'Agent Control Plane' (2 of 4 items, accelerating). Multi-thread support is more robust than single-cluster concentration.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By Q3 2026 the Apr 7 Anthropic Mythos Preview launch under Project Glasswing (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) + the Apr 30 Bloomberg-disclosed NSA Project Aether benchmarking Mythos against classified sovereign cyber tools + the May 1 Pentagon CTO statement separating the Anthropic blacklist from the NSA Mythos engagement creates the regulatory-pull for the US to formally define a frontier cyber-capability AI export-control category — at least one government issuance (BIS Commerce Department export-control rule under Cat 5 part 2 dual-use cryptography or a parallel cyber-capability category, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, or White House executive order) explicitly names frontier cyber-AI as a license-required category; at least two other foundation labs (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, or Cohere) ship a comparable gated-distribution program with public partner-list disclosure mirroring the Glasswing pattern.** Forcing function is the asymmetry the Aether disclosure surfaces: the same model the Pentagon refused to procure is the one the NSA depends on for sovereign cyber benchmarking, which makes it impossible for the executive branch to leave the regulatory category undefined; the Apr 29 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) provide the disclosure-side regulatory infrastructure. The path of least resistance is BIS issuing a rule under Cat 5 because it has 30 years of dual-use-tech precedent and avoids carving up the full FDA-style approval regime that would slow open-source agent skills.
detail.prediction_summary: **By Q3 2026 the Apr 7 Anthropic Mythos Preview launch under Project Glasswing (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) + the Apr 30 Bloomberg-disclosed NSA Project Aether benchmarking Mythos against classified sovereign cyber tools + the May 1 Pentagon CTO statement separating the Anthropic blacklist from the NSA Mythos engagement creates the regulatory-pull for the US to formally define a frontier cyber-capability AI export-control category — at least one government issuance (BIS Commerce Department export-control rule under Cat 5 part 2 dual-use cryptography or a parallel cyber-capability category, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, or White House executive order) explicitly names frontier cyber-AI as a license-required category; at least two other foundation labs (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, or Cohere) ship a comparable gated-distribution program with public partner-list disclosure mirroring the Glasswing pattern.** Forcing function is the asymmetry the Aether disclosure surfaces: the same model the Pentagon refused to procure is the one the NSA depends on for sovereign cyber benchmarking, which makes it impossible for the executive branch to leave the regulatory category undefined; the Apr 29 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) provide the disclosure-side regulatory infrastructure. The path of least resistance is BIS issuing a rule under Cat 5 because it has 30 years of dual-use-tech precedent and avoids carving up the full FDA-style approval regime that would slow open-source agent skills.

prediction_summary_locales.en: **By Q3 2026 the Apr 7 Anthropic Mythos Preview launch under Project Glasswing (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) + the Apr 30 Bloomberg-disclosed NSA Project Aether benchmarking Mythos against classified sovereign cyber tools + the May 1 Pentagon CTO statement separating the Anthropic blacklist from the NSA Mythos engagement creates the regulatory-pull for the US to formally define a frontier cyber-capability AI export-control category — at least one government issuance (BIS Commerce Department export-control rule under Cat 5 part 2 dual-use cryptography or a parallel cyber-capability category, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, or White House executive order) explicitly names frontier cyber-AI as a license-required category; at least two other foundation labs (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, or Cohere) ship a comparable gated-distribution program with public partner-list disclosure mirroring the Glasswing pattern.** Forcing function is the asymmetry the Aether disclosure surfaces: the same model the Pentagon refused to procure is the one the NSA depends on for sovereign cyber benchmarking, which makes it impossible for the executive branch to leave the regulatory category undefined; the Apr 29 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) provide the disclosure-side regulatory infrastructure. The path of least resistance is BIS issuing a rule under Cat 5 because it has 30 years of dual-use-tech precedent and avoids carving up the full FDA-style approval regime that would slow open-source agent skills.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年第3四半期までに、4月7日 Anthropic Mythos Preview のローンチ(Project Glasswing 下、~50ローンチパートナー + クリティカル・ソフトウェア・インフラ ~40組織 + $100M 利用クレジット + $4M オープンソース・セキュリティ寄付)+ 4月30日 Bloomberg 開示の NSA Project Aether(Mythos を機密ソブリン・サイバー・ツール対比ベンチマーク)+ 5月1日 Pentagon CTO 声明(Anthropic ブラックリストと NSA Mythos 関与の分離)が、米国がフロンティア・サイバー能力 AI 輸出管理カテゴリを正式に定義する規制プルを生む。少なくとも1件の政府発布(BIS 商務省輸出管理規則 Cat 5 part 2 デュアルユース暗号またはサイバー能力並行カテゴリ、NIST AI Cyber Center RFI フォローアップ、または White House 大統領令)が、フロンティア・サイバー AI を免許要件カテゴリとして明示。少なくとも他の2つの基礎モデル研究所(OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, Cohere)が、Glasswing パターンをミラーする公開パートナーリスト開示を伴う同等のゲート付き配布プログラムを出荷する。** 強制要因は Aether 開示が浮き彫りにする非対称性。Pentagon が調達を拒否したまさにそのモデルが、NSA がソブリン・サイバー・ベンチマークで依存しているモデルである — 行政府が規制カテゴリを未定義のまま残すことを不可能にする。4月29日 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA 権限 + ATT&CK v19 名前付き手法(MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse)が開示側の規制インフラを提供。最小抵抗線は BIS が Cat 5 で規則を発布することで、30年のデュアルユース技術前例を持ち、オープンソース・エージェント・スキルを遅滞させる FDA 型認証体制全体を切り分けることを避けられる。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el Q3 2026 el lanzamiento Anthropic Mythos Preview del 7 abril bajo Project Glasswing (~50 socios fundadores + ~40 organizaciones de infraestructura crítica de software + $100M créditos de uso + $4M donaciones de seguridad open-source) + el NSA Project Aether revelado por Bloomberg el 30 abril (Mythos vs herramientas cyber soberanas clasificadas) + la declaración Pentagon CTO del 1 mayo separando la lista negra de Anthropic del compromiso NSA Mythos crea el regulatory-pull para que EE. UU. defina formalmente una categoría export-control de AI de capacidad cyber-frontera — al menos una emisión gubernamental (regla export-control BIS Departamento de Comercio bajo Cat 5 part 2 cripto dual-use o categoría paralela de capacidad cyber, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, u orden ejecutiva White House) explícitamente nombra cyber-AI de frontera como categoría que requiere licencia; al menos otros dos laboratorios fundacionales (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, o Cohere) entregan un programa comparable de distribución gated con divulgación pública de lista de socios reflejando el patrón Glasswing.** La función forzante es la asimetría que la divulgación Aether expone: el mismo modelo que el Pentágono rehusó adquirir es el que la NSA depende para benchmarking cyber soberano, lo que hace imposible que el ejecutivo deje la categoría regulatoria indefinida; la autoridad MITRE-CNA CSAI Foundation del 29 abril + técnicas nombradas ATT&CK v19 (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) proveen la infraestructura regulatoria del lado de divulgación. El camino de menor resistencia es BIS emitiendo una regla bajo Cat 5 porque tiene 30 años de precedente dual-use-tech y evita tallar el régimen completo de aprobación tipo FDA que ralentizaría agent skills open-source.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **By Q3 2026 ang Apr 7 Anthropic Mythos Preview launch sa ilalim ng Project Glasswing (~50 launch partners + ~40 critical-software-infrastructure orgs + $100M usage credits + $4M open-source security donations) + ang Apr 30 Bloomberg-disclosed NSA Project Aether benchmarking ng Mythos laban sa classified sovereign cyber tools + ang May 1 Pentagon CTO statement na nag-separate sa Anthropic blacklist mula sa NSA Mythos engagement ay lumilikha ng regulatory-pull para sa US na formally mag-define ng frontier cyber-capability AI export-control category — at least isang government issuance (BIS Commerce Department export-control rule sa ilalim ng Cat 5 part 2 dual-use cryptography o parallel cyber-capability category, NIST AI Cyber Center RFI follow-up, o White House executive order) ay explicitly nag-name ng frontier cyber-AI bilang license-required category; at least dalawa pang foundation labs (OpenAI, Google DeepMind, xAI, Mistral, o Cohere) ay mag-shi-ship ng comparable gated-distribution program na may public partner-list disclosure na nag-mirror sa Glasswing pattern.** Ang forcing function ay ang asymmetry na ipinakikita ng Aether disclosure: ang same model na tinanggihan ng Pentagon na i-procure ay ang same model na inaasahan ng NSA para sa sovereign cyber benchmarking, na nagpapagawa ng impossible para sa executive branch na iwanan ang regulatory category na undefined; ang Apr 29 CSAI Foundation MITRE-CNA authority + ATT&CK v19 named-techniques (MCP server compromise, tool invocation abuse) ay nagbibigay ng disclosure-side regulatory infrastructure. Ang path of least resistance ay BIS na mag-issue ng rule sa ilalim ng Cat 5 dahil mayroon itong 30 years of dual-use-tech precedent at iniiwasan ang pag-carve up ng full FDA-style approval regime na magpapabagal sa open-source agent skills.

nodes.label: 1-bit native training becomes the dominant alternative to post-hoc quantization.
nodes.short_label: 1-bit native training becomes the dominant alternative to post-hoc quantization.
nodes.description: **1-bit native training becomes the dominant alternative to post-hoc quantization.** Bonsai 8B demonstrates production-quality output at 1.15 GB. Designing for 1-bit from training, rather than 4/8-bit post-quantization, will become the standard for edge LLMs. Expect 1-bit derivatives of the Qwen and Llama families to follow within the next quarter.

nodes.label: Proprietary re-expansion against an open-weight geopolitical split.
nodes.short_label: Proprietary re-expansion against an open-weight geopolitical split.
nodes.description: **Proprietary re-expansion against an open-weight geopolitical split.** Qwen3.6-Max-Preview's "proprietary, API-only" pivot, alongside Anthropic's staged gating of Mythos Preview, makes Q3 2026 the moment **"strongest model = closed weights"** crystallizes. Open weights, meanwhile, concentrate on the 35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llama lines for production, formalizing the line: local for utility, cloud for the frontier.

description.ja: **プロプライエタリ再膨張とオープンウェイトの地政学分断** — Qwen3.6-Max-Preview が「プロプライエタリのまま API のみ公開」に舵を切った点、Anthropic も Mythos Preview で段階ゲーティング化した点から、2026 Q3 には**「最強モデル＝非オープンウェイト」が明確化**。一方、オープンウェイトは 35B-A3B / Bonsai / Llama 系に最適化が集中し、ローカル = 実用帯、クラウド = フロンティアという線引きが制度化される。

nodes.label: The "1M context as default" open-weight era arrives in full by Q3 2026.
nodes.short_label: The "1M context as default" open-weight era arrives in full by Q3 2026.
nodes.description: **The "1M context as default" open-weight era arrives in full by Q3 2026.** DeepSeek V4's "1M context designed in, not bolted on," Qwen3.6-27B's 262K → 1M extension, Claude Opus 4.7's 1M context (Bedrock), and GPT-5.5's long-context strengthening all point the same direction. By Q3 2026, "native 1M context" becomes the floor for open weights, and existing 32K-128K models drop to legacy. RAG pipelines flip from "search → context-insert" to "dump everything in + dynamic prune," and vector DB vendors are pushed to redefine themselves as "long-context cache optimization layers."

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **The "1M context as default" open-weight era arrives in full by Q3 2026.** DeepSeek V4's "1M context designed in, not bolted on," Qwen3.6-27B's 262K → 1M extension, Claude Opus 4.7's 1M context (Bedrock), and GPT-5.5's long-context strengthening all point the same direction. By Q3 2026, "native 1M context" becomes the floor for open weights, and existing 32K-128K models drop to legacy. RAG pipelines flip from "search → context-insert" to "dump everything in + dynamic prune," and vector DB vendors are pushed to redefine themselves as "long-context cache optimization layers."
detail.prediction_summary: **The "1M context as default" open-weight era arrives in full by Q3 2026.** DeepSeek V4's "1M context designed in, not bolted on," Qwen3.6-27B's 262K → 1M extension, Claude Opus 4.7's 1M context (Bedrock), and GPT-5.5's long-context strengthening all point the same direction. prediction_summary_locales.ja: **「1M context が既定」のオープン重み時代に 2026 Q3 以降完全移行** — DeepSeek V4 の「1M context をボルトオンではなくゼロから設計」方針、Qwen3.6-27B の 262K→1M、Claude Opus 4.7 の 1M token context（Bedrock）、GPT-5.5 の長文脈強化は同じ方向。2026 Q3 までに「native 1M context」がオープン重みの最低ラインとなり、32K-128K 止まりの既存モデルはレガシー扱いに転落。RAG パイプラインは「検索→コンテキスト挿入」から「全データをそのまま投入＋動的プルーニング」方式に主流シフトし、ベクトル DB ベンダは「長 context キャッシュ最適化層」として再定義を迫られる。

nodes.label: Physical AI as SaaS, and the "Robot-as-a-Service" infrastructure race.
nodes.short_label: Physical AI as SaaS, and the "Robot-as-a-Service" infrastructure race.
nodes.description: **Physical AI as SaaS, and the "Robot-as-a-Service" infrastructure race.** Neura × AWS, DEEPX × Hyundai, and the run of NVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmos partnerships all point the same way: **the training pipeline for robot-control models is consolidating in the cloud.** By Q3 2026, per-robot cloud-compute charges (training + sync sim + policy updates) become a standard line item in enterprise contracts. The robot itself commoditizes as a "moving compute endpoint," and manufacturers shift to **fleet-management software with recurring revenue.**

description.en: **Physical AI as SaaS, and the "Robot-as-a-Service" infrastructure race.** Neura × AWS, DEEPX × Hyundai, and the run of NVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmos partnerships all point the same way: **the training pipeline for robot-control models is consolidating in the cloud.** By Q3 2026, per-robot cloud-compute charges (training + sync sim + policy updates) become a standard line item in enterprise contracts. The robot itself commoditizes as a "moving compute endpoint," and manufacturers shift to **fleet-management software with recurring revenue.**
description.ja: **Physical AI の SaaS 化と「Robot-as-a-Service」基盤競争** — Neura × AWS、DEEPX × Hyundai、NVIDIA Isaac GR00T / Cosmos の相次ぐ提携は、**ロボット制御モデルの訓練パイプラインがクラウド側に集約** される方向性を示す。2026 Q3 にはロボット 1 台あたりのクラウド計算課金（訓練 + 同期シミュ + ポリシ更新）がエンタープライズ契約の既定項目となり、ロボット本体は「動くコンピュート終端」として商品コモディティ化、メーカは **フリート管理ソフトウェアの経常収益** へシフトする。

nodes.label: Physical AI 8-hour production runs" become an enterprise procurement requirement in H2 2026.
nodes.short_label: Physical AI 8-hour production runs" become an enterprise procurement requirement in H2 2026.
nodes.description: **"Physical AI 8-hour production runs" become an enterprise procurement requirement in H2 2026.** Siemens-Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha's **8 hours / 90% success / 60 totes/hour** at Erlangen — on the production line, not a demo — is a clear graduation point from "humanoid = PoC." By Q4 2026, big-manufacturer RFPs (VW / Bosch / Mercedes / Foxconn / TSMC / Toyota) will fold "24h continuous operation," "1-week MTBF," "90%+ autonomous completion rate," and "MES / PLC integration" into de facto cuts. The competitive axis for Physical AI shifts entirely from "good-looking demo videos" to "ease of insertion into existing OT environments."

description.en: **"Physical AI 8-hour production runs" become an enterprise procurement requirement in H2 2026.** Siemens-Humanoid HMND 01 Alpha's **8 hours / 90% success / 60 totes/hour** at Erlangen — on the production line, not a demo — is a clear graduation point from "humanoid = PoC." By Q4 2026, big-manufacturer RFPs (VW / Bosch / Mercedes / Foxconn / TSMC / Toyota) will fold "24h continuous operation," "1-week MTBF," "90%+ autonomous completion rate," and "MES / PLC integration" into de facto cuts. nodes.description: **"Physical AI production-line records become league tables at IROS / GTC 2026" starts H2 2026.** With Siemens Erlangen's **HMND 01 Alpha** (60 tote/h × 8h × 90%+), BMW Spartanburg's **Figure 02** (10 months / 30,000 vehicles / 90,000 parts), BMW Leipzig's **AEON** (Apr 2026 trial → summer pilot), and GXO's **Digit** (100K+ totes) all hit the same window — and Hannover Messe 2026 making Physical AI its first central theme — the industry's evaluation criterion is shifting from "vendor-claimed demos" to **"OEM-adopted production records."** In H2 2026 at **IROS (October)** and **GTC Fall 2026**, league tables for "OEM adoption count × continuous-operation hours × parts handled × MTBF" begin, with Apptronik Apollo / Agility Digit / Figure 03 / Humanoid HMND 01 / Hexagon AEON's top five at the top. The 30+ companies still stuck in PoC phase get pushed into Q4 2026 funding shortfalls / acquisitions / exits.
