bridges.text: Today's Apptronik exec-hire wave + Figure 03 1/hour autonomous overnight runs + Tesla / Boston Dynamics / SoftBank Roze trajectory supports the prediction's `landing` component (production-line records as the eval primitive). Reason: third-mover commercial deployment is now visible across four vendors and OEM-adopted records are emerging. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: no IROS / GTC league-table publication formalizing the eval criterion yet.

text_locales.en: Today's Apptronik exec-hire wave + Figure 03 1/hour autonomous overnight runs + Tesla / Boston Dynamics / SoftBank Roze trajectory supports the prediction's `landing` component (production-line records as the eval primitive). Reason: third-mover commercial deployment is now visible across four vendors and OEM-adopted records are emerging. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: no IROS / GTC league-table publication formalizing the eval criterion yet.
text_locales.ja: 本日のApptronik幹部採用波 + Figure 03 1/hour 自律夜間運用 + Tesla / Boston Dynamics / SoftBank Roze 軌跡が予測の `landing` コンポーネント(評価プリミティブとしての生産ライン記録)を支持。Reason: 第3走者の商業展開が4ベンダーで可視化、OEM採用記録が登場し始めた。Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: 評価基準を制度化するIROS / GTCリーグテーブルの公表は未だ。
text_locales.es: La ola de contrataciones ejecutivas de Apptronik + Figure 03 1/hora con runs autónomos nocturnos + la trayectoria Tesla / Boston Dynamics / SoftBank Roze de hoy apoyan el componente `landing` de la predicción (registros de línea de producción como primitiva de evaluación). Reason: el despliegue comercial de tercer entrante ahora es visible en cuatro proveedores y los récords adoptados por OEM están emergiendo. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: ninguna publicación de tabla de liga IROS / GTC formalizando el criterio de evaluación todavía.
text_locales.fil: Ang Apptronik exec-hire wave + Figure 03 1/oras autonomous overnight runs + Tesla / Boston Dynamics / SoftBank Roze trajectory ngayon ay sumusuporta sa `landing` component (production-line records bilang eval primitive). Reason: third-mover commercial deployment ay visible na sa apat na vendors, at OEM-adopted records ay lumalabas na. Coherence 4/5. Remaining gap: walang IROS / GTC league-table publication na nag-formalize sa eval criterion.

nodes.short_label: Mag-7 physical-AI capex segments split out in a 10-Q footnote by H2 2026
nodes.title: Mag-7 physical-AI capex segments split out in a 10-Q footnote by H2 2026
nodes.description: **By H2 2026 the Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus production-line build-out (legacy Model S + Model X lines being phased out for a 1M-units/year first-generation robotics plant; Optimus 3 launches summer 2026 at $20K-$30K with hundreds of units in 2026 ramping to thousands then tens of thousands by 2027-2028) + the Apr 28 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo manufacturing partnership + Figure 03 production at 1/hour with overnight fully-autonomous runs + Tesla CFO commentary on capex-allocation between EV and robotics tape will force at least one Mag-7 (Tesla initially; ≥1 sibling — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) to publish physical-AI capex as a separate segment or footnote in a 10-Q ahead of any SEC mandate, mirroring how cloud-segment disclosure was first published voluntarily in 2014-2015 before the SEC formalized it.** Forcing function is the disclosure-precedent expansion: cloud capex segmentation became standard once the dollar amounts crossed a buyside-attention threshold; physical-AI capex at Tesla's 1M-units/year nameplate (~$25B-$35B annualized at the price target) crosses that threshold in a single facility, layered on Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics commercial deployment trajectory. The Q2 production-line build-out plus the Optimus 3 summer launch mean Tesla 10-Q for the period ending Sept 30 2026 is the natural first disclosure venue; competitive pressure from a single Tesla footnote disclosure will pull in a sibling Mag-7 disclosure within one or two filing cycles.

description.en: **By H2 2026 the Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus production-line build-out (legacy Model S + Model X lines being phased out for a 1M-units/year first-generation robotics plant; Optimus 3 launches summer 2026 at $20K-$30K with hundreds of units in 2026 ramping to thousands then tens of thousands by 2027-2028) + the Apr 28 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo manufacturing partnership + Figure 03 production at 1/hour with overnight fully-autonomous runs + Tesla CFO commentary on capex-allocation between EV and robotics tape will force at least one Mag-7 (Tesla initially; ≥1 sibling — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) to publish physical-AI capex as a separate segment or footnote in a 10-Q ahead of any SEC mandate, mirroring how cloud-segment disclosure was first published voluntarily in 2014-2015 before the SEC formalized it.** Forcing function is the disclosure-precedent expansion: cloud capex segmentation became standard once the dollar amounts crossed a buyside-attention threshold; physical-AI capex at Tesla's 1M-units/year nameplate (~$25B-$35B annualized at the price target) crosses that threshold in a single facility, layered on Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics commercial deployment trajectory. The Q2 production-line build-out plus the Optimus 3 summer launch mean Tesla 10-Q for the period ending Sept 30 2026 is the natural first disclosure venue; competitive pressure from a single Tesla footnote disclosure will pull in a sibling Mag-7 disclosure within one or two filing cycles.
description.ja: **2026年下半期までに、Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus 量産ライン構築(レガシー Model S + Model X ラインが段階的に廃止され、年100万台公称の第一世代ロボット工場へ; Optimus 3 が2026年夏に $20K-$30K でローンチ、本年は数百台、2027-2028年にかけて数千・数万台へ漸増)+ 4月28日 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo 製造パートナーシップ + Figure 03 毎時1台量産・夜間完全自律稼働 + Tesla CFO の EV-ロボティクス間設備投資配分コメンタリー相場が、少なくとも1社の Mag-7(Tesla を皮切りに; ≥1 兄弟 — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft)に SEC 義務化前に10-Q で physical-AI 設備投資を別個セグメントまたは脚注として公開させる。これは2014-2015年に SEC が形式化する前に自主公開されたクラウド・セグメント開示と同様のパターン。** 強制要因は開示前例の拡大。クラウド設備投資セグメンテーションは金額が買い手側注意閾値を越えた時点で標準となった。Tesla 年100万台公称(価格目標で年率 ~$25B-$35B)での physical-AI 設備投資は単一施設でその閾値を越え、Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics 商業展開軌道の上に重なる。Q2 量産ライン構築 + Optimus 3 夏ローンチが意味するのは、2026年9月30日終了期間 Tesla 10-Q が初の自然な開示舞台となること。単一の Tesla 脚注開示からの競争圧力で、1-2 件の決算サイクル以内に兄弟 Mag-7 開示が引き寄せられる。
description.es: **Para el H2 2026 la construcción línea de producción Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus (líneas heredadas Model S + Model X siendo eliminadas gradualmente para una planta de robótica de primera generación de capacidad nominal 1M-unidades/año; Optimus 3 lanza verano 2026 a $20K-$30K con cientos de unidades en 2026 aumentando a miles luego decenas de miles para 2027-2028) + el partnership manufactura Apollo Apptronik + Jabil del 28 abril + producción Figure 03 a 1/hora con corridas autónomas nocturnas + tape comentario CFO Tesla sobre asignación capex entre EV y robótica forzará a al menos un Mag-7 (Tesla inicialmente; ≥1 hermana — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) a publicar capex físico-AI como segmento separado o nota en 10-Q antes de cualquier mandato SEC, reflejando cómo divulgación de segmento cloud fue primero publicada voluntariamente en 2014-2015 antes de que la SEC lo formalizara.** La función forzante es la expansión de precedente de divulgación: segmentación capex cloud se volvió estándar una vez que las cantidades en dólares cruzaron un umbral de atención buyside; capex físico-AI a la capacidad nominal Tesla 1M-unidades/año (~$25B-$35B anualizado al precio target) cruza ese umbral en una sola facilidad, superpuesto a trayectoria despliegue comercial Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics. La construcción línea-producción Q2 más el lanzamiento Optimus 3 verano significan que Tesla 10-Q para el período terminando 30 sept 2026 es el venue natural de primera divulgación; presión competitiva desde una sola divulgación nota Tesla atraerá una divulgación Mag-7 hermana dentro de uno o dos ciclos de presentación.
description.fil: **By H2 2026 ang Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus production-line build-out (legacy Model S + Model X lines na unti-unting tinatanggal para sa 1M-units/year first-generation robotics plant; Optimus 3 ay mag-la-launch summer 2026 sa $20K-$30K na may daan-daang units sa 2026 na nag-ra-ramp up patungong libu-libo tapos sampu-sampung libo by 2027-2028) + ang Apr 28 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo manufacturing partnership + Figure 03 production sa 1/hour na may overnight fully-autonomous runs + Tesla CFO commentary sa capex-allocation sa pagitan ng EV at robotics tape ay magpi-pilit sa at least isang Mag-7 (Tesla initially; ≥1 sibling — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) na magpa-publish ng physical-AI capex bilang separate segment o footnote sa 10-Q bago ang anumang SEC mandate, mirroring kung paano ang cloud-segment disclosure ay unang pinupublish nang voluntarily noong 2014-2015 bago iyon na-formalize ng SEC.** Ang forcing function ay ang disclosure-precedent expansion: naging standard ang cloud capex segmentation sa sandaling lumampas ang dollar amounts sa buyside-attention threshold; ang physical-AI capex sa Tesla's 1M-units/year nameplate (~$25B-$35B annualized sa price target) ay lumampas sa threshold na iyon sa isang facility lamang, layered sa Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics commercial deployment trajectory. Ang Q2 production-line build-out plus ang Optimus 3 summer launch ay nangangahulugan na ang Tesla 10-Q para sa period ending Sept 30 2026 ang natural na first disclosure venue; competitive pressure mula sa isang Tesla footnote disclosure ay magha-hatak ng sibling Mag-7 disclosure sa loob ng isa o dalawang filing cycles.

The Q2 production-line build-out plus the Optimus 3 summer launch mean Tesla 10-Q for the period ending Sept 30 2026 is the natural first disclosure venue; competitive pressure from a single Tesla footnote disclosure will pull in a sibling Mag-7 disclosure within one or two filing cycles.

eli14.en: Tesla is spending big to make a million robots a year — soon Wall Street will demand to see those costs broken out separately.
eli14.ja: Tesla は年100万台のロボットを作るために大金を投じている — まもなくウォール街がそれを別個に開示せよと要求する。
eli14.es: Tesla está gastando mucho para hacer un millón de robots al año — pronto Wall Street exigirá ver esos costos desglosados.
eli14.fil: Gumagastos ang Tesla nang malaki para makagawa ng isang milyong robot kada taon — malapit nang hilingin ng Wall Street na makita iyong gastos nang hiwalay.

detail.subtitle: Prediction · Tech
detail.description: **By H2 2026 the Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus production-line build-out (legacy Model S + Model X lines being phased out for a 1M-units/year first-generation robotics plant; Optimus 3 launches summer 2026 at $20K-$30K with hundreds of units in 2026 ramping to thousands then tens of thousands by 2027-2028) + the Apr 28 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo manufacturing partnership + Figure 03 production at 1/hour with overnight fully-autonomous runs + Tesla CFO commentary on capex-allocation between EV and robotics tape will force at least one Mag-7 (Tesla initially; ≥1 sibling — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) to publish physical-AI capex as a separate segment or footnote in a 10-Q ahead of any SEC mandate, mirroring how cloud-segment disclosure was first published voluntarily in 2014-2015 before the SEC formalized it.** Forcing function is the disclosure-precedent expansion: cloud capex segmentation became standard once the dollar amounts crossed a buyside-attention threshold; physical-AI capex at Tesla's 1M-units/year nameplate (~$25B-$35B annualized at the price target) crosses that threshold in a single facility, layered on Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics commercial deployment trajectory. The Q2 production-line build-out plus the Optimus 3 summer launch mean Tesla 10-Q for the period ending Sept 30 2026 is the natural first disclosure venue; competitive pressure from a single Tesla footnote disclosure will pull in a sibling Mag-7 disclosure within one or two filing cycles.

The Q2 production-line build-out plus the Optimus 3 summer launch mean Tesla 10-Q for the period ending Sept 30 2026 is the natural first disclosure venue; competitive pressure from a single Tesla footnote disclosure will pull in a sibling Mag-7 disclosure within one or two filing cycles.

prediction_summary_locales.en: **By H2 2026 the Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus production-line build-out (legacy Model S + Model X lines being phased out for a 1M-units/year first-generation robotics plant; Optimus 3 launches summer 2026 at $20K-$30K with hundreds of units in 2026 ramping to thousands then tens of thousands by 2027-2028) + the Apr 28 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo manufacturing partnership + Figure 03 production at 1/hour with overnight fully-autonomous runs + Tesla CFO commentary on capex-allocation between EV and robotics tape will force at least one Mag-7 (Tesla initially; ≥1 sibling — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) to publish physical-AI capex as a separate segment or footnote in a 10-Q ahead of any SEC mandate, mirroring how cloud-segment disclosure was first published voluntarily in 2014-2015 before the SEC formalized it.** Forcing function is the disclosure-precedent expansion: cloud capex segmentation became standard once the dollar amounts crossed a buyside-attention threshold; physical-AI capex at Tesla's 1M-units/year nameplate (~$25B-$35B annualized at the price target) crosses that threshold in a single facility, layered on Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics commercial deployment trajectory. The Q2 production-line build-out plus the Optimus 3 summer launch mean Tesla 10-Q for the period ending Sept 30 2026 is the natural first disclosure venue; competitive pressure from a single Tesla footnote disclosure will pull in a sibling Mag-7 disclosure within one or two filing cycles.
prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年下半期までに、Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus 量産ライン構築(レガシー Model S + Model X ラインが段階的に廃止され、年100万台公称の第一世代ロボット工場へ; Optimus 3 が2026年夏に $20K-$30K でローンチ、本年は数百台、2027-2028年にかけて数千・数万台へ漸増)+ 4月28日 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo 製造パートナーシップ + Figure 03 毎時1台量産・夜間完全自律稼働 + Tesla CFO の EV-ロボティクス間設備投資配分コメンタリー相場が、少なくとも1社の Mag-7(Tesla を皮切りに; ≥1 兄弟 — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft)に SEC 義務化前に10-Q で physical-AI 設備投資を別個セグメントまたは脚注として公開させる。これは2014-2015年に SEC が形式化する前に自主公開されたクラウド・セグメント開示と同様のパターン。** 強制要因は開示前例の拡大。クラウド設備投資セグメンテーションは金額が買い手側注意閾値を越えた時点で標準となった。Tesla 年100万台公称(価格目標で年率 ~$25B-$35B)での physical-AI 設備投資は単一施設でその閾値を越え、Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics 商業展開軌道の上に重なる。Q2 量産ライン構築 + Optimus 3 夏ローンチが意味するのは、2026年9月30日終了期間 Tesla 10-Q が初の自然な開示舞台となること。単一の Tesla 脚注開示からの競争圧力で、1-2 件の決算サイクル以内に兄弟 Mag-7 開示が引き寄せられる。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el H2 2026 la construcción línea de producción Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus (líneas heredadas Model S + Model X siendo eliminadas gradualmente para una planta de robótica de primera generación de capacidad nominal 1M-unidades/año; Optimus 3 lanza verano 2026 a $20K-$30K con cientos de unidades en 2026 aumentando a miles luego decenas de miles para 2027-2028) + el partnership manufactura Apollo Apptronik + Jabil del 28 abril + producción Figure 03 a 1/hora con corridas autónomas nocturnas + tape comentario CFO Tesla sobre asignación capex entre EV y robótica forzará a al menos un Mag-7 (Tesla inicialmente; ≥1 hermana — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) a publicar capex físico-AI como segmento separado o nota en 10-Q antes de cualquier mandato SEC, reflejando cómo divulgación de segmento cloud fue primero publicada voluntariamente en 2014-2015 antes de que la SEC lo formalizara.** La función forzante es la expansión de precedente de divulgación: segmentación capex cloud se volvió estándar una vez que las cantidades en dólares cruzaron un umbral de atención buyside; capex físico-AI a la capacidad nominal Tesla 1M-unidades/año (~$25B-$35B anualizado al precio target) cruza ese umbral en una sola facilidad, superpuesto a trayectoria despliegue comercial Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics. La construcción línea-producción Q2 más el lanzamiento Optimus 3 verano significan que Tesla 10-Q para el período terminando 30 sept 2026 es el venue natural de primera divulgación; presión competitiva desde una sola divulgación nota Tesla atraerá una divulgación Mag-7 hermana dentro de uno o dos ciclos de presentación.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **By H2 2026 ang Tesla Q2 2026 Fremont Optimus production-line build-out (legacy Model S + Model X lines na unti-unting tinatanggal para sa 1M-units/year first-generation robotics plant; Optimus 3 ay mag-la-launch summer 2026 sa $20K-$30K na may daan-daang units sa 2026 na nag-ra-ramp up patungong libu-libo tapos sampu-sampung libo by 2027-2028) + ang Apr 28 Apptronik + Jabil Apollo manufacturing partnership + Figure 03 production sa 1/hour na may overnight fully-autonomous runs + Tesla CFO commentary sa capex-allocation sa pagitan ng EV at robotics tape ay magpi-pilit sa at least isang Mag-7 (Tesla initially; ≥1 sibling — NVIDIA Isaac, Amazon Robotics, Microsoft) na magpa-publish ng physical-AI capex bilang separate segment o footnote sa 10-Q bago ang anumang SEC mandate, mirroring kung paano ang cloud-segment disclosure ay unang pinupublish nang voluntarily noong 2014-2015 bago iyon na-formalize ng SEC.** Ang forcing function ay ang disclosure-precedent expansion: naging standard ang cloud capex segmentation sa sandaling lumampas ang dollar amounts sa buyside-attention threshold; ang physical-AI capex sa Tesla's 1M-units/year nameplate (~$25B-$35B annualized sa price target) ay lumampas sa threshold na iyon sa isang facility lamang, layered sa Apptronik + Figure + Boston Dynamics commercial deployment trajectory. Ang Q2 production-line build-out plus ang Optimus 3 summer launch ay nangangahulugan na ang Tesla 10-Q para sa period ending Sept 30 2026 ang natural na first disclosure venue; competitive pressure mula sa isang Tesla footnote disclosure ay magha-hatak ng sibling Mag-7 disclosure sa loob ng isa o dalawang filing cycles.

nodes.title: Chip-vendor AI-accelerator-revenue 10-Q segment lands by Q3 2026
nodes.description: **By Q3 2026 the AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print — consensus EPS $1.28 / rev $9.88B (+33% YoY); guidance $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); gross margin -2pp QoQ to 55% as the Q4 2025 +$360M MI308 inventory-reserve reversal evaporates; MI308 China revenue from ~$390M Q4 to ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 first deployment as the focal forward signals — combined with the Apr 30 AAPL Q3 +14-17% guide (vs 9.5% consensus) printed without a separate AI-services line + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI capex tape + $100B AAPL buyback authorization + Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item precedent + the May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV announcement that monetizes frontier-AI as a structured-equity wrapper forces at least one chip vendor (AMD as the most-likely first mover, given the China-cliff disclosure pressure; or NVIDIA / Broadcom as siblings) to publish AI-accelerator-only revenue as a 10-Q segment footnote ahead of any SEC mandate; expect the disclosure precedent to mirror the MSFT $37B AI run-rate footnote shape (single-line-item with optional supplementary breakout) rather than the more invasive cloud-segment disclosure regime.** Forcing function is the dual asymmetry: AMD's MI308 China collapse forces an export-control-revenue disclosure shape, while the AI-accelerator-revenue gap forces an AI-revenue disclosure shape; the cleanest investor-relations path is to ship both at once. The May 5 print is the natural anchor; AMD CFO commentary is the lead indicator. NVIDIA + Broadcom follow within one or two filing cycles via competitive-disclosure pressure.

description.en: **By Q3 2026 the AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print — consensus EPS $1.28 / rev $9.88B (+33% YoY); guidance $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); gross margin -2pp QoQ to 55% as the Q4 2025 +$360M MI308 inventory-reserve reversal evaporates; MI308 China revenue from ~$390M Q4 to ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 first deployment as the focal forward signals — combined with the Apr 30 AAPL Q3 +14-17% guide (vs 9.5% consensus) printed without a separate AI-services line + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI capex tape + $100B AAPL buyback authorization + Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item precedent + the May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV announcement that monetizes frontier-AI as a structured-equity wrapper forces at least one chip vendor (AMD as the most-likely first mover, given the China-cliff disclosure pressure; or NVIDIA / Broadcom as siblings) to publish AI-accelerator-only revenue as a 10-Q segment footnote ahead of any SEC mandate; expect the disclosure precedent to mirror the MSFT $37B AI run-rate footnote shape (single-line-item with optional supplementary breakout) rather than the more invasive cloud-segment disclosure regime.** Forcing function is the dual asymmetry: AMD's MI308 China collapse forces an export-control-revenue disclosure shape, while the AI-accelerator-revenue gap forces an AI-revenue disclosure shape; the cleanest investor-relations path is to ship both at once. The May 5 print is the natural anchor; AMD CFO commentary is the lead indicator. NVIDIA + Broadcom follow within one or two filing cycles via competitive-disclosure pressure.
description.ja: **2026年Q3までに、AMD 5月5日 Q1 2026決算 — コンセンサスEPS $1.28 / 売上 $9.88B（前年比+33%）。ガイダンス$9.8B（±$300M、前年比+32%）。粗利率は前期比-2ppの55%（Q4 2025の+$360M MI308在庫引当戻入が消失）。MI308中国売上Q4 約$390M → Q1 約$100M（前期比-75%）。MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 2026年下半期初回展開が焦点となる前向きシグナル — に加え、4月30日のAAPL Q3 +14〜17%ガイド（コンセンサス9.5%対比）が別建てAIサービスラインなしで発表されたこと + $700Bの2026年Big-Tech AI capexテープ + $100B AAPL自社株買い権限 + 4月29日のMSFT $37B AIランレート単一ライン項目前例 + 5月4日のAnthropic + OpenAI並行JV発表（フロンティアAIを構造化エクイティラッパーで収益化）が組み合わさり、少なくとも1社のチップベンダー（中国断崖開示プレッシャーを考慮するとAMDが最有力先駆者、または同型としてNVIDIA / Broadcom）に対し、SEC強制以前にAIアクセラレータ専用売上を10-Qセグメント脚注として公表することを強いる。開示前例は、より侵襲的なクラウドセグメント開示体制ではなく、MSFT $37B AIランレート脚注の形（任意の補足ブレイクアウトを伴う単一ライン項目）に倣うことが期待される。** 強制関数は二重の非対称性: AMDのMI308中国崩壊は輸出規制売上開示形状を強い、AIアクセラレータ売上ギャップはAI売上開示形状を強いる。最もクリーンなIRパスは両者を同時に出荷することである。5月5日の決算が自然なアンカー。AMD CFOのコメンタリーが先行指標。NVIDIA + Broadcomは競争的開示プレッシャーにより1〜2回の決算サイクル以内で追随する。
description.es: **Para el Q3 2026 el reporte AMD Q1 2026 del 5 mayo — consenso EPS $1.28 / ingresos $9.88B (+33% YoY); guía $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); margen bruto -2pp QoQ a 55% conforme la reversión de reserva de inventario MI308 de +$360M de Q4 2025 se evapora; ingresos MI308 China de ~$390M Q4 a ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + primer despliegue OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 como las señales focales hacia adelante — combinado con la guía AAPL Q3 +14-17% del 30 abril (vs consenso 9.5%) impresa sin línea separada de servicios AI + tape capex AI Big-Tech 2026 de $700B + autorización de buyback AAPL de $100B + precedente single-line-item MSFT de $37B AI-run-rate del 29 abril + el anuncio del 4 mayo de JV paralelas Anthropic + OpenAI que monetiza IA frontera como envoltorio de equity estructurado fuerza a al menos un chip vendor (AMD como el primer movedor más probable, dada la presión de divulgación del cliff China; o NVIDIA / Broadcom como hermanos) a publicar ingresos AI-accelerator-only como nota al pie de segmento 10-Q antes de cualquier mandato SEC; se espera que el precedente de divulgación refleje la forma de la nota al pie MSFT de $37B AI run-rate (single-line-item con desglose suplementario opcional) más que el régimen más invasivo de divulgación cloud-segment.** La función forzante es la asimetría dual: el colapso China de MI308 de AMD fuerza una forma de divulgación de ingresos por export-control, mientras la brecha de ingresos AI-accelerator fuerza una forma de divulgación de ingresos AI; el camino de relaciones-con-inversores más limpio es entregar ambas a la vez. El reporte del 5 mayo es el ancla natural; el comentario del CFO de AMD es el indicador líder. NVIDIA + Broadcom siguen dentro de uno o dos ciclos de filing vía presión de divulgación competitiva.
description.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q3 2026 ang AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print — consensus EPS $1.28 / rev $9.88B (+33% YoY); guidance $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); gross margin -2pp QoQ sa 55% habang nawawala ang Q4 2025 +$360M MI308 inventory-reserve reversal; MI308 China revenue mula ~$390M Q4 patungong ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 first deployment bilang focal forward signals — kasama ang Apr 30 AAPL Q3 +14-17% guide (vs 9.5% consensus) na inilathala nang walang separate AI-services line + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI capex tape + $100B AAPL buyback authorization + Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item precedent + ang May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV announcement na mone-monetize ang frontier-AI bilang structured-equity wrapper ay pinipilit ang kahit isang chip vendor (AMD ang pinaka-likely first mover, dahil sa China-cliff disclosure pressure; o NVIDIA / Broadcom bilang siblings) na maglathala ng AI-accelerator-only revenue bilang 10-Q segment footnote bago ang anumang SEC mandate; inaasahang ang disclosure precedent ay magmi-mirror sa MSFT $37B AI run-rate footnote shape (single-line-item na may optional supplementary breakout) sa halip na ang mas invasive cloud-segment disclosure regime.** Ang forcing function ay ang dual asymmetry: ang AMD's MI308 China collapse ay pinipilit ang isang export-control-revenue disclosure shape, habang ang AI-accelerator-revenue gap ay pinipilit ang isang AI-revenue disclosure shape; ang pinakalinaw na investor-relations path ay maglabas ng pareho nang sabay. Ang May 5 print ang natural anchor; ang AMD CFO commentary ang lead indicator. Ang NVIDIA + Broadcom ay susunod sa loob ng isa o dalawang filing cycles sa pamamagitan ng competitive-disclosure pressure.

summary.en: **By Q3 2026 the AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print — consensus EPS $1.28 / rev $9.88B (+33% YoY); guidance $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); gross margin -2pp QoQ to 55% as the Q4 2025 +$360M MI308 inventory-reserve reversal evaporates; MI308 China revenue from ~$390M Q4 to ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 first deployment as the focal forward signals — combined with the Apr 30 AAPL Q3 +14-17% guide (vs 9.5% consensus) printed without a separate AI-services line + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI capex tape + $100B AAPL buyback authorization + Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item precedent + the May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV announcement that monetizes frontier-AI as a structured-equity wrapper forces at least one chip vendor (AMD as the most-likely first mover, given the China-cliff disclosure pressure; or NVIDIA / Broadcom as siblings) to publish AI-accelerator-only revenue as a 10-Q segment footnote ahead of any SEC mandate; expect the disclosure precedent to mirror the MSFT $37B AI run-rate footnote shape (single-line-item with optional supplementary breakout) rather than the more invasive cloud-segment disclosure regime.** Forcing function is the dual asymmetry: AMD's MI308 China collapse forces an export-control-revenue disclosure shape, while the AI-accelerator-revenue gap forces an AI-revenue disclosure shape; the cleanest investor-relations path is to ship both at once. The May 5 print is the natural anchor; AMD CFO commentary is the lead indicator. NVIDIA + Broadcom follow within one or two filing cycles via competitive-disclosure pressure.
summary.ja: **2026年Q3までに、AMD 5月5日 Q1 2026決算 — コンセンサスEPS $1.28 / 売上 $9.88B（前年比+33%）。ガイダンス$9.8B（±$300M、前年比+32%）。粗利率は前期比-2ppの55%（Q4 2025の+$360M MI308在庫引当戻入が消失）。MI308中国売上Q4 約$390M → Q1 約$100M（前期比-75%）。MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 2026年下半期初回展開が焦点となる前向きシグナル — に加え、4月30日のAAPL Q3 +14〜17%ガイド（コンセンサス9.5%対比）が別建てAIサービスラインなしで発表されたこと + $700Bの2026年Big-Tech AI capexテープ + $100B AAPL自社株買い権限 + 4月29日のMSFT $37B AIランレート単一ライン項目前例 + 5月4日のAnthropic + OpenAI並行JV発表（フロンティアAIを構造化エクイティラッパーで収益化）が組み合わさり、少なくとも1社のチップベンダー（中国断崖開示プレッシャーを考慮するとAMDが最有力先駆者、または同型としてNVIDIA / Broadcom）に対し、SEC強制以前にAIアクセラレータ専用売上を10-Qセグメント脚注として公表することを強いる。開示前例は、より侵襲的なクラウドセグメント開示体制ではなく、MSFT $37B AIランレート脚注の形（任意の補足ブレイクアウトを伴う単一ライン項目）に倣うことが期待される。** 強制関数は二重の非対称性: AMDのMI308中国崩壊は輸出規制売上開示形状を強い、AIアクセラレータ売上ギャップはAI売上開示形状を強いる。最もクリーンなIRパスは両者を同時に出荷することである。5月5日の決算が自然なアンカー。AMD CFOのコメンタリーが先行指標。NVIDIA + Broadcomは競争的開示プレッシャーにより1〜2回の決算サイクル以内で追随する。
summary.es: **Para el Q3 2026 el reporte AMD Q1 2026 del 5 mayo — consenso EPS $1.28 / ingresos $9.88B (+33% YoY); guía $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); margen bruto -2pp QoQ a 55% conforme la reversión de reserva de inventario MI308 de +$360M de Q4 2025 se evapora; ingresos MI308 China de ~$390M Q4 a ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + primer despliegue OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 como las señales focales hacia adelante — combinado con la guía AAPL Q3 +14-17% del 30 abril (vs consenso 9.5%) impresa sin línea separada de servicios AI + tape capex AI Big-Tech 2026 de $700B + autorización de buyback AAPL de $100B + precedente single-line-item MSFT de $37B AI-run-rate del 29 abril + el anuncio del 4 mayo de JV paralelas Anthropic + OpenAI que monetiza IA frontera como envoltorio de equity estructurado fuerza a al menos un chip vendor (AMD como el primer movedor más probable, dada la presión de divulgación del cliff China; o NVIDIA / Broadcom como hermanos) a publicar ingresos AI-accelerator-only como nota al pie de segmento 10-Q antes de cualquier mandato SEC; se espera que el precedente de divulgación refleje la forma de la nota al pie MSFT de $37B AI run-rate (single-line-item con desglose suplementario opcional) más que el régimen más invasivo de divulgación cloud-segment.** La función forzante es la asimetría dual: el colapso China de MI308 de AMD fuerza una forma de divulgación de ingresos por export-control, mientras la brecha de ingresos AI-accelerator fuerza una forma de divulgación de ingresos AI; el camino de relaciones-con-inversores más limpio es entregar ambas a la vez. El reporte del 5 mayo es el ancla natural; el comentario del CFO de AMD es el indicador líder. NVIDIA + Broadcom siguen dentro de uno o dos ciclos de filing vía presión de divulgación competitiva.
summary.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q3 2026 ang AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print — consensus EPS $1.28 / rev $9.88B (+33% YoY); guidance $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); gross margin -2pp QoQ sa 55% habang nawawala ang Q4 2025 +$360M MI308 inventory-reserve reversal; MI308 China revenue mula ~$390M Q4 patungong ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 first deployment bilang focal forward signals — kasama ang Apr 30 AAPL Q3 +14-17% guide (vs 9.5% consensus) na inilathala nang walang separate AI-services line + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI capex tape + $100B AAPL buyback authorization + Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item precedent + ang May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV announcement na mone-monetize ang frontier-AI bilang structured-equity wrapper ay pinipilit ang kahit isang chip vendor (AMD ang pinaka-likely first mover, dahil sa China-cliff disclosure pressure; o NVIDIA / Broadcom bilang siblings) na maglathala ng AI-accelerator-only revenue bilang 10-Q segment footnote bago ang anumang SEC mandate; inaasahang ang disclosure precedent ay magmi-mirror sa MSFT $37B AI run-rate footnote shape (single-line-item na may optional supplementary breakout) sa halip na ang mas invasive cloud-segment disclosure regime.** Ang forcing function ay ang dual asymmetry: ang AMD's MI308 China collapse ay pinipilit ang isang export-control-revenue disclosure shape, habang ang AI-accelerator-revenue gap ay pinipilit ang isang AI-revenue disclosure shape; ang pinakalinaw na investor-relations path ay maglabas ng pareho nang sabay. Ang May 5 print ang natural anchor; ang AMD CFO commentary ang lead indicator. Ang NVIDIA + Broadcom ay susunod sa loob ng isa o dalawang filing cycles sa pamamagitan ng competitive-disclosure pressure.

Combined with the Apr 30 AAPL Q3 guide-without-AI-segment, by Q3 2026 ≥1 chip vendor ships an AI-accelerator-only revenue line as a 10-Q footnote ahead of any SEC mandate.
summary_short_locales.ja: AMDの5月5日 Q1決算は、輸出規制による中国売上の断崖（MI308 前期比-75%）と、AIアクセラレータ売上セグメントの欠如を露呈する。4月30日のAAPL Q3 AIセグメントなしガイドと組み合わさり、2026年Q3までに1社以上のチップベンダーが、SECの強制以前にAIアクセラレータ専用売上ラインを10-Q脚注として出荷する。
summary_short_locales.es: El reporte Q1 del 5 mayo de AMD expone el cliff de ingresos China por export-control (MI308 -75% QoQ) y el segmento faltante de ingresos AI-accelerator. Combinado con la guía AAPL Q3 del 30 abril sin segmento AI, para Q3 2026 ≥1 chip vendor entrega una línea de ingresos AI-accelerator-only como nota al pie 10-Q antes de cualquier mandato SEC.
summary_short_locales.fil: Ang May 5 Q1 print ng AMD ay naglalantad sa export-control China-revenue cliff (MI308 -75% QoQ) at sa nawawalang AI-accelerator-revenue segment. Kasama ang Apr 30 AAPL Q3 guide-without-AI-segment, pagsapit ng Q3 2026 ≥1 chip vendor ay maglalabas ng AI-accelerator-only revenue line bilang 10-Q footnote bago ang anumang SEC mandate.

prediction_summary_locales.ja: **2026年Q3までに、AMD 5月5日 Q1 2026決算 — コンセンサスEPS $1.28 / 売上 $9.88B（前年比+33%）。ガイダンス$9.8B（±$300M、前年比+32%）。粗利率は前期比-2ppの55%（Q4 2025の+$360M MI308在庫引当戻入が消失）。MI308中国売上Q4 約$390M → Q1 約$100M（前期比-75%）。MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 2026年下半期初回展開が焦点となる前向きシグナル — に加え、4月30日のAAPL Q3 +14〜17%ガイド（コンセンサス9.5%対比）が別建てAIサービスラインなしで発表されたこと + $700Bの2026年Big-Tech AI capexテープ + $100B AAPL自社株買い権限 + 4月29日のMSFT $37B AIランレート単一ライン項目前例 + 5月4日のAnthropic + OpenAI並行JV発表（フロンティアAIを構造化エクイティラッパーで収益化）が組み合わさり、少なくとも1社のチップベンダー（中国断崖開示プレッシャーを考慮するとAMDが最有力先駆者、または同型としてNVIDIA / Broadcom）に対し、SEC強制以前にAIアクセラレータ専用売上を10-Qセグメント脚注として公表することを強いる。開示前例は、より侵襲的なクラウドセグメント開示体制ではなく、MSFT $37B AIランレート脚注の形（任意の補足ブレイクアウトを伴う単一ライン項目）に倣うことが期待される。** 強制関数は二重の非対称性: AMDのMI308中国崩壊は輸出規制売上開示形状を強い、AIアクセラレータ売上ギャップはAI売上開示形状を強いる。最もクリーンなIRパスは両者を同時に出荷することである。5月5日の決算が自然なアンカー。AMD CFOのコメンタリーが先行指標。NVIDIA + Broadcomは競争的開示プレッシャーにより1〜2回の決算サイクル以内で追随する。
prediction_summary_locales.es: **Para el Q3 2026 el reporte AMD Q1 2026 del 5 mayo — consenso EPS $1.28 / ingresos $9.88B (+33% YoY); guía $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); margen bruto -2pp QoQ a 55% conforme la reversión de reserva de inventario MI308 de +$360M de Q4 2025 se evapora; ingresos MI308 China de ~$390M Q4 a ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + primer despliegue OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 como las señales focales hacia adelante — combinado con la guía AAPL Q3 +14-17% del 30 abril (vs consenso 9.5%) impresa sin línea separada de servicios AI + tape capex AI Big-Tech 2026 de $700B + autorización de buyback AAPL de $100B + precedente single-line-item MSFT de $37B AI-run-rate del 29 abril + el anuncio del 4 mayo de JV paralelas Anthropic + OpenAI que monetiza IA frontera como envoltorio de equity estructurado fuerza a al menos un chip vendor (AMD como el primer movedor más probable, dada la presión de divulgación del cliff China; o NVIDIA / Broadcom como hermanos) a publicar ingresos AI-accelerator-only como nota al pie de segmento 10-Q antes de cualquier mandato SEC; se espera que el precedente de divulgación refleje la forma de la nota al pie MSFT de $37B AI run-rate (single-line-item con desglose suplementario opcional) más que el régimen más invasivo de divulgación cloud-segment.** La función forzante es la asimetría dual: el colapso China de MI308 de AMD fuerza una forma de divulgación de ingresos por export-control, mientras la brecha de ingresos AI-accelerator fuerza una forma de divulgación de ingresos AI; el camino de relaciones-con-inversores más limpio es entregar ambas a la vez. El reporte del 5 mayo es el ancla natural; el comentario del CFO de AMD es el indicador líder. NVIDIA + Broadcom siguen dentro de uno o dos ciclos de filing vía presión de divulgación competitiva.
prediction_summary_locales.fil: **Pagsapit ng Q3 2026 ang AMD May 5 Q1 2026 print — consensus EPS $1.28 / rev $9.88B (+33% YoY); guidance $9.8B (+/- $300M, +32% YoY); gross margin -2pp QoQ sa 55% habang nawawala ang Q4 2025 +$360M MI308 inventory-reserve reversal; MI308 China revenue mula ~$390M Q4 patungong ~$100M Q1 (-75% QoQ); MI400 Helios rack-scale + Ryzen AI 400 + OpenAI 6GW MI450 H2 2026 first deployment bilang focal forward signals — kasama ang Apr 30 AAPL Q3 +14-17% guide (vs 9.5% consensus) na inilathala nang walang separate AI-services line + $700B 2026 Big-Tech AI capex tape + $100B AAPL buyback authorization + Apr 29 MSFT $37B AI-run-rate single-line-item precedent + ang May 4 Anthropic + OpenAI parallel JV announcement na mone-monetize ang frontier-AI bilang structured-equity wrapper ay pinipilit ang kahit isang chip vendor (AMD ang pinaka-likely first mover, dahil sa China-cliff disclosure pressure; o NVIDIA / Broadcom bilang siblings) na maglathala ng AI-accelerator-only revenue bilang 10-Q segment footnote bago ang anumang SEC mandate; inaasahang ang disclosure precedent ay magmi-mirror sa MSFT $37B AI run-rate footnote shape (single-line-item na may optional supplementary breakout) sa halip na ang mas invasive cloud-segment disclosure regime.** Ang forcing function ay ang dual asymmetry: ang AMD's MI308 China collapse ay pinipilit ang isang export-control-revenue disclosure shape, habang ang AI-accelerator-revenue gap ay pinipilit ang isang AI-revenue disclosure shape; ang pinakalinaw na investor-relations path ay maglabas ng pareho nang sabay. Ang May 5 print ang natural anchor; ang AMD CFO commentary ang lead indicator. Ang NVIDIA + Broadcom ay susunod sa loob ng isa o dalawang filing cycles sa pamamagitan ng competitive-disclosure pressure.
